About the Role We are looking for an experienced Oracle PCM Architect to lead the design, implementation, and optimization of profitability and cost management solutions within the Oracle EPM Cloud ecosystem. This role requires a strong mix of functional finance knowledge + technical EPM expertise, with ownership over solution architecture and client-facing delivery. Key Responsibilities Lead end-to-end solution design and architecture for Oracle PCM implementations Define cost allocation models, driver-based costing, and profitability frameworks Work closely with finance stakeholders to translate business requirements into scalable solutions Oversee data integrations, calculations, and model performance optimization Ensure best practices in metadata design, hierarchies, and dimensional modeling Support and guide teams during month-end and planning cycles Troubleshoot complex issues across data, calculations, and reporting Act as a technical leader and mentor for junior team members Required Qualifications Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Information Systems, or related field 5+ years of experience with Oracle EPM, including strong exposure to PCM Strong understanding of: Cost allocation methodologies Profitability analysis frameworks Financial modeling and reporting Hands-on experience with: Oracle PCMCS / EPCM Smart View Data Integration / Data Management Metadata and hierarchy design Preferred Qualifications Experience in consulting or managed services environments Exposure to multi-client / multi-project delivery Oracle EPM certifications (nice to have) Soft Skills Strong problem-solving and analytical mindset Ability to communicate with both technical and finance stakeholders Comfortable working in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment Work Expectations Support North American business hours when required Flexibility during planning and financial cycles Ownership of delivery quality and SLAs

title: Data annotator
description:
Confira a vaga para Data annotator em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Who is Blueprint Technologies? We are a technology solutions firm headquartered in Bellevue, Washington, with a strong presence across the United States and an expanding footprint across Latin America (LATAM). Our teams are united by a shared passion for solving complex problems. At Blueprint, we use technology as a bridge between strategy and execution. Our people bring diverse perspectives, deep expertise, and real-world experience across industries to help organizations grow, transform, and innovate. About the Role We are seeking detail-oriented Labelers / Annotators to evaluate responses generated by AI systems across multiple languages. This role focuses on side-by-side (SBS) evaluation of outputs from different AI models across real-world scenarios. You will play a key role in improving how AI systems understand and communicate across languages and cultures. This is not a translation role. It is an evaluation and analysis role requiring strong judgment and attention to detail. Language Requirement Fluency in English + at least one of the following languages: Chinese (Simplified and/or Traditional) Japanese Korean Italian German French What You'll Work On You will evaluate AI responses across scenarios such as: General-purpose Q& A Web search results File-based and image-based responses Image and file generation tasks Single-turn and multi-turn conversations Responsibilities Perform side-by-side (SBS) comparisons of AI-generated responses Evaluate outputs based on: Accuracy Relevance Clarity Instruction-following Identify nuances in tone, meaning, and cultural context across languages Apply detailed, scenario-specific annotation guidelines Maintain consistency and high-quality evaluations Required Qualifications Professional fluency in English + at least one target language listed above Prior experience with side-by-side (SBS) labeling or annotation Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail Ability to quickly understand and apply structured evaluation frameworks Preferred Qualifications Background in linguistics, translation, or localization Experience in: AI evaluation Data annotation Search relevance or content quality analysis Compensation We offer competitive compensation aligned with local markets and experience. Estimated hourly range: R$75 – R$85 BRL Estimated monthly equivalent (full-time): R$12,000 – R$13,600 BRL Actual compensation will be determined based on experience, skills, and internal equity. Training & Qualification All new hires will complete a structured onboarding program, including: Training sessions and practice exercises Calibration against quality benchmarks Qualification review before moving into production work Benefits & Employment Structure This role is hired through an Employer of Record (EOR) partner, ensuring full compliance with local labor laws and payroll requirements. Employees receive locally compliant benefits, which may include: Statutory benefits (e.g., paid leave, 13th salary where applicable) Social security and healthcare contributions Additional benefits aligned with local market practices Why Blueprint? Work on cutting-edge AI systems Be part of a global, multilingual team Build highly transferable AI evaluation skills Contribute directly to improving real-world AI experiences Equal Opportunity Employer Blueprint Technologies is an equal opportunity employer. We consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, color, age, disability, gender identity, sexual orientation, religion, national origin, or any other protected status.

title: Gerente de relacionamento
description:
Nova oportunidade para Gerente de relacionamento em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Responsabilidades e atribuições O que é o time de Principal? Prestam assessoria aos clientes de alta renda, por meio de relacionamento de excelência, identificando as necessidades financeiras e oportunidades de novos negócios, valorizando a centralidade do cliente e a principalidade ao maximizar o resultado/rentabilidade com competência, responsabilidade e ética. Como será seu dia a dia? Sendo Gerente Relacionamento Principal I, atuará na gerência Principal e suas principais atividades serão: · Atender e fidelizar clientes com excelência, oferecendo uma experiência personalizada e humanizada; · Gerenciar carteira de clientes com foco em relacionamento, rentabilização e retenção; · Identificar oportunidades de negócios e oferecer soluções financeiras completas, incluindo investimentos, crédito e seguros; · Atuar de forma estratégica para atrair recursos da concorrência; · Resolver conflitos e reclamações com empatia, agilidade e foco na satisfação do cliente; · Acompanhar metas e indicadores de desempenho, garantindo entregas consistentes; · Trabalhar em equipe com advisor de investimentos e gerente assistente, promovendo sinergia no atendimento; · Representar o segmento Principal com postura consultiva, sofisticação e profundo conhecimento técnico. Requisitos e Qualificações O que você precisa ter ou saber? · Formação superior completa; · Obrigatório: CEA ativa; · Excel e Power Point em nível intermediário a avançado; · Vivência com atendimento a clientes de alta renda; · Experiência na gestão de carteira e atuação consultiva; · Forte habilidade comercial; · Conhecimento sólido do mercado financeiro e produtos de investimentos; · Comunicação clara e postura consultiva no atendimento e Ética profissional e inteligência emocional para lidar com diferentes perfis de clientes e pares. Será um diferencial se você tiver: · Inglês fluente (para leitura de documentos e eventuais interações com clientes ou materiais internos).

title: Risk management officer
description:
Nova oportunidade para Risk management officer em palmas. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

About Us Established in March 2018, Bybit is one of the fastest growing cryptocurrency derivatives exchanges, with more than 70 million registered users. We offer a professional platform where crypto traders can find an ultra-fast matching engine, excellent customer service and multilingual community support. We provide innovative online spot and derivatives trading services, mining and staking products, as well as API support, to retail and institutional clients around the world, and strive to be the most reliable exchange for the emerging digital asset class. Our core values define us. We listen, care, and improve to create a faster, fairer, and more humane trading environment for our users. Our innovative, highly advanced, user-friendly platform has been designed from the ground-up using best-in-class infrastructure to provide our users with the industry's safest, fastest, fairest, and most transparent trading experience. Built on customer-centric values, we endeavour to provide a professional, 24/7 multi-language customer support to help in a timely manner. As of today, Bybit is one of the most trusted, reliable, and transparent cryptocurrency derivatives platforms in the space. Key Responsibilities: Implement and maintain a comprehensive risk management framework, covering credit, market, liquidity, operational, and technology risks. Conduct prudential and capital risk assessments, including stress testing, scenario analysis, and capital adequacy evaluations. Prepare and support regulatory disclosures required for virtual asset service providers (VASPs) and financial institutions. Oversee Margin-Account Operations, including; Development of policies governing margin lending and virtual asset collateral Setting and reviewing maximum loan-to-value (LTV) ratios and haircut levels Monitoring collateral valuation, capital add-ons and counterparty exposures Ensuring compliance with client/institutional limits and capital requirements Net-worth monitoring; Review and monitor risk indicators across business functions, escalating material breaches or deviations to senior management and the Board. Maintain independence from commercial and trading lines while ensuring collaboration with Compliance, Finance, and Operations. Liaise with internal and external auditors, regulators, and governance committees on risk management and capital matters. Support a risk-aware culture through training, communication, and continuous improvement of risk methodologies. Deep practical knowledge in CMN Res. 4557/17 regarding the risk management structure, the financial structure and the information disclosure policy management. Requirements: Legally resident in Brazil. Senior-level experience (minimum 7 years) in financial or prudential risk management, preferably within financial institutions, fintechs, or crypto/virtual asset firms. Demonstrated independence from commercial functions and ability to operate as a second-line or independent control function. Strong knowledge of Central Bank of Brazil risk management regulations, capital adequacy standards, and VASP disclosure requirements. Expertise in market and liquidity risk frameworks, stress testing, and margin-account operations involving virtual assets. Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, Risk Management, or related field; postgraduate qualification preferred. Strong quantitative, analytical, and communication skills; fluency in Portuguese and English. Must meet fit and proper standards with no disqualifying factors, including: not to have been declared bankrupt or insolvent; unblemished reputation; knowledge of the line of business, the services to be provided and the crypto segment, as well as crypto market dynamics and the risks associated with those activities; technical capability, compatible with the functions to be exercised. not having been previously rejected or investigated by the Central Bank of Brazil within the past three years for submitting false, omitted, or inconsistent information in any authorization request

title: Senior machine learning engineer
description:
Nova oportunidade para Senior machine learning engineer em boa vista. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

We are a Silicon Valley based product company building a next‐generation AI‐native B2 B platform for hospitality. We're looking for a Senior Machine Learning Engineer who is excited about the craft of machine learning—especially the mathematical and statistical foundations behind models—and who can turn that depth into solutions that scale in real-world use. If you're someone who enjoys choosing the right model for the problem, validating it rigorously, and improving it through iteration, you'll feel at home here. This is an opportunity for an engineer who wants to grow into a future architect, help define large-scale backend systems, and become a true technical champion within the team. If you are passionate about modern backend engineering, clean architecture, and scalable distributed systems, you'll love working with us. What you'll do Design, train, and improve statistical and machine learning models for real product use cases. Apply strong fundamentals in probability, statistics, and modeling to make sound decisions on approach and evaluation. Build scalable ML solutions that can be used reliably in production environments. Develop capabilities to support agent-like experiences within our platform (e.g., intelligent workflows, tool-using behaviors, retrieval patterns, guardrails). Define and monitor meaningful model metrics, run error analysis, and iterate based on results. What we're looking for We're intentionally not treating this as a checklist. If you're strong in the fundamentals and have built real ML systems, we'd love to hear from you. You'll be successful in this role if you have: Strong knowledge across a broad range of machine learning algorithms (supervised/unsupervised methods, ensembles, linear models, tree-based methods, deep learning basics) and the judgment to choose appropriately. Solid grounding in statistics and mathematical reasoning (e.g., bias/variance tradeoffs, uncertainty, evaluation design). Experience building ML solutions in practice: data understanding, feature design, training, evaluation, and iteration. Strong Python skills and the ability to write clear, maintainable code. Familiarity with standard ML tooling (e.g., scikit-learn, Py Torch/Tensor Flow). Nice to have (not required) Experience with NLP and/or LLMs (helpful, but not a core requirement). Exposure to ML-related capabilities on AWS, such as training/inference workflows or managed ML services (e.g., Sage Maker), and working with storage/data access patterns commonly used for ML. Experience implementing or integrating vector search / embedding-based retrieval. Why Join Us You will work in a modern, AI-native engineering culture building applied machine learning systems that ship. You'll have the opportunity to design mathematically grounded models, turn them into scalable product capabilities, and help define how intelligent agents live inside our platform. This role is ideal for someone who loves ML fundamentals, enjoys solving real problems end-to-end, and wants to grow into a senior technical leader shaping our ML direction. Equal Opportunity Directful is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome candidates of all backgrounds and do not discriminate on the basis of any protected characteristic.

description:
Confira a vaga para Game presenter em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Game Presenter em São Paulo Vem brilhar diante das câmeras em uma empresa líder em tecnologia! Salário competitivo + bônus por performance Make & styling profissionais todos os dias Estúdio moderno em SP Time internacional, vibe dinâmica e crescimento real Sem experiência? The role also involves analyzing and optimizing data systems while ensuring data integrity and supporting data-driven decision-making through effective data modeling and analytics. title: Business intelligence analyst
description:
Nova oportunidade para Business intelligence analyst em rio branco. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

About the Company Fraud Deflect helps businesses make better decisions around fraud, chargebacks, disputes, alerts, and operational performance. We work with high-volume operational data and need clear, trusted reporting that helps teams move quickly and make better decisions. About the Role We are looking for a BI Analyst to own and improve business reporting across fraud, chargebacks, alerts, merchant performance, and operations. This role is focused on dashboards, KPI tracking, reporting consistency, metric definitions, and turning business questions into clear, actionable insights. You will work closely with leadership, operations, product, and engineering to make data easier to understand, easier to trust, and more useful in day-to-day decision-making. Responsibilities Own dashboards, recurring reports, and KPI tracking across core business areas Build and maintain reporting that gives teams clear visibility into fraud, chargebacks, disputes, alerts, and operational performance Write and optimize SQL for reporting, analysis, and data validation Define, document, and improve business metrics so teams are working from consistent numbers Analyze trends, anomalies, and performance changes across key datasets Partner with stakeholders to translate business questions into practical reporting and analysis Improve the usability, accuracy, and trustworthiness of existing reports and dashboards Identify reporting gaps, data inconsistencies, and metric definition issues Create clear visualizations and present findings in a business-friendly way Support self-service reporting and help teams use data more effectively Requirements Strong SQL skills Experience building and maintaining dashboards and recurring business reporting Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills Ability to translate ambiguous business questions into clear metrics, reporting, and analysis Experience working with production data and validating reporting accuracy Strong communication skills with both technical and non-technical stakeholders Experience defining and maintaining KPIs or business metrics Comfortable working in a remote environment Able to pass a background check Preferred Experience with fraud, payments, chargebacks, disputes, risk, or other operational data Experience with BI and visualization tools Experience working with large datasets in a business reporting environment Experience with AWS-based data environments Basic Python skills for ad hoc analysis or validation Experience with Click House or similar analytical databases Familiarity with data warehouse or reporting-layer concepts How to Apply Please send your resume in English.

title: Software engineer ii - pleno | genai (clt) - remoto
description:
Empresa está contratando Software engineer ii - pleno | genai (clt) - remoto em boa vista. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Estamos em busca de uma pessoa Software Engineer Pleno (Gen AI) para compor o time de Tecnologia e mudar vidas com a gente! O Gran é um ecossistema que une educação e tecnologia, que acelera e customiza o aprendizado para diferentes necessidades e momentos e que já impactou mais de 2 milhões de vidas. Temos a plataforma de educação mais acessada do Brasil e fomos eleitos a 5a empresa mais inovadora da América Latina. Hoje, temos 2 verticais principais: a de Cursos Preparatórios e a Gran Faculdade. Adotamos iniciativas tecnológicas para deixar a educação mais inclusiva. Por isso, temos atualmente vários produtos para fazer isso acontecer, como: os audiolivros – com técnicas avançadas de inteligência artificial, criamos um acervo com mais de 28 mil livros convertidos em 110 mil horas de áudio –; o Gerenciador de Estudos, que auxilia no planejamento diário; e os aplicativos para TV e celulares Android e i OS, que funcionam também no modo offline. Recursos tecnológicos e inovação nos acompanham desde sempre e, com o esforço do nosso time, fomos reconhecidos mundialmente pela Amazon Web Services com três cases de sucesso envolvendo Inteligência Artificial, boas práticas, inovação, inclusão e impacto. Acesse nossos cases clicando nos links abaixo: 20 mil horas de vídeo legendadas com mais de 92% de precisão; Recomendação de cursos utilizando Amazon Sage Maker; Audiolivros. Se interessou? Vem ser Gran Lover! Esta vaga está no nosso modelo de trabalho Gran Mundo, sendo 100% remoto. Todas as nossas vagas são no modelo de trabalho CLT. Quer saber mais sobre a gente? Clique AQUI para retornar para a página de carreiras. Responsabilidades e atribuições Aqui você vai: Desenvolver e otimizar pipelines de RAG: Construir sistemas de RAG avançados que consultem múltiplas fontes de dados, como PDFs e transcrições de vídeo, para garantir respostas precisas e com ampla cobertura de conteúdo. Automatizar a avaliação de qualidade: Implementar pipelines de \"LLM-as-a-Judge\" para auditar a qualidade das respostas da IA em escala. Construir a personalização da IA: Desenvolver e implementar sistemas de memória conversacional de longo prazo (usando frameworks como Lang Chain) para que o sistema possa se lembrar do contexto e do históricos de interações. Arquitetar sistemas de múltiplos agentes: Projetar e construir uma arquitetura de agentes especialistas, com um router inteligente que direciona as requisições para o agentes mais adequados. Trabalhar com LLMs: Utilizar e otimizar os mais recentes modelos de linguagem (GPT, Claude, etc.), aplicando técnicas de prompt engineering para maximizar a qualidade das respostas. Contribuir para a vetorização do conhecimento: Apoiar a iniciativa estratégica de \"IA Onipresente\", ajudando a estruturar e vetorizar todo o acervo acadêmico do Gran para torná-lo acessível à IA. Definir contratos de dados: Colaborar com o Desenvolvedores de software para definir as APIs e os contratos de dados necessários para servir os modelos de IA com eficiência e baixa latência. Requisitos e qualificações O que buscamos: Experiência em Engenharia de IA/ML, com foco em IA Generativa e LLMs. Conhecimento e experiência prática na construção e otimização de sistemas RAG. Domínio de Python e de frameworks de IA como Lang Chain, Llama Index e/ou Hugging Face. Experiência com bancos de dados vetoriais (ex: Open Search, Milvus, Weaviate) e de Grafos (ex. Neo4j, Falkordb) Compreensão de prompt engineering, técnicas de avaliação de LLMs e estratégias de redução de alucinação. Experiência com a utilização de serviços de cloud (preferencialmente AWS) para deploy e gerenciamento de soluções de IA. Diferenciais: Experiência na construção de sistemas de múltiplos agentes (multi-agent systems). Conhecimento de ferramentas de observabilidade para LLMs (ex: Lang Fuse). Experiência com \"LLM-as-a-Judge\" para avaliação automatizada. Vivência em projetos que envolvem a ingestão e o processamento de grandes volumes de dados para alimentar sistemas de IA. Informações adicionais Aqui você vai encontrar benefícios como: Saúde e Bem-Estar: Plano de Saúde e Odontológico Sul América com cobertura nacional, custeado em 100% pela empresa. Wellhub (Gympass) ou reembolso de academia. Aplicativo para agendamento de massagem. Convênio com Sesc, proporcionando acesso a atividades culturais e de lazer. Aplicativos Starbem, Avus e Auster: saúde, bem-estar e suporte completo, incluindo assistência psicológica, financeira e jurídica. Alimentação: Vale Refeição ou Vale Alimentação pagos no cartão i Food. Reconhecimento e Incentivos: Auxílio Home Office pago no cartão i Food. PLR de acordo com as regras vigentes. Licença maternidade e paternidade estendidas. Gran Pix - Programa de reconhecimento de projetos com premiações. Auxílio-Creche. Desenvolvimento Profissional: Bolsa de estudos integral para Graduação e Pós-Graduação na Gran Faculdade. Assinatura Ilimitada Gran Concursos gratuita. Gran Academy - Universidade Corporativa para desenvolvimento dos Gran Lovers. Políticas de incentivo ao estudo, promovendo o aprendizado contínuo. Benefícios Especiais: Kit onboarding e equipamentos disponibilizados pelo Gran. Vale Natal em dezembro. Kit Gran Baby, um presente para celebrar o nascimento de bebês na família. M. O. M - Momento Off Mamãe: 1 (um) dia de descanso adicional no ano, a ser definido junto com a liderança direta. Gran Kit Escolar - auxílio material escolar. Auxílio Inclusão - exclusivo para Pc D. Petlove – plano de saúde para os pets da família. Tempo para você: Day Off no aniversário. Seguro de vida. Local de trabalho: Trabalhe de qualquer lugar! Nós estamos em home office, e temos colaboradores espalhados por todo o Brasil! Jornada de Trabalho: 40h semanais Nós valorizamos a diversidade e todas as pessoas são bem-vindas nos nossos processos seletivos. Vem ser Gran Lover!!! A nossa comunicação é feita por e-mail e/ou Whats App. Por isso, não esqueça de deixar o seu cadastro atualizado e fique de olho na sua caixa de entrada e spam. Todo o processo do Gran é feito de forma online e enviamos feedback ao fim de todos os processos. Etapas do processo Cadastro Entrevista com time de Pessoas e Cultura Entrevista com Liderança Contratação DESPERTAR POTENCIAIS, MUDAR VIDAS E CRIAR NOVOS FUTUROS ;) Somos um ecossistema que une educação e tecnologia, que acelera e customiza o aprendizado para diferentes necessidades e momentos.

title: Especialista em desenvolvimento de negócios (b2b)
description:
Nova oportunidade para Especialista em desenvolvimento de negócios (b2b) em boa vista. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

NÓS AJUDAMOS AS PESSOAS A ATINGIR SEUS OBJETIVOS NO MERCADO FINANCEIRO! TOPA VIR COM A GENTE? Somos uma fintech que une tecnologia e inovação em um mercado que não para de crescer! Desde 2019, o aplicativo Grana simplifica o cálculo de Imposto de Renda para investidores da bolsa. Hoje, estamos expandindo nossa atuação com novos produtos: Grana Pro, voltado para contadores e assessores que atendem investidores; Grana Smart, que utiliza Open Finance e Inteligência Artificial para dar mais clareza e controle sobre a vida financeira das pessoas. Estamos em um momento de construção e crescimento, abrindo novas frentes, testando caminhos e evoluindo nossos produtos com base em quem usa. Conheça mais sobre nossa proposta e funcionalidades em: DESCRIÇÃO DA VAGA O Grana Pro é nossa frente B2 B e está em fase de construção. Buscamos uma pessoa para atuar na linha de frente desse crescimento, ajudando a desenvolver e escalar a base de clientes. Essa posição envolve desde a prospecção e apresentação do produto até o acompanhamento do cliente ao longo da jornada, com um papel ativo na construção da estratégia comercial e na evolução do produto. Aqui, você terá autonomia, contato direto com o mercado e a oportunidade real de construir algo do zero. Se isso te descreve, essa vaga é para você! RESPONSABILIDADES E ATRIBUIÇÕES Mapear e prospectar ativamente contadores e assessores — levantamento de mercado, abordagem por e-mail, Linked In, Whats App e telefone, campanhas de marketing; Apresentar o produto em demonstrações por vídeo ou presencialmente, conectando as funcionalidades às dores reais de cada cliente; Acompanhar o funil de ponta a ponta, analisar a conversão e propor ações concretas para melhorar os números; Fazer o acompanhamento pós-venda, garantir que o cliente use o produto e vire referência; Dar retorno direto sobre o produto com base no que vê no dia a dia; REQUISITOS E QUALIFICAÇÕES Experiência em vendas consultivas ou gestão de contas B2 B; Facilidade para entender e explicar produtos com alguma complexidade (fiscal, tributária ou financeira); Perfil que constrói carteira de clientes do zero, sem esperar o contato chegar; Boa comunicação escrita e verbal; Capacidade de olhar a estratégia ampla para definir caminhos e, ao mesmo tempo, se envolver nos detalhes operacionais. Mentalidade \"0 a 1\": perfil auto-motivado que tenha paixão por construir e vontade de desenvolver uma prática de vendas B2 B do zero. Será um diferencial: Conhecimento pessoal ou profissional em investimentos (especialmente bolsa de valores); Experiência com contadores e assessores de contabilidade. INFORMAÇÕES ADICIONAIS Salário a combinar Contrato PJ Gympass Day Off de Aniversário Home Office (trabalho remoto) No dress code (sem código de vestimenta) Muito aprendizado e desenvolvimento! Na Grana Capital, acreditamos que a diversidade enriquece nosso ambiente de trabalho e impulsiona nossa missão. Aqui, todas as pessoas são bem-vindas para se candidatar.

title: Assistant production manager
description:
Confira a vaga para Assistant production manager em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

About At , we're reimagining how professional headshots are created and delivered. Trusted by clients like Boeing, Capital One, and American Express, we transform smartphone selfies into polished, studio-quality portraits within three business days. Our work helps individuals and teams present themselves with consistency and confidence across digital platforms. We're looking for an Assistant Production Manager, reporting to the Production Manager, who will co-lead our photo editing and quality control teams, guide strategy and drive operational excellence. About the Role This role combines production oversight with a deep appreciation for the artistry of headshot retouching. You'll manage the daily operations of our editing team, ensuring that each image reflects the clarity, subtlety, and professionalism our brand is known for. We're seeking someone who brings both technical expertise and a discerning creative eye—someone who can guide a team to produce beautiful, natural edits that elevate the subject rather than over-process them. Key Responsibilities Production & Quality Control Co-develop strategic initiatives to strengthen and improve production operations Ensure timely reporting and clear communication across production workflows Oversee daily editing operations to support consistent, high-quality delivery of headshots Maintain quality standards across visual consistency, lighting, natural retouching, and overall image polish Identify recurring issues, provide constructive feedback, and support continuous improvement across the production team Step in as needed to assist with editing, troubleshooting, or complex production requests Team Leadership & Coaching Supervise and mentor a team of photo editors Hire, train, and onboard new editors to uphold brand standards Foster a collaborative, high-accountability culture with clear communication Workflow Management & Operational Oversight Monitor task queues and deadlines to ensure smooth project flow Optimize systems and tools to eliminate inefficiencies or bottlenecks Lead team meetings, track KPIs, and document standard operating procedures Client & Project Coordination Collaborate across internal teams to meet client-specific requirements Maintain a client-centered approach while balancing quality and turnaround Support the development of background templates, sample images, and visual assets as needed What You Bring Experience & Skills 6+ years of photo retouching experience, especially in headshots or portraits 3+ years managing creative or production teams Experience with tools like Dropbox, Asana, and Slack Strong organizational and communication skills Mindset & Strengths Excellent attention to detail and visual aesthetics A \"no-ego\" team player: You leave your ego at the door, take extreme ownership of your work, and build deep trust through transparent communication. Reliable, deadline-driven, and calm under pressure Creative problem-solver with a passion for helping people look their best Comfortable giving and receiving feedback in a collaborative team environment Why Join Us? Flexible, remote work Work with a high-performing creative team Opportunity to shape the quality and scale of a fast-growing brand Compensation: $16-18/hour (full-time contract) depending on experience Schedule: Monday to Friday | Flexible hours (ET hours) IMPORTANT: Direct inquiries will disqualify candidates.

title: Professor de francês
description:
Empresa está contratando Professor de francês em boa vista. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Faça parte da comunidade de professores que está transformando o ensino de idiomas no Brasil! Onde os influencers do Brasil fazem suas aulas particulares! A Idioma Independente, referência em inovação no ensino de idiomas, está buscando pessoas proativas, com perfil proativo e fluência em um segundo idioma, que querem ter sucesso no âmbito profissional, para se credenciar como professores e fazer parte da nossa comunidade engajada. Aqui, você não será apenas mais um perfil online: você será parte de uma rede colaborativa com mais de 400 professores e 4.000 alunos que vivenciam nossa metodologia transformadora hoje, além de mais de 1000 professores e 10.000 alunos que já fizeram parte desta história. Nos últimos 12 meses tivemos mais de 22 mil alunos interessados em fazer aulas conosco. Professores novos têm lotado suas agendas em até 30 dias, quando são comprometidos, se comunicam de forma eficaz e tem agenda no horário da noite disponível. *Esta não é uma vaga CLT* O que oferecemos? Capacitação intensiva para melhoria no ensino de aulas de acordo com a nossa metodologia inovadora Acesso exclusivo a uma plataforma com mais de 400 vídeos de treinamento, baseada em uma metodologia que já entregou resultados incríveis, com vídeos totalmente atualizados. Mentorias semanais com especialistas experientes, que já treinaram mais de 1500 profissionais. Plataforma exclusiva para acompanhamento das aulas. Participação no nosso processo de captação de alunos, com possibilidade de ganhos adicionais relevantes, bastando você se interessar. Descontos exclusivos em cursos de idiomas e viagens com a nossa comunidade. Possibilidade de desenvolvimento e mentoria para ser um empreendedor de sucesso (se você quiser). Um banco de aulas com mais de 800 aulas para facilitar o seu processo de construção de aulas. Certificações dos treinamentos feitos dentro da comunidade que garantem que você obterá mais resultados juntos aos seus alunos e que agregam na sua carreira como professor independente. Como saber se você é a pessoa certa para fazer parte da maior comunidade de professores independentes do Brasil? Se você tem grandes ambições para impactar a educação no Brasil, acredita que o ensino de idiomas precisa de inovação, quer otimizar sua agenda de aulas e, ainda, gostaria de crescer como empreendedor, este é o lugar certo para você. Necessário: Maior de 18 anos, fluente em Português e outro idioma. Disponibilidade de ao menos 20 horas semanais para treinamentos, aulas e ações práticas Esta é uma necessidade para obter os maiores retornos que a comunidade pode te proporcionar. Possibilidade de participar em capacitações durante a semana, no turno da manhã ou tarde. Independência para executar atividades, espírito de colaboração e vontade de contribuir para uma comunidade. O diferencial? Aqui você é mais que um professor. Você será parte de uma comunidade de professores no ensino de idiomas, onde o trabalho colaborativo é a base para alcançar resultados de mercado altamente competitivos. Esta não é uma vaga CLT, mas sim uma oportunidade de empreender e ser dono do seu crescimento com total suporte e estrutura de uma empresa inovadora. Você cria laços e relações de confiança com pessoas que realmente se esforçam para te ajudar no seu desenvolvimento, devido ao modelo de negócio inovador que proporciona relações colaborativas e efetivas. Se você tem vontade de fazer diferente e de vivenciar algo novo na sua história profissional, a ii com certeza é o seu lugar. Faça parte da mudança no ensino de idiomas. Junte-se à Idioma Independente e transforme sua carreira e a vida de milhares de alunos! O que eu faço? Recebo capacitação para dar a melhor aula experimental da sua vida Recebo capacitação em nossa metodologia, aprendendo como transformar a vida de muitos alunos, entregando resultado para eles/as Recebo treinamentos e capacitações recorrentes com mentores experientes e especializados Organizo e escolho a minha agenda e os horários que gostaria de ter alunos/as Preparo aulas para os meus alunos/as Dou as aulas para os meus alunos/as Se você quiser ir além, também será possível, basta você se engajar na comunidade e aprender mais sobre todas as áreas do seu negócio. QUANTO EU RECEBO POR ISSO? Se você for somente professor, se dedicando 40h na semana a aulas, você poderá receber até R$4.000,00 por mês. Se você quiser aprender sobre diferentes áreas e se engajar na comunidade, você pode construir uma renda mensal de até R$6.000,00 por mês em aproximadamente 1 ano. Se você realmente quiser crescer e se desenvolver, se dedicando de forma integral junto da comunidade é possível chegar até R$12.000,00 por mês em 2 anos. Tudo isso só dependerá de você, se quiser aprender mais sobre as partes comerciais e sobre como se tornar um mentor/a de professores. Seja diferente, seja independente

title: Service desk analyst
description:
Confira a vaga para Service desk analyst em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

We're Hiring! Hybrid Service Desk Analysts (German+ English) Lite Tech | Brazil • Remote • 2 Open Position Are you passionate about solving technical problems and supporting users around the world? Do you speak GERMAN C1? If yes — we want to meet you! Lite Tech (formerly Lite Organização Ltda) is expanding its global support team and hiring 1 Remote Service Desk Analysts to join a dynamic, multicultural, fast-growing environment. About the Role Position: Service Desk — Technical Support & Helpdesk Contract: PJ (Independent Contractor) Workload: 40 hours/week (Monday to Friday just!) Salary 6.000,00 PJ Location: remote You'll be the first point of contact for users, helping resolve technical issues with professionalism, empathy, and precision. What You'll Do Provide first-level support via phone and email (chat may be added). Troubleshoot issues related to apps, email, browsers, and hardware (including remote screen sharing). Perform ID resets, manage email inconsistencies, and follow KB/SOP documentation. Log and classify tickets, escalate when necessary, and ensure proper prioritization. Meet service-level expectations for quality, productivity, and resolution times. What We're Looking For German: C1–C2 (spoken & written) 1–2 years of Customer Support or Technical Support experience Ability to work as PJ and issue invoices in Brazil Reliable home office setup (≥20 Mbps internet, wired headset, dedicated computer) Availability for shifts and 36 hours/week Why Join Lite Tech? Work remotely from anywhere in Brazil Be part of a global team supporting users worldwide Grow your technical and multilingual skills Collaborative environment, clear processes, and real career development opportunities

title: Senior software engineer
description:
Nova oportunidade para Senior software engineer em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Senior Software Engineer - Remote Key Responsibilities Design and implement scalable, maintainable, and well-documented systems and APIs. Develop and maintain services in Python with a strong focus on Django, async programming, typing, pydantic, and pytest. Apply SOLID principles, data structures, and algorithms to ensure clean, maintainable code. Build and integrate systems in event-driven architectures. Contribute to cloud-native development workflows, including Docker, Helm, and Ansible. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure system reliability, performance, and security. Write clear documentation and contribute to knowledge-sharing within the team. Required Skills & Experience High proficiency in Python, with practical experience in Django, Typing, Pydantic, Pytest. Strong background in systems/API. Experience with event-driven architecture. Hands-on experience with Kubernetes

title: Vaga freelancer | repórter de dados esportivos (futebol) | trabalho em estádio | meio período
description:
Confira a vaga para Vaga freelancer | repórter de dados esportivos (futebol) | trabalho em estádio | meio período em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Estamos buscando entusiastas do esporte que residam perto dos estados abaixo para se juntarem à nossa equipe como coletores de dados para eventos de futebol. A missão do repórter é coletar dados estatísticos ao vivo nos locais dos jogos, por meio do nosso aplicativo para dispositivos Android e i Phone. Qualificações e Requisitos: Conhecimento básico de inglês Possuir um dispositivo Android/i Phone Concluir um treinamento online para aprender a trabalhar com o aplicativo móvel Não é necessário ter formação em jornalismo Local de trabalho: Estádios de futebol e outros locais esportivos Oferecemos: Trabalho perfeito para estudantes ou para complementar a renda Treinamento completo e gratuito 62 euros (aproximadamente 405 reais) por partida coberta, além de reembolso de despesas de viagem e ingressos Estados onde precisamos urgentemente de pessoas para coleta de dados nos locais dos jogos: Alagoas Amazônia Espírito Santo Goiás Maranhão Mato Grosso/Mato Grosso do Sul Pará Paraíba Piauí Rondônia Roraima Aproveite a oportunidade para se juntar à nossa equipe e candidate-se agora!

description:

Discover the 10 benefits of being a Primer ( watch?v=NQ0s0k Lz Z0w) and see why we are much more than just a technology company. We are looking for a Dev Ops Engineer with: Experience in developing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation Manage cloud infrastructure and system environments Work with Docker, Kubernetes, and Infrastructure as Code tools Monitor system performance, availability, and reliability Troubleshoot deployment and infrastructure issues Ensure security, scalability, and high availability of systems Automate and optimize operational processes Fluent in English Regime: Remote - Mandatory location in Brazil Level of Experience: Mid (3 to 6 years) Salary Package & Benefits: €1,200 to €2,000 (salary base) + Food Allowance + Flex Benefits Need more reasons? Apply and send your CV to and find out how far your career can go at Prime IT!

title: Data analyst
description:
Empresa está contratando Data analyst em palmas. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

About The Role You'll join the Reporting & Analytics team at Pride Global — a high-impact, cross-functional group responsible for delivering data-driven insights across our global staffing operations. This role sits at the center of how the business makes decisions. You'll be responsible for building the reporting layer that powers executive dashboards, client presentations, and operational insights across the US, Canada, UK, and Brazil. This is not just a dashboarding role. You'll translate complex workforce, financial, and market data into clear, actionable narratives used by senior leadership and global business heads. We need someone who can take ambiguous business questions, structure them into analytical problems, and deliver high-quality reporting solutions end-to-end — from data modeling to final presentation. What You'll Do Design and develop Power BI dashboards used in executive-level reporting and client-facing presentations Build self-service reporting solutions that allow business stakeholders to explore data independently Create clean, intuitive, and visually effective dashboards optimized for both desktop and mobile consumption Develop and manage Power BI datasets, workspaces, and deployment pipelines across Dev / UAT / Prod Model data using star and snowflake schemas, applying best practices in DAX and Power Query (M) Integrate and transform data from multiple sources — ATS, VMS/MSP platforms, SQL databases, Excel, Share Point, and HR/ERP systems Partner with business leaders to understand reporting needs and translate them into structured analytical outputs Present insights and guide stakeholders through dashboards, explaining trends, limitations, and opportunities Support recurring reporting cycles (weekly, monthly, quarterly) with accurate and timely delivery Define and standardize key business metrics (headcount, spend, fill rates, aging, profitability, etc.) Implement data quality checks, anomaly detection, and validation rules within reporting layers Document data models, metric definitions, and reporting logic to ensure long-term scalability and governance What We're Looking For Must have (3–5 years of experience): Strong hands-on experience with Power BI (DAX, Power Query, data modeling, RLS) Solid SQL skills (joins, aggregations, query optimization, working with relational databases) Experience building reporting solutions for operational, workforce, or business performance data Proven ability to design clean, executive-level dashboards with clear storytelling and minimal noise Experience managing Power BI Service (workspaces, refresh schedules, access control, deployments) Ability to translate business needs into analytical solutions and communicate insights effectively Strong English communication skills (you'll work with global stakeholders daily) Nice to have: Experience in staffing, workforce, or HR analytics Familiarity with Microsoft Fabric, Azure Data Factory, or similar cloud data platforms Basic experience with Python or R for data preparation or automation Exposure to data governance practices (metric standardization, data lineage, documentation) Experience working in cross-functional environments (finance, operations, delivery teams)

title: Sr golang developer/ 100% remote in brazil
description:
Confira a vaga para Sr golang developer/ 100% remote in brazil em rio branco. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Job Profile: Sr Golang Developer Job Type: Long-time based contract Job Opportunity Location: 100% Remote in Brazil Job Description: Job Description: Specific Asks 8+ years of experience with at least the last 2-3 years focused on Golang. Sr developer Ability to pick action items and work proactively. Work independently Excellent communication skills JD: 8+ Years of Software Development Experience Able to apply functional and object-oriented paradigms. Able to apply the SOLID principles. Able to explain REST principles and design APIs that follow them. Experience with SOA, micro-services, and/or distributed architectures Able to architects systems and teaches others about appropriate software design patterns with eye towards scale and reliability Stays abreast of cross-industry/domain technology solutions and able to advocate for new frameworks and technologies within their scope of influence. Demonstrated ability designing and interacting with complex persisted data models. Demonstrated ability to own a technical roadmap. Able to both identify and improve poor performing code or database queries. You are interested in continually learning and mastering new skills. Able to communicate complex ideas and concepts simply and concisely. You are willing to monitor and own the production services the team is responsible for and capable of leading multiple teams in troubleshooting. Able to diagnose the most challenging production issues and implement the observability to provide this ability. Able to lead efforts across enterprise technical teams to drive complex enterprise issues to root cause - along with a plan and measurable progress for resolution. You are empathic and enjoy learning from and mentoring other engineers. Nice to Haves Open source software and dependency management Object/Document data storage technologies Caching and in-memory database technologies Asynchronous/Multi-threaded Programming Patterns Message queuing technologies/strategies

title: Senior technical consultant – front arena
description:
Confira a vaga para Senior technical consultant – front arena em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Why Zensar? We're a bunch of hardworking, fun-loving, people-oriented technology enthusiasts. We love what we do, and we're passionate about helping our clients thrive in an increasingly complex digital world. Zensar is an organization focused on building relationships with our clients and with each other—and happiness is at the core of everything we do. In fact, we're so into happiness that we've created a Global Happiness Council, and we send out a Happiness Survey to our employees each year. We've learned that employee happiness requires more than a competitive paycheck, and our employee value proposition—grow, own, achieve, learn (GOAL)—lays out the core opportunities we seek to foster for every employee. Teamwork and collaboration are critical to Zensar's mission and success, and our teams work on a diverse and challenging mix of technologies across a broad industry spectrum. These industries include banking and financial services, high-tech and manufacturing, healthcare, insurance, retail, and consumer services. Our employees enjoy flexible work arrangements and a competitive benefits package, including medical, dental, vision, 401(k), among other benefits. If you are looking for a place to have an immediate impact, to grow and contribute, where we work hard, play hard, and support each other, consider joining team Zensar! Zensar is looking for a Senior Technical Consultant – Front Arena. About the Role The Senior Technical Consultant will act as the technical SME for the Front Arena implementation, responsible for overall technical design, integrations, and enabling delivery teams during both scoping and execution phases. Key Responsibilities Lead technical design for the Front Arena or Murex (MX.3 B) or Calypso (Nasdaq) technical configuration (static data, environments) implementation Own technical architecture, integrations, and system configuration approach Support scoping activities, including defining technical complexity and risks Act as technical SME to guide and upskill junior and partner consultants Work closely with functional leads to ensure coherent front to back solutions Support on site workshops as required Required Skills & Experience Spanish nice to have Strong Front Arena technical expertise (configuration, architecture, integrations) or Murex (MX.3 B) or Calypso (Nasdaq) technical configuration (static data, environments) Experience with full front to back Front Arena implementations Prior involvement in large scale / greenfield implementations Ability to mentor and guide junior technical resources Experience working in multi vendor delivery models Spanish language skills strongly preferred Experience in Latin American / Mexican market environments is a strong advantage, Competent with Python Zensar believes that diversity of backgrounds, thought, experience, and expertise fosters the robust exchange of ideas that enables the highest quality collaboration and work product. Zensar is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions shall be made without regard to age, race, creed, color, religion, sex, national origin, ancestry, disability status, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, citizenship status or any other basis as protected by federal, state, or local law. Zensar is committed to providing veteran employment opportunities to our service men and women. title: Médico cardiologista
description:
Empresa está contratando Médico cardiologista em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

*OPORTUNIDADE PARA MÉDICO CARDIOLOGISTA (desejável RQE) NA TELADOC HEALTH\" Junte-se à Nossa Equipe de Saúde Digital! A Teladoc Health, líder global em saúde digital e inovação em cuidados de saúde, está buscando Médicas e Médicos Especialistas em Cardiologia. Se você é um profissional comprometido com a excelência no atendimento ao paciente e deseja fazer parte de uma revolução na prestação de serviços de saúde, esta é a oportunidade que você estava esperando. *SOBRE A TELADOC HEALTH:* Nosso time de profissionais desempenha um papel crucial no suporte dos pacientes, para sanar suas dúvidas, atender as demandas de saúde de acordo com a necessidade de cada um, através de nossa plataforma online. Se você é um profissional licenciado, focado em resultados e apaixonado por fazer a diferença na vida dos pacientes, queremos conhecer você! *O QUE PROCURAMOS:* Você será responsável por realizar consultas por vídeo e telefone, por intermédio de plataforma do empregador, atendendo na especialidade cardiologia, de forma ética, com abordagem biopsicossocial do processo saúde-adoecimento, integrando ações de prevenção, promoção, proteção, recuperação e educação em saúde buscando alcançar os melhores resultados clínicos; PAPEL E RESPONSABILIDADES Fornecer atendimento médico especializado em cardiologia de forma remota, através de consultas e avaliações realizadas por meio de plataformas digitais de comunicação. Experiência e conhecimento para o diagnóstico, tratamento e acompanhamento de pacientes com doenças e distúrbios cardiológicos. Realizar consultas em Telemedicina sendo capaz de conduzir anamnese virtual para coletar queixas e histórico médico, realizar exame clínico e avaliações à distância, interpretar resultados de exames laboratoriais e de imagem, elaborar diagnósticos precisos, propor medidas terapêuticas e orientações de cuidado, reconhecer sinais de risco e gravidade em cardiologia e critérios para encaminhar ao atendimento presencial. Atuar de forma a priorizar a prática médica centrada na pessoa. Elaborar planos de tratamento individualizados, levando em consideração as necessidades específicas de cada paciente. Ser hábil na prescrição de medicamentos adequados para tratar doenças cardiológicas. Monitorar o progresso dos pacientes ao longo do tratamento em telemedicina. Realizar ajustes no plano de tratamento, conforme necessário, com base na resposta do paciente ao tratamento. Desenvolver atividades integrais de saúde, incorporando prevenção e promoção de saúde para dar as respostas mais adequadas às necessidades de saúde apresentadas. Atender com elevado grau de qualidade, sendo resolutivo na grande maioria das orientações acerca dos principais problemas de saúde em cardiologia. Considerar os valores e preferências pessoais do paciente conjuntamente às melhores evidências científicas e à experiência de manejo clínico para efetivamente promover a melhor prática clínica e os melhores desfechos em saúde para cada indivíduo. Exercer uso racional de recursos em saúde visando a segurança do paciente e a prevenção quaternária, evitando sobrediagnóstico e sobretratamento, que expõe os indivíduos a maiores riscos do que benefícios em saúde. Estimular a participação e a autonomia dos indivíduos e familiares, fortalecendo a aderência a tratamentos e medidas de autocuidado. Documentar todas as interações e informações relevantes dos pacientes em prontuários eletrônicos seguros e confidenciais. Ter capacidade de crítica de sua própria atividade médica, considerando-a em seus aspectos científicos, éticos e sociais para aprimoramento contínuo. Manter-se bem-informado e atualizado, ampliando sua própria competência em relação a conhecimentos sobre riscos em saúde e sobre as medidas mais eficientes para eliminar ou reduzir os riscos relevantes. Respeitar, cumprir e fazer cumprir os ditames do Código de Ética Médica, bem como a Legislação vigente e os regulamentos internos formais da Instituição. REQUISITOS OBRIGATÓRIOS E PREFERÊNCIAS DE HABILIDADES Formação Acadêmica: Obrigatório: GRADUAÇÃO EM MEDICINA Obrigatório: RESIDÊNCIA MÉDICA OU ESPECIALIZAÇÃO EM CARDIOLOGIA, ou Especialização, residência concluída, ou em andamento. Certificações: Registro ativo no Conselho Regional de Medicina (CRM); Certificado de Registro do Título de Especialista em cardiologia (RQE), emitido pelo Conselho Regional de Medicina do respectivo Estado ; ou matrícula em curso de residência, especialização, ou pós, em andamento; Certificado Digital Ativo reconhecido pela Infraestrutura de Chaves Públicas Brasileira (ICP-Brasil). Experiência: Experiência em atividades relacionadas à atuação em atendimento médico em cardiologia, sendo desejável experiência prévia em Telemedicina e Atenção Primária à Saúde; Conhecimentos Específicos para a função: Médico competente em prestar orientações personalizadas a indivíduos e suas famílias com conhecimentos para o diagnóstico, tratamento e acompanhamento de pacientes com problemas de saúde cardiológicos. Competências Comportamentais: Médico comprometido com os pacientes, com ideais e valores da empresa, apresentando postura ética, pontualidade, capacidade de integração com equipe multiprofissional. Outros Requisitos Importantes: Conhecimentos e Habilidades em computação: uso do Pacote Office (Excel, Word, Power Point, Gráficos) e Internet. Familiaridade com tecnologias de telemedicina e uso de plataformas de comunicação virtual é um diferencial desejável. Local de Trabalho: REMOTO IMPORTANTE: MODELO DE CONTRATAÇÃO: Contratação em regime de Prestador de Serviços por contrato Pessoa Jurídica, necessário fazer parte como representante legal ou sócio de um CNPJ ativo. REMUNERAÇÃO E AGENDAMENTOS: a negociar durante processo seletivo. Esta descrição de cargo/atuação tem caráter informativo e pode ser ajustada conforme a necessidade da empresa ou instituição que oferece a oportunidade de trabalho em telemedicina para Médico Clínico/Generalista Residente em Cardiologia.

*OPORTUNIDADE PARA MÉDICO PEDIATRA (com RQE) NA TELADOC HEALTH\" Junte-se à Nossa Equipe de Saúde Digital! Se você é um profissional comprometido com a excelência no atendimento ao paciente e deseja fazer parte de uma revolução na prestação de serviços de saúde, esta é a oportunidade que você estava esperando. *SOBRE A TELADOC HEALTH:* A Teladoc Health está na vanguarda da transformação da saúde, oferecendo acesso rápido, conveniente e confiável a serviços de saúde através de nossa plataforma digital. Combinando tecnologia de ponta e conhecimento médico, estamos moldando o futuro da saúde e proporcionando impacto positivo na vida de milhões de pessoas. *O QUE PROCURAMOS:* Estamos em busca de Médico/a Pediatra, comprometidos e capacitados para se juntarem à nossa equipe multidisciplinar. Nosso time de médicos desempenham um papel crucial no suporte dos pacientes, para sanar suas dúvidas, atender as demandas de saúde de acordo com a necessidade de cada um, através de nossa plataforma online. Competência na avaliação pediátrica, incluindo o reconhecimento de problemas e doenças que possam estar presente nesta faixa etária. Habilidade em conduzir entrevistas detalhadas e observar sintomas e sinais através de vídeochamada com o responsável. Atuar de forma a priorizar a prática médica centrada na pessoa. Atender com elevado grau de qualidade, sendo resolutivo na grande maioria das orientações acerca dos principais problemas de saúde em Pediatria. Garantir o respeito ao ECA (Estatuto da Criança e do Adolescente) com respeito aos seus direitos e prerrogativas para o cuidado em saúde. Documentar todas as interações e informações relevantes dos pacientes em prontuários eletrônicos seguros e confidenciais. Ter capacidade de crítica de sua própria atividade médica, considerando-a em seus aspectos científicos, éticos e sociais para aprimoramento contínuo. Manter-se bem-informado e atualizado, ampliando sua própria competência em relação a conhecimentos sobre riscos em saúde e sobre as medidas mais eficientes para eliminar ou reduzir os riscos relevantes. Respeitar, cumprir e fazer cumprir os ditames do Código de Ética Médica, bem como a Legislação vigente e os regulamentos internos formais da Instituição. REQUISITOS OBRIGATÓRIOS E PREFERÊNCIAS DE HABILIDADES Formação Acadêmica: Obrigatório: GRADUAÇÃO EM MEDICINA Obrigatório: RESIDÊNCIA MÉDICA OU ESPECIALIZAÇÃO EM PEDIATRIA Certificações: Registro ativo no Conselho Regional de Medicina (CRM); Certificado de Título de Especialista em Pediatria - RQE emitido pelo Conselho respectivo; Certificado Digital Ativo reconhecido pela Infraestrutura de Chaves Públicas Brasileira (ICP-Brasil). Competências Comportamentais: Médico comprometido com os pacientes, com ideais e valores da empresa, apresentando postura ética, pontualidade, capacidade de integração com equipe multiprofissional. title: Java software engineer
description:
Empresa está contratando Java software engineer em palmas. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Company Description Theta Data is a pioneering data company specializing in low-latency APIs for delivering high-speed options and stocks data. Our mission is to empower users with real-time, actionable information to make well-informed decisions in dynamic financial markets. With a focus on speed and broad data coverage, Theta Data stands at the forefront of the options data industry by providing essential tools and insights. We are dedicated to equipping professionals with the resources needed to excel in a competitive landscape. We're a small, nimble team growing quickly. Our platform handles billions of database requests daily, and we're just getting started. The complexity of our data problems is real: tick-level options data is among the most intricate financial data to store, index, and serve at scale. We take engineering seriously. Role Description We're hiring backend-focused Software Engineers to help build and scale the services that power Theta Data. This is a hands-on coding role. You'll be writing production code from day one. We are looking for self-starting engineers who think deeply about system scale, creatively solve problems, and can move forward in high ambiguity. You'll join a lean engineering team where your work has a direct, visible impact on the platform and the customers who use it. We have new services to architect, bottlenecks to eliminate, and workflows to redesign from scratch. Additionally, you'll support live systems, investigate and resolve bugs, and help keep a platform that customers depend on running smoothly. What you will work on Design, build, and scale backend services handling billions of requests daily Architect new systems and contribute to technical direction Improve and automate customer onboarding workflows Identify and resolve performance bottlenecks across the stack Collaborate directly with the team and senior technical leadership Our Technical Stack Java - core backend services, business logic, API, thick client Python - scripting, tooling Apache Tomcat - servlet container Java Servlets - HTTP request handling Postgre SQL + Hibernate g RPC AI coding tools (Claude, Gemini, Copilot) - we use them, you should too What we are looking for We hire for fundamentals, ownership, and a love of building. Depending on your experience level, here's what we care about: Required Deep proficiency in Java with a strong command of the language and ecosystem Proven experience optimizing application performance through JVM heap tuning, garbage collection analysis, and memory allocation strategies Strong computer science fundamentals, including data structures, algorithms, and systems-level thinking Demonstrated experience designing, building, and maintaining REST APIs and backend services Working knowledge of HTTP, authentication protocols, and modern web architecture Nice to Have Experience working in data-intensive, low-latency environments where performance matters Hands-on experience with Postgre SQL, including schema design and query optimization Python development experience for tooling, scripting, or service work Familiarity with Apache Tomcat in production or staging environments Frontend exposure with Type Script and a modern UI library or framework (Vue, React, or similar) Experience designing or maintaining CI/CD pipelines for automated build, test, and deployment Why Theta Data Rapid growth: the platform and team are both scaling fast Real engineering challenges: data at scale, low-latency systems, complex financial data High ownership: a small team means your decisions matter and ship quickly Greenfield opportunities: new systems to design, not just legacy to maintain Remote-first: work from anywhere Direct impact: your work reaches thousands of quants and researchers daily

title: Full stack developer specialist – node.js / typescript
description:
Empresa está contratando Full stack developer specialist – node.js / typescript em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Here at Zallpy, technology is born from curious, collaborative people with a desire to do things well. If you like environments where there's room to ask questions, test, learn, and evolve together, check out this opportunity! Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion At Zallpy, we value an environment where everyone can be themselves, with respect, safety, and a sense of belonging. We especially encourage applications from people with disabilities and guarantee an accessible environment with adaptations and support throughout the journey. We also encourage Black people, women, LGBTQIA+ individuals, and professionals from diverse backgrounds to apply. Here, you can be yourself at every stage of your journey. Come join us. We are looking for someone to work in a team that thinks big, works with attention to detail, collaborates daily, and shares responsibility. We believe in autonomy, the exchange of different experiences, and solutions built together. Here, growth means sharing knowledge, respecting different ways of thinking, and building trusting relationships while delivering quality technology. If you identify with this way of working, come join us. What you will do: Develop technical solutions that meet the requirements presented using the technologies involved in the project; Work within agile team structures based on Agile methodologies, with intense information exchange; Participate in ceremonies for defining the product backlog for Sprints, as well as Dailies, Reviews, and Retrospectives; Keep task boards updated regarding pending tasks, ongoing activities, and possible blockers; Use the company's communication tools to stay updated on schedules, alignments, and team discussions; Deliver code covered by unit and integration tests; Submit Pull Requests for team review. What we are looking for: Bachelor's degree in Technology or related fields (ongoing or completed); Experience with version control management using Git and Git Flow; Experience with Docker; Experience in WEB application development using React.js; Experience with front-end componentization; Experience with component styling using styled-components; Experience with unit and integration testing on both front-end and back-end using Jest; Experience in application development using Node.js / Type Script; Experience processing large volumes of transactional data; Experience developing applications with high data volume and asynchronous processing; Experience developing REST API applications; Experience developing applications using Graph QL; Experience developing applications using Mongo DB; Experience developing applications using Postgre SQL; Experience with ETL processes; Experience creating and maintaining CI/CD pipelines; Experience with container orchestration using Kubernetes. Nice to have: Experience working with basic Cloud services (EC2, S3, RDS); Advanced knowledge of Design Patterns, including SOLID, Clean Code, etc.; Experience creating and managing Cloud Services (AWS, Azure); Experience with Infrastructure as Code (Ia C) using Terraform, Consul, AWS, Azure, or similar technologies; Previous experience as a Tech Lead or Software Architect; Experience with database migration between Mongo DB and Postgre SQL. Where you will work: This is a 100% remote position. Hiring models: CLT Cooperative Benefits of being a Zallper: Meal/Food Allowance Caju multi-benefit card (credit format), offering flexibility for everyday needs. (CLT only) * Health Plan – Unimed No waiting period or copayment for the holder. Possibility to include dependents (children, spouse, or stepchildren) with copayment. (CLT only) * Dental Plan – Uniodonto Affordable options to include dependents. (CLT only) * Wellhub Access to gyms, physical activities, and wellness programs. Zenklub For CLT: Two free sessions per month and special rates for additional sessions. For Cooperative/Contractor: Special rates for sessions. Life Insurance More security for you and your family. (CLT only) * Childcare Allowance Financial support for Zallpers with children from 4 months to 6 years old, according to internal policy. (CLT only) * Baby Zallpy A special gift to celebrate the arrival of new Zallpy babies. Business Partner Support Close and human-centered support from our People & Culture team throughout your journey at Zallpy. Volunteer Internal Communities Diversity, Sports & Movement, and Technology. Educational Partnerships Discounts on undergraduate and graduate programs, professional courses, and language schools. Experiences & Development Participation in events, workshops, trips, and team-building activities. Referral Program Refer talents to Zallpy and receive bonuses from R$2,500 to R$5,000. * Contractor / PJ: For these hiring models, the benefits above apply except for those marked with an asterisk (*), which are exclusive to CLT. In addition, we offer dedicated platforms to manage contractors, ensuring organization, transparency, and a structured experience throughout the entire journey.

Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues during and post-upgrade/conversion. Maintain comprehensive documentation of upgrade/conversion procedures and lessons learned. Stay current with SAP's roadmap, release strategy, and best practices for upgrades and conversions. ECS experience is added advantage

title: Technology manager (licensed entities)
description:
Nova oportunidade para Technology manager (licensed entities) em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

About Revolut People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day. As we continue our lightning-fast growth, 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work TM. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution. About the role Our Technology team builds the systems and experiences that keep Revolut moving forward. From the infrastructure behind our innovative app to the features used by millions of people around the world, they bring sharp thinking, speed, and a focus on meaningful impact to everything they do. We're looking for a Technology Manager to partner closely with local and global teams across Operations, Product, Risk, and Compliance on technology initiatives. You'll ensure local technology frameworks, systems, and governance align with both group standards and Brazilian regulatory expectations. Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch. What you'll be doing Overseeing the implementation and evolution of the local technology architecture Contributing to the execution of the IT and data strategy Collaborating with global teams on technology transformations and system migrations Supporting IT governance processes, including documentation and reporting for local regulatory requirements Coordinating with internal stakeholders on technology initiatives related to regulatory compliance Helping ensure systems are scalable, reliable, and aligned with group technology standards Supporting operational processes and technology frameworks required for regulated financial entities in Brazil What you'll need 5+ years of experience in technology, IT architecture, or technology governance within financial services or fintech Familiarity with regulatory and security requirements in Brazil, including cybersecurity, outsourcing, operational risk management, and data protection A bachelor's degree or equivalent in a relevant field, such as engineering, computer science, or information systems Great organisational and time management skills Knowledge of IT systems, infrastructure, or technology governance frameworks Solid analytical and problem-solving skills Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills Fluency in English Building a global financial super app isn't enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that's why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D& I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We're doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That's why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team. Important notice for candidates: Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles. • Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don't use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment. • Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an@ domain. We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it's a scam. Report it immediately. By submitting this application, I confirm that all the information given by me in this application for employment and any additional documents attached hereto are true to the best of my knowledge and that I have not wilfully suppressed any material fact. I confirm I have disclosed if applicable any previous employment with Revolut. I accept that if any of the information given by me in this application is in any way false or incorrect, my application may be rejected, any offer of employment may be withdrawn or my employment with Revolut may be terminated summarily or I may be dismissed. By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with Revolut's Candidate Privacy Notice

description:
