title: Consultor de investimentos ws - parceiros xp | remoto
description:
Empresa está contratando Consultor de investimentos ws - parceiros xp | remoto em boa vista. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Essa oportunidade é para consultor de investimento nas consultorias Wealth Service parceiras da rede XP, que tem a missão de ajudar o brasileiro a investir melhor. São times apaixonados por relacionamento com cliente, aprofundamento técnico sobre alocação de recursos e prospecção de novos negócios. Principais Responsabilidades Prospecção de novos clientes; Atuação na consultoria de investimentos, sendo responsável por orientar o cliente final na gestão de patrimônio; Elaboração de portfólio de investimentos em linha com o perfil e objetivo dos clientes; Análise de alocações externas e elaboração de estudos comparativos exclusivos, identificando oportunidades e apresentando de forma objetiva; Acompanhamento de tendências de mercado, se mantendo sempre informado sobre atualidades do cenário econômico e acontecimentos relevantes. Informações Importantes Trabalho remoto em diversas praças do país Pré-Requisito Perfil comercial e fortes habilidades de comunicação; Alto nível de intensidade e disciplina; Conhecimento sobre cenário econômico atual; Experiência prévia em instituições financeiras; Certificação CEA, CFP, CFA, CGA, C-PRO R, C-PRO I ou CPA-20 (aceitável com prova agendada) Você pode ter destaque se: Possuir carteira de clientes para prospecção; Ter base de clientes já estabelecida é um grande diferencial; Conhecimentos sobre produtos financeiros; Noções básicas de macroeconomia e atualidades.

title: Full stack developer specialist – node.js / typescript
description:
Confira a vaga para Full stack developer specialist – node.js / typescript em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Here at Zallpy, technology is born from curious, collaborative people with a desire to do things well. If you like environments where there's room to ask questions, test, learn, and evolve together, check out this opportunity! Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion At Zallpy, we value an environment where everyone can be themselves, with respect, safety, and a sense of belonging. We especially encourage applications from people with disabilities and guarantee an accessible environment with adaptations and support throughout the journey. We also encourage Black people, women, LGBTQIA+ individuals, and professionals from diverse backgrounds to apply. Here, you can be yourself at every stage of your journey. Come join us. We are looking for someone to work in a team that thinks big, works with attention to detail, collaborates daily, and shares responsibility. We believe in autonomy, the exchange of different experiences, and solutions built together. Here, growth means sharing knowledge, respecting different ways of thinking, and building trusting relationships while delivering quality technology. If you identify with this way of working, come join us. What you will do: Develop technical solutions that meet the requirements presented using the technologies involved in the project; Work within agile team structures based on Agile methodologies, with intense information exchange; Participate in ceremonies for defining the product backlog for Sprints, as well as Dailies, Reviews, and Retrospectives; Keep task boards updated regarding pending tasks, ongoing activities, and possible blockers; Use the company's communication tools to stay updated on schedules, alignments, and team discussions; Deliver code covered by unit and integration tests; Submit Pull Requests for team review. What we are looking for: Bachelor's degree in Technology or related fields (ongoing or completed); Experience with version control management using Git and Git Flow; Experience with Docker; Experience in WEB application development using React.js; Experience with front-end componentization; Experience with component styling using styled-components; Experience with unit and integration testing on both front-end and back-end using Jest; Experience in application development using Node.js / Type Script; Experience processing large volumes of transactional data; Experience developing applications with high data volume and asynchronous processing; Experience developing REST API applications; Experience developing applications using Graph QL; Experience developing applications using Mongo DB; Experience developing applications using Postgre SQL; Experience with ETL processes; Experience creating and maintaining CI/CD pipelines; Experience with container orchestration using Kubernetes. Nice to have: Experience working with basic Cloud services (EC2, S3, RDS); Advanced knowledge of Design Patterns, including SOLID, Clean Code, etc.; Experience creating and managing Cloud Services (AWS, Azure); Experience with Infrastructure as Code (Ia C) using Terraform, Consul, AWS, Azure, or similar technologies; Previous experience as a Tech Lead or Software Architect; Experience with database migration between Mongo DB and Postgre SQL. Where you will work: This is a 100% remote position. Hiring models: CLT Cooperative Benefits of being a Zallper: Meal/Food Allowance Caju multi-benefit card (credit format), offering flexibility for everyday needs. (CLT only) * Health Plan – Unimed No waiting period or copayment for the holder. Possibility to include dependents (children, spouse, or stepchildren) with copayment. (CLT only) * Dental Plan – Uniodonto Affordable options to include dependents. (CLT only) * Wellhub Access to gyms, physical activities, and wellness programs. Zenklub For CLT: Two free sessions per month and special rates for additional sessions. For Cooperative/Contractor: Special rates for sessions. Life Insurance More security for you and your family. (CLT only) * Childcare Allowance Financial support for Zallpers with children from 4 months to 6 years old, according to internal policy. (CLT only) * Baby Zallpy A special gift to celebrate the arrival of new Zallpy babies. Business Partner Support Close and human-centered support from our People & Culture team throughout your journey at Zallpy. Volunteer Internal Communities Diversity, Sports & Movement, and Technology. Educational Partnerships Discounts on undergraduate and graduate programs, professional courses, and language schools. Experiences & Development Participation in events, workshops, trips, and team-building activities. Referral Program Refer talents to Zallpy and receive bonuses from R$2,500 to R$5,000. * Contractor / PJ: For these hiring models, the benefits above apply except for those marked with an asterisk (*), which are exclusive to CLT. In addition, we offer dedicated platforms to manage contractors, ensuring organization, transparency, and a structured experience throughout the entire journey.

title: Senior technical consultant – front arena
description:
Confira a vaga para Senior technical consultant – front arena em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Why Zensar? We're a bunch of hardworking, fun-loving, people-oriented technology enthusiasts. We love what we do, and we're passionate about helping our clients thrive in an increasingly complex digital world. Zensar is an organization focused on building relationships with our clients and with each other—and happiness is at the core of everything we do. In fact, we're so into happiness that we've created a Global Happiness Council, and we send out a Happiness Survey to our employees each year. We've learned that employee happiness requires more than a competitive paycheck, and our employee value proposition—grow, own, achieve, learn (GOAL)—lays out the core opportunities we seek to foster for every employee. Teamwork and collaboration are critical to Zensar's mission and success, and our teams work on a diverse and challenging mix of technologies across a broad industry spectrum. These industries include banking and financial services, high-tech and manufacturing, healthcare, insurance, retail, and consumer services. Our employees enjoy flexible work arrangements and a competitive benefits package, including medical, dental, vision, 401(k), among other benefits. If you are looking for a place to have an immediate impact, to grow and contribute, where we work hard, play hard, and support each other, consider joining team Zensar! Zensar is looking for a Senior Technical Consultant – Front Arena. About the Role The Senior Technical Consultant will act as the technical SME for the Front Arena implementation, responsible for overall technical design, integrations, and enabling delivery teams during both scoping and execution phases. Key Responsibilities Lead technical design for the Front Arena or Murex (MX.3 B) or Calypso (Nasdaq) technical configuration (static data, environments) implementation Own technical architecture, integrations, and system configuration approach Support scoping activities, including defining technical complexity and risks Act as technical SME to guide and upskill junior and partner consultants Work closely with functional leads to ensure coherent front to back solutions Support on site workshops as required Required Skills & Experience Spanish nice to have Strong Front Arena technical expertise (configuration, architecture, integrations) or Murex (MX.3 B) or Calypso (Nasdaq) technical configuration (static data, environments) Experience with full front to back Front Arena implementations Prior involvement in large scale / greenfield implementations Ability to mentor and guide junior technical resources Experience working in multi vendor delivery models Spanish language skills strongly preferred Experience in Latin American / Mexican market environments is a strong advantage, Competent with Python Zensar believes that diversity of backgrounds, thought, experience, and expertise fosters the robust exchange of ideas that enables the highest quality collaboration and work product. Zensar is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions shall be made without regard to age, race, creed, color, religion, sex, national origin, ancestry, disability status, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, citizenship status or any other basis as protected by federal, state, or local law. Zensar is committed to providing veteran employment opportunities to our service men and women. Zensar is committed to providing equal employment opportunities for people with disabilities or religious observances, including reasonable accommodation when needed. Accommodation made to facilitate the recruiting process are not a guarantee of future or continued accommodation once hired. All applicants must be legally authorized to work with Zensar. Visa sponsorship may be available for qualified applicants for certain positions. Zensar values your privacy. We'll use your data in accordance with our privacy statement located at:

title: Sap basis upgrades sum and conversion specialist
description:
Confira a vaga para Sap basis upgrades sum and conversion specialist em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

We are seeking skilled SAP Basis Experts to execute complex SAP system upgrades and conversions, The ideal candidate will have deep technical expertise in SAP Basis, a strong understanding of SAP architecture, and hands-on experience with SAP system conversions, upgrades, copies and migrations. Key Responsibilities:7+ years of Basis Experience Plan and execute SAP system upgrades (Net Weaver, EHP, SPS, Kernel) across development, quality, and production environments. Lead SAP S/4 HANA system conversions from ECC, including pre-checks, simplification item analysis, and custom code remediation. Utilize tools such as SUM (Software Update Manager), Maintenance Planner, DMO (Database Migration Option), and SPAM/SAINT. Experience in Update, System copies and Client copies Perform OS/DB migrations, Unicode conversions, and HANA database upgrades. Conduct mock conversions, dry runs, and cutover planning for production migrations. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure compatibility and readiness for upgrades and conversions. Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues during and post-upgrade/conversion. Maintain comprehensive documentation of upgrade/conversion procedures and lessons learned. Stay current with SAP's roadmap, release strategy, and best practices for upgrades and conversions. ECS experience is added advantage

title: Independent m&a partner
description:
Empresa está contratando Independent m&a partner em rio branco. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

O mercado de M& A no Brasil é o mais ativo da América Latina — e funciona à base de relacionamento, confiança e conhecimento setorial. Você já construiu isso. A ONEto ONE oferece a plataforma global para monetizá-lo. ONEto ONE é uma rede global de mais de 120 assessores independentes de M& A em 55 países. Nossos membros são ex-banqueiros de investimento, sócios de boutiques e profissionais de PE e Corporate Finance que escolheram construir sua própria prática de assessoria — com o suporte de uma plataforma de banco de investimento global. O que você recebe 80% dos honorários em cada mandato. Equipe de analistas dedicada: pitches, CIMs, modelos financeiros, avaliações Mais de 350 mandatos ativos + ~6.000 oportunidades qualificadas por ano Dados premium: mais de 450 milhões de perfis de empresas e múltiplos em tempo real Alcance global: mais de 200 assessores em 55 países — conectando empresas brasileiras com compradores estratégicos na Europa, América do Norte e Ásia Seu perfil Ex-banqueiro de investimento (VP–MD), sócio de M& A ou especialista em Serviços de Transação ou profissional de PE com experiência no mercado brasileiro Histórico em M& A mid-market no Brasil ($5 M–$500 M EV) — qualquer setor Rede de relacionamentos entre empresas familiares, fundos de PE, corporações e family offices no Brasil Atualmente independente ou avaliando seriamente a transição O M& A no Brasil é, acima de tudo, um negócio de pessoas. Os membros ONEto ONE trazem a credibilidade pessoal de um assessor independente — com o respaldo institucional de um banco de investimento global. Candidate-se abaixo — nossa equipe responde em até 48 horas.

title: Ai consultant — short-term project (8 weeks) | bilingual (pt/en)
description:
Nova oportunidade para Ai consultant — short-term project (8 weeks) | bilingual (pt/en) em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Company Description Panacea Technology Group is a leading data and operations consulting firm with a global presence across Silicon Valley, Europe, and the MENA region. Drawing on years of industry experience across multiple disciplines, Panacea provides tailored solutions to help organizations achieve their strategic objectives. We specialize in leveraging data and innovative technologies to unlock value for our clients, fostering measurable success and growth. We're looking for an AI consultant to join Panacea on a client engagement focused on AI opportunity assessment and use case prioritization. What you'll be doing: • Supporting structured interviews and workshops with client stakeholders • Contributing to AI capability and gap assessments across business functions • Helping identify, document, and prioritize AI use cases aligned to business value • Assisting in the development of findings reports and executive presentations • Working directly with the Panacea delivery team throughout the engagement What we're looking for: • Solid understanding of AI concepts, use cases, and enterprise applications • Consulting experience: comfortable with client-facing work, structured thinking, and documentation • Fluent in both Portuguese and English • Available full time for the duration of the project • Proactive, organized, and able to work in a fast-moving boutique environment Nice to have: • Experience with AI assessments or digital transformation projects • Familiarity with frameworks like AI lifecycle, governance, or use case prioritization About this role: This is an 8-week engagement with the possibility of extension based on project needs and performance. Interested? Send your CV to ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Descrição da Empresa A Panacea Technology Group é uma empresa líder em consultoria de dados e operações, com presença global no Vale do Silício, Europa e região MENA. title: Web3 & al investment analyst
description:
Confira a vaga para Web3 & al investment analyst em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Web3 DXB is a Dubai-based investment and research platform focused on identifying and scaling high-potential opportunities at the intersection of blockchain, artificial intelligence, and next-generation digital infrastructure. We combine deep market insight with an agile, thesis-driven approach to back transformative technologies shaping the future of finance and the internet. As we expand our investment activities, we are looking for a highly analytical and forward-thinking Web3 & AI Investment Analyst to join our team. This is a fully remote position (Poland-based), offering direct exposure to early-stage deals, market research, and high-impact investment decisions across Web3 and AI. This role is ideal for someone who lives at the edge of innovation — tracking narratives, identifying asymmetric opportunities, and translating complex trends into actionable investment insights. What You'll Be Doing Conduct deep-dive research on Web3 and AI sectors, including protocols, startups, and emerging technologies. Analyze market trends, narratives, and macro developments across crypto and AI ecosystems. Evaluate investment opportunities, including token projects, early-stage startups, and infrastructure plays. Build investment theses and present insights to internal stakeholders. Monitor portfolio performance and track key metrics across projects. Collaborate with internal teams on strategy, deal flow, and market positioning. Stay ahead of industry developments, identifying early signals and high-potential opportunities. What We're Looking For2–4+ years of experience in investment analysis, research, venture capital, or crypto/AI markets. Strong understanding of blockchain, De Fi, tokenomics, and Web3 ecosystems. Solid knowledge or strong interest in artificial intelligence and its investment landscape. Exceptional analytical and research skills with the ability to synthesize complex information. Experience evaluating startups, token models, or market opportunities. Ability to think independently and form high-conviction investment views. Fluent English with strong written communication skills. High level of curiosity, ownership, and performance orientation. Why Join Web3 DXBCompetitive compensation: BRL 560,000 – 770,000 + performance-based bonuses. Remote-first: Fully remote (Poland-based) with flexible working hours. Direct investment exposure: Work on real deals and high-impact decisions. High-growth environment: Operate at the intersection of Web3 and AI — two of the fastest-growing sectors globally. Meritocratic culture: Your ideas and insights directly influence outcomes. Long-term upside: Be part of a team shaping the future of decentralized and intelligent systems. If you're passionate about Web3, AI, and investing, and want to operate where innovation meets capital, we'd love to connect.

title: Professor de inglês
description:
Confira a vaga para Professor de inglês em rio branco. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Faça parte da comunidade de professores que está transformando o ensino de idiomas no Brasil! Onde os influencers do Brasil fazem suas aulas particulares! A Idioma Independente, referência em inovação no ensino de idiomas, está buscando pessoas proativas, com perfil proativo e fluência em um segundo idioma, que querem ter sucesso no âmbito profissional, para se credenciar como professores e fazer parte da nossa comunidade engajada. Aqui, você não será apenas mais um perfil online: você será parte de uma rede colaborativa com mais de 400 professores e 4.000 alunos que vivenciam nossa metodologia transformadora hoje, além de mais de 1000 professores e 10.000 alunos que já fizeram parte desta história. Nos últimos 12 meses tivemos mais de 22 mil alunos interessados em fazer aulas conosco. Professores novos têm lotado suas agendas em até 30 dias, quando são comprometidos, se comunicam de forma eficaz e tem agenda no horário da noite disponível. *Esta não é uma vaga CLT* O que oferecemos? Capacitação intensiva para melhoria no ensino de aulas de acordo com a nossa metodologia inovadora Acesso exclusivo a uma plataforma com mais de 400 vídeos de treinamento, baseada em uma metodologia que já entregou resultados incríveis, com vídeos totalmente atualizados. Mentorias semanais com especialistas experientes, que já treinaram mais de 1500 profissionais. Plataforma exclusiva para acompanhamento das aulas. Participação no nosso processo de captação de alunos, com possibilidade de ganhos adicionais relevantes, bastando você se interessar. Descontos exclusivos em cursos de idiomas e viagens com a nossa comunidade. Possibilidade de desenvolvimento e mentoria para ser um empreendedor de sucesso (se você quiser). Um banco de aulas com mais de 800 aulas para facilitar o seu processo de construção de aulas. Certificações dos treinamentos feitos dentro da comunidade que garantem que você obterá mais resultados juntos aos seus alunos e que agregam na sua carreira como professor independente. Como saber se você é a pessoa certa para fazer parte da maior comunidade de professores independentes do Brasil? Se você tem grandes ambições para impactar a educação no Brasil, acredita que o ensino de idiomas precisa de inovação, quer otimizar sua agenda de aulas e, ainda, gostaria de crescer como empreendedor, este é o lugar certo para você. Necessário: Maior de 18 anos, fluente em Português e outro idioma. Disponibilidade de ao menos 20 horas semanais para treinamentos, aulas e ações práticas Esta é uma necessidade para obter os maiores retornos que a comunidade pode te proporcionar. Possibilidade de participar em capacitações durante a semana, no turno da manhã ou tarde. Independência para executar atividades, espírito de colaboração e vontade de contribuir para uma comunidade. O diferencial? Aqui você é mais que um professor. Você será parte de uma comunidade de professores no ensino de idiomas, onde o trabalho colaborativo é a base para alcançar resultados de mercado altamente competitivos. Esta não é uma vaga CLT, mas sim uma oportunidade de empreender e ser dono do seu crescimento com total suporte e estrutura de uma empresa inovadora. Você cria laços e relações de confiança com pessoas que realmente se esforçam para te ajudar no seu desenvolvimento, devido ao modelo de negócio inovador que proporciona relações colaborativas e efetivas. Se você tem vontade de fazer diferente e de vivenciar algo novo na sua história profissional, a ii com certeza é o seu lugar. Faça parte da mudança no ensino de idiomas. Junte-se à Idioma Independente e transforme sua carreira e a vida de milhares de alunos! O que eu faço? Recebo capacitação para dar a melhor aula experimental da sua vida Recebo capacitação em nossa metodologia, aprendendo como transformar a vida de muitos alunos, entregando resultado para eles/as Recebo treinamentos e capacitações recorrentes com mentores experientes e especializados Organizo e escolho a minha agenda e os horários que gostaria de ter alunos/as Preparo aulas para os meus alunos/as Dou as aulas para os meus alunos/as Se você quiser ir além, também será possível, basta você se engajar na comunidade e aprender mais sobre todas as áreas do seu negócio. QUANTO EU RECEBO POR ISSO? Se você for somente professor, se dedicando 40h na semana a aulas, você poderá receber até R$4.000,00 por mês. Se você quiser aprender sobre diferentes áreas e se engajar na comunidade, você pode construir uma renda mensal de até R$6.000,00 por mês em aproximadamente 1 ano. Se você realmente quiser crescer e se desenvolver, se dedicando de forma integral junto da comunidade é possível chegar até R$12.000,00 por mês em 2 anos. Tudo isso só dependerá de você, se quiser aprender mais sobre as partes comerciais e sobre como se tornar um mentor/a de professores. Seja diferente, seja independente

title: Ai agent development & delivery manager-brazil
description:
Confira a vaga para Ai agent development & delivery manager-brazil em rio branco. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

AI Agent Builder Job Core Responsibilities Agent Construction & Workflow Setup: Use low-code platforms (e.g., Coze, n8n, Dify) to build and debug Chatflows. You will be responsible for setting up the logic branches, slot filling, and task-oriented closed loops. Prompt Engineering & Tuning: Write and refine high-quality System Prompts to control AI behavior, persona, and task accuracy. Continuously optimize prompts based on real-world interaction data. System Integration & Debugging: Support the integration of AI Agents with client systems (CRM, Helpdesk, etc.) via APIs and Webhooks. Use basic coding (Python/JS) to handle data parsing and custom logic nodes. Local Scripting & Voice Strategy: Translate and adapt AI scripts to fit local linguistic nuances. Define voice strategies—including tone, speed, and emphasis, to ensure a natural, human-like voice experience. QA & Daily Operations: Monitor AI performance, identify \"Bad Cases,\" and perform troubleshooting. Conduct pre-launch testing (UAT) to ensure the agent meets quality standards before deployment. Global Collaboration: Communicate with international clients and cross-functional teams (R& D, Sales) to deconstruct requirements and deliver localized solutions. AI Agent Builder Core Qualifications Language: Fluent in English (Spoken & Written). You can confidently lead technical meetings and write high-quality, professional prompts/documentation. Logical Thinking: Strong ability to deconstruct complex business needs into clear, step-by-step logic flows. Technical Foundation: Basic Python/JS skills (must know how to parse JSON and handle API/Webhook data). Conceptual understanding of LLMs and a strong intuition for Prompt Engineering. Fast Learner: Ability to quickly master new Agent Builder/Workflow tools (e.g., Coze, n8n) and thrive in a fast-paced environment.

title: Designer (pleno/sênior) - banco de talentos
description:
Confira a vaga para Designer (pleno/sênior) - banco de talentos em rio branco. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Quem somos: A Studio Rx é uma empresa de produção global digital, criada para as necessidades exclusivas das marcas de saúde. Como Hub de produção da IPG Health, o Studio RX apoia a rede global de agências do grupo, tendo como pilares principais a qualidade e eficiência. O seu papel: Como Designer Pleno, você será responsável pela execução técnica de diversas peças de marketing para múltiplos canais (Digital e Impresso). Também deverá trabalhar de forma colaborativa e proativa com os diretores de arte e designers em um ambiente de trabalho multifacetado, com ritmo acelerado e orientado a prazos. Suas responsabilidades: Criação, desdobramento e ajustes de materiais digitais e impressos com base em conceitos aprovados (. PSDs em camadas,. INDD, arquivos PDF interativos e preparação de arquivos digitais de acordo com as especificações do desenvolvedor). Realizar redimensionamentos e adaptações de peças digitais e impressas. Redesenhar materiais com base em Guias de Marca e estilo. Criar arquivos finais e documentos que estejam prontos para impressão. Executar as demandas de acordo com o direcionamento de prioridades e garantir que a execução é feita no tempo necessário com a maior assertividade possível, diminuindo rodadas de ajustes. Participar de treinamentos para entender processos e metodologias de trabalho. Requisitos necessários: Bacharelado em Design Gráfico, Desenho Industrial ou áreas correlatas. + de 2 anos atuando na área de Design. Conhecimento completo de Adobe in Design, Ilustrador e Photoshop. Experiência com XD, Type Design, Sketch e Figma. Conhecimento em aplicações emergentes será um diferencial. Ter trabalhado em agências de Publicidade ou produtoras gráficas. Inglês Avançado (leitura, interpretação de texto, escrita e conversação) --- Consideramos todas as aplicações para nossas vagas sem distinção de gênero, orientação sexual, etnia, cultura, origem, religião, deficiência, idade etc. Acreditamos na construção de um mundo mais diverso, com mais representatividade e livre de preconceitos. Aqui você encontra um ambiente diverso, colaborativo e inclusivo que promove o desenvolvimento por meio das conexões humanas! Está preparado(a) para cultivar novas experiências em um time que joga junto e valoriza o melhor de cada um(a)? #VEMSERSTUDIORX

title: Rubber engineers, tyre industries
description:
Confira a vaga para Rubber engineers, tyre industries em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Company DescriptionSUNSET TIRES CORPORATION LIMITED, established on July 18th, 1988, has a rich legacy in the import, export, and distribution of tires, tubes, wheels, and lubricants. Known for its commitment to quality and service, the company is a trusted leader in the tire industry. SUNSET TIRES has built a strong reputation by delivering premium products to clients worldwide, emphasizing reliability and innovation. Role DescriptionThis is a contract, remote role for Rubber Engineers specializing in the tire industry. Key responsibilities include designing, developing, and testing tire rubber formulations, ensuring quality and performance standards, analyzing raw materials, and modifying processes to meet client requirements. The role also involves collaborating with cross-functional teams to optimize product performance and manufacturing efficiency. Qualifications Expertise in Rubber Engineering, Polymer Science, and Material Development Strong knowledge of tire rubber formulations and testing methodologies Experience in technical analysis and process optimization Proficiency in industry-standard software and equipment for rubber testing and development Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work both independently and collaboratively Excellent written and verbal communication skills for reporting and cross-functional collaboration Bachelor's or higher degree in Polymer Engineering, Material Science, Chemical Engineering, or a related field Experience in the tire or rubber industry is highly preferred

title: Vexos platform manager (remote)
description:
Confira a vaga para Vexos platform manager (remote) em rio branco. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

We're Hiring | VEXOS Platform Manager Remote · Full-Time | Based in Brazil The Render Pros is the presales creative engine behind some of the most ambitious real estate developments in the world. We build photorealistic visualizations, immersive digital experiences, and VEXOS — our proprietary presales platform that transforms how developers market and sell high-value assets before they're built. We're growing and we need a sharp, reliable operator to help us run VEXOS smoothly. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ About The Render Pros / VEXOS We are a vertically integrated presales studio. Our clients are real estate developers, luxury asset companies, and investment groups working on projects across the Western hemisphere. VEXOS is our platform product — a fully branded, data-driven presales environment that combines 3 D visualization, buyer engagement tools, and lead intelligence. We define the strategy. You help us execute it. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ The Role The VEXOS Platform Manager supports the delivery and day-to-day management of VEXOS client deployments. You will work closely with our Visualization PMs, development team, and founder to keep projects on track and clients well-supported. You are organized, communicative, and detail-oriented. You follow process, flag issues early, and represent the platform professionally to clients. You execute the vision — you don't set it. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ What You'll Be Responsible For • Coordinating VEXOS project timelines alongside the Visualization PM • Scheduling and running client onboarding and training calls using provided materials • Managing client communication after delivery — answering questions, logging change requests, and escalating issues to the right internal person • Keeping project trackers, onboarding checklists, and documentation up to date • Following established delivery SOPs and flagging when something is off-track • Supporting the creation of training materials, guides, and client-facing documentation as directed • Being the day-to-day client contact for active VEXOS accounts ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ What We're Looking For Experience • 2–4 years in a client-facing coordination, account support, or digital project management role • Experience working with Saa S platforms, creative tech, or digital products is a plus • Background in real estate or luxury industries is a bonus, not a requirement Skills • Exceptional written and spoken English — you will be communicating with US-based executive clients daily • Comfortable learning and navigating new software platforms quickly • Able to explain digital tools clearly to non-technical users • Highly organized with strong attention to detail • Responsive, professional, and calm under pressure • Comfortable in a fast-paced environment where priorities can shift Mindset • You follow through. Every time. • You communicate proactively — you don't go quiet when things get complicated • You take pride in representing a premium brand to premium clients • You're here to execute at a high level and grow with the company ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Tools You'll Work With VEXOS platform (proprietary) · Notion or Asana · Zoom · Google Workspace · Loom ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ What We Offer • Competitive salary in USD • 100% remote — work from Brazil or Mexico • Direct day-to-day collaboration with the founder • A stable, long-term role in a growing company • Opportunity to grow into greater responsibility as VEXOS scales ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ How to Apply Send your CV and a short Loom video (2–3 minutes) covering: 1. Who you are and what you've managed 2. Why this role interests you 3. One example of how you handled a difficult client situation Applications without the Loom video will not be reviewed. Apply via DM or email: #hiring #remotejobs #vexos #therenderpos #proptech #projectmanager #clientsuccess #remotework #Brazil #Mexico #latinamerica

title: Java software engineer
description:
Empresa está contratando Java software engineer em rio branco. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Company Description Theta Data is a pioneering data company specializing in low-latency APIs for delivering high-speed options and stocks data. Our mission is to empower users with real-time, actionable information to make well-informed decisions in dynamic financial markets. With a focus on speed and broad data coverage, Theta Data stands at the forefront of the options data industry by providing essential tools and insights. We are dedicated to equipping professionals with the resources needed to excel in a competitive landscape. We're a small, nimble team growing quickly. Our platform handles billions of database requests daily, and we're just getting started. The complexity of our data problems is real: tick-level options data is among the most intricate financial data to store, index, and serve at scale. We take engineering seriously. Role Description We're hiring backend-focused Software Engineers to help build and scale the services that power Theta Data. This is a hands-on coding role. You'll be writing production code from day one. We are looking for self-starting engineers who think deeply about system scale, creatively solve problems, and can move forward in high ambiguity. You'll join a lean engineering team where your work has a direct, visible impact on the platform and the customers who use it. We have new services to architect, bottlenecks to eliminate, and workflows to redesign from scratch. Additionally, you'll support live systems, investigate and resolve bugs, and help keep a platform that customers depend on running smoothly. What you will work on Design, build, and scale backend services handling billions of requests daily Architect new systems and contribute to technical direction Improve and automate customer onboarding workflows Identify and resolve performance bottlenecks across the stack Collaborate directly with the team and senior technical leadership Our Technical Stack Java - core backend services, business logic, API, thick client Python - scripting, tooling Apache Tomcat - servlet container Java Servlets - HTTP request handling Postgre SQL + Hibernate g RPC AI coding tools (Claude, Gemini, Copilot) - we use them, you should too What we are looking for We hire for fundamentals, ownership, and a love of building. Depending on your experience level, here's what we care about: Required Deep proficiency in Java with a strong command of the language and ecosystem Proven experience optimizing application performance through JVM heap tuning, garbage collection analysis, and memory allocation strategies Strong computer science fundamentals, including data structures, algorithms, and systems-level thinking Demonstrated experience designing, building, and maintaining REST APIs and backend services Working knowledge of HTTP, authentication protocols, and modern web architecture Nice to Have Experience working in data-intensive, low-latency environments where performance matters Hands-on experience with Postgre SQL, including schema design and query optimization Python development experience for tooling, scripting, or service work Familiarity with Apache Tomcat in production or staging environments Frontend exposure with Type Script and a modern UI library or framework (Vue, React, or similar) Experience designing or maintaining CI/CD pipelines for automated build, test, and deployment Why Theta Data Rapid growth: the platform and team are both scaling fast Real engineering challenges: data at scale, low-latency systems, complex financial data High ownership: a small team means your decisions matter and ship quickly Greenfield opportunities: new systems to design, not just legacy to maintain Remote-first: work from anywhere Direct impact: your work reaches thousands of quants and researchers daily

title: Sr. compliance onboarding specialist
description:
Confira a vaga para Sr. compliance onboarding specialist em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

About the Role We are looking for a highly motivated and detail-oriented Senior Compliance Onboarding Specialist to join our growing team at Velafi. In this role, you will be instrumental in managing and enhancing the onboarding and KYC (Know Your Customer) processes for our clients across multiple jurisdictions, with a strong focus on Brazil and Latin America. You will collaborate closely with Sales, Operations, and Compliance teams to design efficient, scalable onboarding frameworks that deliver a seamless customer experience while maintaining strict adherence to regulatory requirements. This position is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced fintech environment and is passionate about balancing compliance excellence with business enablement. Key Responsibilities Contribute to the development, implementation, and continuous improvement of onboarding controls, policies, and procedures to ensure efficiency, scalability, and regulatory compliance. Act as the subject matter expert for onboarding clients operating in Brazil, ensuring alignment with Brazilian local AML/CTF regulations and industry best practices. Perform detailed reviews and analysis of B2 B customer documentation, including Customer Risk Assessments and Customer Due Diligence to support informed onboarding decisions. Partner with Sales, Operations, and other internal stakeholders to provide clear guidance on compliance requirements, enabling smooth client onboarding and expansion into new markets. Advise internal teams on AML risks and regulatory considerations when entering new industries or geographic regions. Conduct background checks, adverse media screenings, and ongoing monitoring of clients and prospects to identify and mitigate potential risks. Support the Compliance function in applying regulatory frameworks across LATAM jurisdictions, ensuring compliant operations in Brazil matters. What We're Looking For Bachelor's degree in Law, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field, with a strong foundation in Compliance. 3+ years of hands-on experience in Compliance, preferably within fintech, digital banking, payments, or financial services environments. Strong knowledge of KYC, AML, CDD, and CRA frameworks Solid understanding of Brazilian AML/CTF regulations Familiarity with international regulatory standards, including BSA, USA PATRIOT Act, and OFAC Ability to evaluate complex customer structures, identify risks, and make sound compliance decisions. Excellent interpersonal skills with the ability to work cross-functionally and communicate complex regulatory concepts clearly. Fluent in Spanish (English is a strong plus). Proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable operating in a dynamic, fast-growing environment with evolving regulatory landscapes.

title: Senior technical consultant – front arena
description:
Empresa está contratando Senior technical consultant – front arena em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Why Zensar? We're a bunch of hardworking, fun-loving, people-oriented technology enthusiasts. We love what we do, and we're passionate about helping our clients thrive in an increasingly complex digital world. Zensar is an organization focused on building relationships with our clients and with each other—and happiness is at the core of everything we do. In fact, we're so into happiness that we've created a Global Happiness Council, and we send out a Happiness Survey to our employees each year. We've learned that employee happiness requires more than a competitive paycheck, and our employee value proposition—grow, own, achieve, learn (GOAL)—lays out the core opportunities we seek to foster for every employee. Teamwork and collaboration are critical to Zensar's mission and success, and our teams work on a diverse and challenging mix of technologies across a broad industry spectrum. These industries include banking and financial services, high-tech and manufacturing, healthcare, insurance, retail, and consumer services. Our employees enjoy flexible work arrangements and a competitive benefits package, including medical, dental, vision, 401(k), among other benefits. If you are looking for a place to have an immediate impact, to grow and contribute, where we work hard, play hard, and support each other, consider joining team Zensar! Zensar is looking for a Senior Technical Consultant – Front Arena. About the Role The Senior Technical Consultant will act as the technical SME for the Front Arena implementation, responsible for overall technical design, integrations, and enabling delivery teams during both scoping and execution phases. Key Responsibilities Lead technical design for the Front Arena or Murex (MX.3 B) or Calypso (Nasdaq) technical configuration (static data, environments) implementation Own technical architecture, integrations, and system configuration approach Support scoping activities, including defining technical complexity and risks Act as technical SME to guide and upskill junior and partner consultants Work closely with functional leads to ensure coherent front to back solutions Support on site workshops as required Required Skills & Experience Spanish nice to have Strong Front Arena technical expertise (configuration, architecture, integrations) or Murex (MX.3 B) or Calypso (Nasdaq) technical configuration (static data, environments) Experience with full front to back Front Arena implementations Prior involvement in large scale / greenfield implementations Ability to mentor and guide junior technical resources Experience working in multi vendor delivery models Spanish language skills strongly preferred Experience in Latin American / Mexican market environments is a strong advantage, Competent with Python Zensar believes that diversity of backgrounds, thought, experience, and expertise fosters the robust exchange of ideas that enables the highest quality collaboration and work product. Zensar is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions shall be made without regard to age, race, creed, color, religion, sex, national origin, ancestry, disability status, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, citizenship status or any other basis as protected by federal, state, or local law. Zensar is committed to providing veteran employment opportunities to our service men and women. Zensar is committed to providing equal employment opportunities for people with disabilities or religious observances, including reasonable accommodation when needed. Accommodation made to facilitate the recruiting process are not a guarantee of future or continued accommodation once hired. All applicants must be legally authorized to work with Zensar. Visa sponsorship may be available for qualified applicants for certain positions. Zensar values your privacy. We'll use your data in accordance with our privacy statement located at:

title: Engenheiro de informática
description:
Nova oportunidade para Engenheiro de informática em boa vista. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Cargo: Engenheiro de Informática Visão geral: Estamos procurando um engenheiro LIMS qualificado com sólida experiência em desenvolvimento de software de informática laboratorial em ambientes regulamentados, particularmente nos setores de ciências da vida, alimentos e petróleo e gás. Responsabilidades: · Desenvolvimento de LIMS: Traduzir os requisitos de negócios em projetos abrangentes para implementações de LIMS. · Personalização do LIMS: Desenvolver e configurar código personalizado utilizando linguagens como Java, Python e LIMS Basic. · Criação de interface: Fazer uso de APIs para construir interfaces REST/SOAP para integrações de sistemas. · Relatórios: Projetar e gerar relatórios Jasper (ou Crystal) para análises e visualização de dados. · Conectividade com instrumento: Garantir o fluxo de dados contínuo entre o LIMS e a instrumentação científica. · Conformidade Gx P: Apoiar iniciativas técnicas de LIMS em alinhamento com os padrões Gx P. · Colaboração: Trabalhar de perto com os usuários de negócios do cliente, principais partes interessadas e fornecedores para impulsionar o sucesso do projeto. · Documentação e Treinamento: Criar e manter documentação técnica e materiais de treinamento para usuários do LIMS. Qualificações: · Bacharel em Ciência da Computação, Sistemas de Informação, Biotecnologia ou áreas afins em ciência ou engenharia. · Mínimo de 1 ano de experiência em uma função de desenvolvimento LIMS. · Experiência prévia com configuração de plataformas LIMS como Lab Ware, Lab Vantage, Sample Manager, etc.

title: Senior salesforce developer
description:
Confira a vaga para Senior salesforce developer em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Experience: 7+ years of hands-on experience in the Salesforce ecosystem, with a proven track record of delivering complex technical projects. 2years of experience with Salesforce CPQ (Steel Brick) Development Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Apex, LWC, Java Script, and SOQL/SOSL. title: Arte finalista (pleno/sênior)- banco de talentos
description:

Quem somos: A Studio Rx é uma empresa de produção global digital, criada para as necessidades exclusivas das marcas de saúde. Como Hub de produção da IPG Health, o Studio RX apoia a rede global de agências do grupo, tendo como pilares principais a qualidade e eficiência. O que buscamos: Estamos em busca de um arte-finalista capaz de trabalhar com rapidez, eficiência e mantendo grande atenção aos detalhes. O profissional deve ser altamente organizado e conseguir trabalhar em mais de um projeto ao mesmo tempo. Entre as atividades, a principal será fazer ajustes e alterações de cor, formato, texto, imagens e preparação dos arquivos para impressão (com sangria, marcas de corte e ficha técnica). O candidato precisa ter um conhecimento avançado no Adobe In Design já que 95% do trabalho será feito nele, e o nível de inglês para escrita e interpretação de texto também precisa ser avançado. A atividade diária principal será receber artes prontas das agências dos EUA para executar ajustes (no In Design) conforme comentários (em inglês) feitos no PDF. Além disso, será necessário também montar facas especiais e fazer o envio dos arquivos para a gráfica. Num primeiro momento o profissional estará sob supervisão para garantir o entendimento e fluxo de funcionamento do estúdio, mas com o passar do tempo a idéia é ganhar autonomia para realizar as tarefas mais cotidianas e recorrentes sem muita supervisão. Pré-Requisitos: Experiência comprovada no segmento impresso e em todos os detalhes que o meio exige (marcas de corte, sangría, margens de segurança, dobras, vinco, cores CMYK, facas especiais, e fichas técnicas); Graduação em Design Gráfico, Desenho Industrial ou áreas correlatas. Experiência de pelo menos 5+ anos na função como designer gráfico no ramo impresso. Domínio dos software In Design e illustrator; Inglês avançado (com comprovação via teste ao vivo na segunda etapa do processo); Disponibilidade para trabalhar das 10h as 19h ou das 13h as 22h. Será um diferencial se você tiver: Ter atuado ativamente com fechamento de arquivos, arte-final e preparação de arquivos para impressão. Conhecimento em softwares de gestão de tarefas como Monday ou Trello (aqui utilizamos Work Front); Está preparado(a) para cultivar novas experiências em um time que joga junto e valoriza o melhor de cada um(a)? #VEMSERSTUDIORX -- Consideramos todas as aplicações para nossas vagas sem distinção de gênero, orientação sexual, etnia, cultura, origem, religião, deficiência, idade etc. Acreditamos na construção de um mundo mais diverso, com mais representatividade e livre de preconceitos. Aqui você encontra um ambiente diverso, colaborativo e inclusivo que promove o desenvolvimento por meio das conexões humanas!

Procuramos um profissional com domínio de Design da Informação e Visualização de Dados, olhar apurado para hierarquia visual, acessibilidade e storytelling, habilidade para resolver problemas de design com agilidade e interesse constante por novas tendências e ferramentas inovadoras. Inglês fluente é mandatório pois trabalhamos em projetos internacionais com times globais. Responsabilidades: Desenvolver apresentações estratégicas, dinâmicas e visualmente sofisticadas, garantindo consistência com as diretrizes de marca, excelência estética e adaptação para diferentes formatos e dispositivos (desktop, tablet e mobile); Atuar em reuniões de briefing e colaborar diretamente com stakeholders para transformar informações complexas em storytelling claros, objetivos e visualmente impactantes; Trabalhar com materiais médicos e científicos, assegurando alto nível de precisão, atenção a detalhes e tratamento adequado de dados, além de transformar conteúdos técnicos e densos em apresentações visualmente atraentes, organizadas e de fácil compreensão; Gerenciar o processo de desenvolvimento de apresentações do início ao fim, incluindo alinhamento com stakeholders, construção da narrativa, criação de layouts, incorporação de feedbacks e cumprimento de prazos; Ser responsável pela revisão final e controle de qualidade das apresentações antes do compartilhamento, assegurando clareza, consistência visual e precisão das informações; Trabalhar de forma independente ou colaborativa com outros designers, gerenciando múltiplos projetos simultaneamente e mantendo alta performance em ambientes de ritmo acelerado. Requerimentos & Skills: Experiência mínima de 4 anos em Design de Apresentações, com formação superior (bacharelado) em Design, Artes Visuais ou áreas correlatas; Domínio avançado de ferramentas de apresentação, incluindo Power Point, Google Slides, Keynote e Prezi, além de proficiência em ferramentas essenciais do dia a dia, como Word e Excel, para organização, edição e estruturação de conteúdos e dados Possuir conhecimento sólido em Design da Informação e Visualização de Dados, sendo capaz de transformar dados complexos em gráficos, dashboards, mapas e infográficos claros, estratégicos e visualmente atraentes. title: Full stack engineer
description:
Confira a vaga para Full stack engineer em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Senior Full-Stack Engineer (. NET / Angular / Azure) | Remote (Brazil) | $R20,000 per month We're working exclusively with a fast-scaling, internationally established B2 B Saa S business to find a Senior Full-Stack Engineer who wants to do more than just ship code; someone who wants to help shape a platform. The Platform This isn't a greenfield start-up with no traction, nor a legacy enterprise stuck in technical debt. It's something rarer: a mature, mission-critical Saa S platform mid-way through a significant cloud-native rebuild, with real customers, real revenue, and a serious engineering team that knows what it's doing. The platform powers high-value, high-volume transactional operations globally; think live, real-time environments where reliability isn't a nice-to-have, it's the product. £50m+ transacted in 2026 alone. Clients operate across multiple sectors and international markets. The Role You'll work closely with the Lead Software Engineer and product leadership to extend and evolve the next-generation platform across: Full-stack development;. NET 10 / ASP. NET Core on the backend, Angular / Type Script on the front Real-time application development using Signal R Cloud-native architecture on Azure (AKS, Service Bus, Container Apps, Key Vault, Monitor) CI/CD pipelines, Docker, Kubernetes, and modern Dev Ops practices Multi-tenant white-label Saa S architecture Engineering standards, mentoring, and long-term technical direction This is a hands-on senior role with genuine influence, not a ticket-taker. You'll be contributing to architecture decisions, not just implementing them. What We're Looking For 5+ years of commercial software engineering experience Strong. NET / ASP. NET Core and Angular / Type Script skills Experience building scalable APIs and distributed backend systems Cloud-native development on Azure Docker and containerised deployment; solid Kubernetes understanding Postgre SQL or equivalent relational database experience Someone who cares about operational reliability, clean code, and product outcomes, not just velocity Bonus points for experience with real-time / event-driven systems, multi-tenant Saa S, high-availability environments, or AI-assisted workflows. Why This Role Fully remote, flexible working culture built on trust Small, experienced, highly collaborative team, you'll work closely with founders and leadership High ownership, high influence, your decisions will shape the platform A genuinely interesting problem domain with technical complexity that rewards good engineering Up to $R20k-$R23k pcm + 28 days holiday (inclusive of UK bank holidays) If you're a senior engineer who wants to do the best work of your career on a platform that genuinely matters to its customers, we'd like to speak with you.

title: Information technology manager
description:
Confira a vaga para Information technology manager em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Role Overview Syntage is seeking an IT & Automation Manager to serve as the technical owner of our internal systems, IT infrastructure, and process automations. This role bridges the gap between business operations and technology. You will act as an internal consultant outlining high-level technical strategies, while also personally executing the hands-on development—including software integrations, AI adoption, and workflow automations. Additionally, you will manage the company's foundational cybersecurity posture and day-to-day IT administration. Key Responsibilities Business Process Engineering (Core Expectation) Conduct needs assessments with department leads to identify operational bottlenecks and manual processes. Translate non-technical business requirements into actionable architectural designs and technical scopes. Act as an internal consultant, proposing ROI-driven technology implementations. Manage change adoption by providing training, documentation, and ongoing support for newly implemented tools. Automation, Integration & AI Implementation Design, build, and maintain system integrations across our Saa S ecosystem utilizing REST APIs, webhooks, and middleware platforms (e.g., Zapier, Make, n8n) or custom scripts (Python, Java Script). Evaluate, test, and deploy AI tools to automate routine operational tasks. Administer databases and ensure data integrity as information flows between the CRM, ERP, and operational software. IT Administration & Security Administer core software platforms and directories, including (Google Workspace / Microsoft 365). Manage the employee technology lifecycle, including hardware provisioning and onboarding/offboarding technical access. Enforce cybersecurity best practices, managing Identity and Access Management (IAM), SSO, MFA, and endpoint security. Manage IT vendor relationships, negotiate Saa S contracts, and monitor software spend to systematically prevent tool sprawl. Required Qualifications & Skills Technical Experience: 5+ years of hybrid experience spanning IT Administration, Systems Architecture, Technical Operations, Business Process Engineering, or Software Integration. Demonstrated experience managing technology projects end-to-end within an SMB or startup environment. Strong understanding of cloud-based Saa S ecosystems, APIs, and relational data structures. High proficiency in building complex workflows using middleware (e.g., n8n, Make, Zapier) or lightweight scripting. Practical knowledge of applying AI tools to everyday business workflows. Foundational understanding of cybersecurity risk management, network security, and data privacy protocols. Soft Skills & Behavioral Competencies: Communication: Proven ability to effectively translate business needs into technical scopes, and explain complex technical concepts and security requirements to non-technical stakeholders with patience and clarity. Critical Thinking: Strong analytical approach to problem-solving; ability to identify the root causes of operational friction rather than just treating symptoms. Decision-Making: Highly autonomous execution; capable of evaluating vendor tools, technical trade-offs, and ROI to make definitive architectural and software purchasing decisions. Benefits & Compensation Compensation details will be discussed during the interview process.

title: Senior software engineer
description:
Nova oportunidade para Senior software engineer em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Context We are a fast-growing startup that has experienced tremendous growth over the past few months, achieving 5x revenue growth in the last 12 months and a 10x increase in usage over the same period. As we continue on this upward trajectory, we are expanding our team to support our rapidly scaling infrastructure and ensure we can meet the demands of our ever-growing user base. Mission As a Full-Stack Engineer, you will design, build, and optimize scalable applications. You will own features end-to-end and work closely with stakeholders to take ideas from concept to release, maintain & scale. This role demands a hands-on approach, strong motivation, and a drive to seek the best solutions while maintaining high-quality standards. Key Responsibilities Own Features from 0 to 1: Take complete ownership of features, collaborating with your teammates and stakeholders to define requirements, design solutions, and deliver them to production. Ensure every detail is addressed through to the finish line. Scalable Infrastructure: Collaborate with infrastructure teams to design systems that efficiently handle increasing traffic and usage. Build and Scale Applications: Develop and maintain scalable, high-quality features and applications. Ensure Code Quality by Promoting the adoption of Test-Driven Development (TDD) and maintaining high standards for reliability and maintainability. Integrations Between Frontend and Backend: Design and build systems that simplify and enhance integrations between front-end and back-end applications, enabling seamless communication and efficient data exchange. Support Collaboration: Partner with the support team to diagnose and resolve complex issues, improving tools and processes to enhance the customer experience. Observability and Monitoring: Strengthen our observability by integrating and improving tools that provide insights into application health and performance. Whom Are We looking For We seek a Senior Software Engineer who thrives in high-growth environments and combines technical expertise with relentless motivation. You'll take pride in building scalable systems, owning features end-to-end, and delivering user value. Key Qualifications Node.js, Type Script & React Expertise: Extensive experience with Node JS, TS, & React, leveraging modern development patterns and best practices. Event-Driven Architecture: Proven experience building event-driven systems using tools like message brokers or similar technologies. TDD Focus: Commitment to Test-Driven Development (TDD) and a strong track record of delivering high-quality code. Scalable Applications: Experience designing and maintaining systems that perform under heavy traffic and scale with user demand. Monitoring Tools: Proficiency with observability tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, ELK) for monitoring and maintaining system health. Ownership Mindset: Demonstrated ability to take ownership of features, from initial design through production release. Ultra-motivated and Hands-On: Eager to dive into the code and solve challenging problems with enthusiasm and focus. Seek the Best Solutions: Continuously evaluate and implement the best tools, technologies, and methodologies to solve problems effectively and innovate within the team. Thrives in Chaos: Ability to embrace and adapt to the fast-paced, dynamic environment of a high-scaling startup, maintaining focus and effectiveness amidst ambiguity. Bonus Qualifications Media Processing: Experience with video and audio processing, streaming technologies, or related workloads. AI Integration: Worked with artificial intelligence systems or tools, either integrating AI features into applications or ensuring smooth collaboration with AI-based solutions. Start-Up Experience: Prior experience working at a fast-growing, large-scale startup is a strong plus. Diverse Technical Knowledge: A valuable asset is familiarity with additional programming languages, design patterns, or architectural paradigms.

title: Talent acquisition specialist
description:
Confira a vaga para Talent acquisition specialist em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Talent Acquisition Specialist About Us: We are a dynamic global specialist in talent research, intelligence, and pipelining. Since its founding in 2011, it's grown to serve internal talent acquisition teams—including more than 70 Fortune 500 companies —through offices spanning the UK, US, India, Singapore, Dubai, Hong Kong, and beyond. We blend data-driven insight and proactive sourcing to streamline recruitment, delivering seamless access to ready now candidates and curated pipelines for future roles. Its recent acquisition of Armstrong Craven further strengthens our global reach and research capabilities, offering clients unmatched flexibility and depth in talent solutions The Role: We have partnered with a global FMCG powerhouse which has a reputation for innovation and development. As part of this contract we are looking for a passionate Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist. If you're excited by new challenges, solving complex problems, and learning every step of the way, you might be the perfect fit. In this role, you'll have the opportunity to drive impactful projects and collaborate with bright minds. What You'll Do: Manage autonomously the different talent acquisition solutions to source, engage, attract, and secure the right talent for the organization within a highly scientific environment Partner with hiring managers to understand hiring needs, execute effective sourcing, engagement, screening, and behavioural-based interviews that deliver a diverse range of candidates and provide an outstanding candidate experience Possess strong ability to screen, assess, interview, and build relationships within different talent communities in a timely and professional manner Build and maintain market intelligence and a network of talent and potential candidates through previous experience, pro-active research, and ongoing relationships; conduct in-depth interviews of potential candidates, demonstrating ability to anticipate manager requirements through high interview-to-offer ratios Display confidence to work with metrics and reporting to establish recruitment updates and insight to ensure hiring is effective and can clearly demonstrate successes versus areas of focus Generate and recommend ideas and strategies related to recruitment that will contribute to the enhancement of hiring processes, implementing changes and new procedures, and fine-tuning standard recruiting processes that fit within the client's mission Contribute to or lead projects designed to implement change initiatives and enhance delivery Articulate in writing a plan with deliverables, timelines, formal tracking, and reporting results Promote continuous improvement of talent acquisition methods and processes What we are looking for: Passion for talent acquisition with an extensive track record of recruiting hard to fill roles Expert understanding of talent networks and recruitment landscapes in Brazil and South America Ability to execute sourcing activities, including but not limited to employer brand promotion, talent engagement and attraction, supporting events and meet-ups, and quality candidate pipeline generation with a significant proportion of direct and passive sourcing Who You Are: Someone who is not satisfied with "just good enough" and is always looking to improve, adapt, and innovate A natural collaborator who loves sharing ideas and learning from others Excellent communicator, both verbally and in writing, able to share complex ideas in a simple, relatable way Fluent in English and Portuguese Are You Still Curious? If you've read this far, then chances are you've got a curious mind—just like us. So, what are you waiting for? Take the leap and apply today. We can't wait to see where your curiosity leads you—and how it will shape the future of the client.

description:
Confira a vaga para Fund operations analyst em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

The RoleWe're looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Fund Operations Analyst with 1 to 3 years of experience to join our team in São Paulo. This is a critical role in our firm's infrastructure, demanding both technical rigor and strong operational ownership.You will be a key member of our back-office team, working directly with the CFO and senior partners to ensure the efficiency, compliance, and scalability of our fund's operations. You will own the \"engine room\" of an international investment fund — managing offshore structures, investor relations, financial controls, and regulatory compliance across multiple jurisdictions.This role offers significant exposure to the full lifecycle of a growth-stage VC fund and direct interaction with world-class financial service providers.Key Responsibilities· Financial Management & Treasury — Own day-to-day treasury operations for both local (CNPJs) and offshore entities, including accounts payable/receivable, cash flow management, FX operations, and bank reconciliations.· Fund Administration Management — Manage the relationship with external stakeholders of the fund's US entities, including Fund Administrators, legal counsel, tax advisors, and external auditors (Big 4).· Investor Relations (IR) Operations — Execute Capital Calls, Distributions, and NAV calculations. Lead LP onboarding (KYC/AML) and serve as the primary point of contact for investor inquiries and reporting.· Financial Reporting & Close — Lead monthly and quarterly close in coordination with external accountants. Review the fund's financial statements for accuracy and compliance (US GAAP / IFRS).· Legal & Governance — Review fund documents (agreements, side letters, subscription docs) and maintain the Data Room to ensure audit readiness at all times.· Fundraising Operations Support — Support capital raising processes, including Data Room management, LP due diligence coordination, and subscription document processing.· Process Improvement — Continuously identify opportunities to improve operational efficiency and implement scalable processes and tools across the fund's back-office.Requirements· 1–3 years of experience in Fund Operations, Fund Administration, Audit (Big 4 or similar), or Corporate Finance / Treasury at a financial institution, investment fund, or large corporation.· Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Business Administration, Economics, or a related field.· Exceptional organizational skills and precision in financial data management.· Advanced proficiency in Excel.· Ability to interpret financial statements, understand fund accounting principles, and flag risks proactively.· Ownership mentality — ability to manage multiple workflows autonomously and communicate effectively with senior stakeholders.

title: Unreal engine multiplayer gameplay programmer (c++ expert)
description:
Confira a vaga para Unreal engine multiplayer gameplay programmer (c++ expert) em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

We are looking for experienced Unreal Engine 5 developers with strong C++ skills to join our team and help build smooth, scalable multiplayer experiences. What you will do: Design and implement the game's network architecture, working closely with our team of developers. You will handle client/server models, data replication, bandwidth optimization, and ensure the game runs seamlessly with 60+ players per server. You will also profile, debug, and optimize network performance to keep everything running smoothly. What we need from you: 5+ years of Unreal Engine experience 5+ years of solid C++ programming Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive, hands-on approach Motivation to grow with an energetic and fast-moving team Good to have: GAS Python (backend) AWS (Game Lift) If this sounds like you, please send your application and salary expectations to:

title: Fiscal de cozinha
description:
