title: Senior outsystems engineer
description:
Confira a vaga para Senior outsystems engineer em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Senior Out Systems Engineer About the Role We are seeking a Senior Out Systems Engineer to lead platform stabilization and migration readiness efforts for a large-scale clinical application supporting 130+ locations nationwide. This is a highly hands-on, high-impact role focused on improving system performance, reducing risk, and preparing the platform for an eventual transition to a custom-built solution. This engagement is expected to begin late April or early May and run approximately 6 weeks, with strong potential for extension based on performance. What You'll Do Stabilize and Modernize Architecture Assess tightly coupled module architecture and reduce dependencies Identify and execute module extraction strategies to improve scalability Minimize risk and blast radius of ongoing changes without disrupting workflows Optimize Database and System Performance Improve database performance by optimizing queries and implementing indexing strategies Design and execute migration of binary large objects out of the database Replace inefficient polling with event-driven or conditional patterns Implement backpressure controls for integrations impacting system performance Reduce Error Noise and Improve Observability Identify and remediate recurring error patterns masking real issues Refactor exception handling and client-side lifecycle violations Establish a clean, monitorable baseline for system health Build a Real Release Pipeline Establish a true multi-environment deployment pipeline Configure deployment automation using Out Systems APIs Implement gated release processes with approvals and controls Ensure non-production environments support meaningful regression testing Manage Platform Capacity and Licensing Audit platform usage and identify optimization opportunities Remove unused or redundant components Define governance for capacity-impacting changes Extend platform headroom without impacting functionality Prepare for Migration to Custom Platform Document all integrations including triggers, data contracts, and failure modes Map data entities into portable schemas Capture business logic embedded within the platform Identify core business logic vs platform-generated components Advise on migration sequencing and risk across workflows What You Bring Required Experience 5+ years building and maintaining enterprise-scale Out Systems applications Deep experience with Out Systems 11, Service Studio, and Lifetime API Proven success optimizing performance including query tuning and data model improvements Experience refactoring complex, tightly coupled systems into modular architectures Strong SQL Server performance tuning experience including execution plans and indexing Hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation within Out Systems Strong problem-solving skills in live production environments Preferred Experience Experience supporting or leading Out Systems to custom platform migrations Background in healthcare or clinical systems with understanding of critical workflows Familiarity with HIPAA considerations and secure data handling Experience with license optimization and application object management Knowledge of integration patterns across scheduling, e-signature, or CRM systems Working Environment Collaborate closely with internal engineering and PM leadership Operate with high autonomy and ownership of technical decisions Work within a live production environment supporting critical clinical operations Balance speed and precision while minimizing risk to end users This is a unique opportunity to step into a complex, high-visibility system, make immediate impact, and shape the foundation for a next-generation platform.

title: Specialist ai engineer / builder (llm & healthcare) | remote job
description:
Empresa está contratando Specialist ai engineer / builder (llm & healthcare) | remote job em palmas. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

The Challenge Every year, the healthcare industry loses billions due to billing failures. We are building the missing link that closes this gap with AI. We are growing fast, with real operations, active customers, and new partners in the pipeline. We are looking for a builder who wants to help turn our current product into a platform with global scale. Why This Role Might Be for You Here, autonomy, ownership, and initiative are part of the daily routine. We are not looking for someone who already knows everything. Not knowing is part of the process. What matters to us is investigative curiosity, strong execution, and a genuine desire to learn. You will work across both execution and strategy: from writing code to helping shape product and technical decisions. This is a role for someone who can propose new models, spot revenue opportunities, and also dig into data manually when needed to make sure the solution is truly accurate. Speed, urgency, and attention to detail are essential to how we build. Key Responsibilities Your mission will be to help lead the evolution of our AI capabilities. Today: Execution and Precision Refine and optimize models already in production using AWS Bedrock, continuously improving accuracy and performance. Validate data, rules, and outputs manually when needed. In healthcare, data quality is non-negotiable. Monitor denial patterns and implement fast feedback loops so the system improves continuously. Tomorrow: Scale and Architecture Help evolve our infrastructure into a robust ecosystem using RAG pipelines and vector databases. Move from a centralized AI solution toward a network of specialized models by context and insurance payer. Contribute to fine-tuning proprietary models using our historical data to create a unique competitive advantage. What We're Looking For Investigative curiosity: You want to understand complex medical billing rules and are motivated to master a difficult domain. Healthcare experience is not required. Bias for action: You move fast, take initiative, and understand that speed matters in an early-stage company. Hands-on coding ability: Solid practical experience with Python or Go, plus experience working with LLM APIs such as Open AI, Anthropic, or AWS Bedrock. Builder mindset: You enjoy creating robust systems from scratch and care deeply about precision, reliability, and business impact. What We Offer Early-stage impact: Be one of the early team members in a fast-growing company and help shape both the architecture and the culture. High-level technical challenge: Work on real business problems using modern generative AI. Strong team: Work with ambitious, high-performing people who care about building something meaningful. Remote flexibility: 100% remote work, open to candidates based in Brazil. Long-term upside: Potential equity participation for people who help build the business with us. Legacy: Your work will leave a real mark on the product, the codebase, and the company's story.

O que oferecemos Salário fixo competitivo Benefícios como transporte e outros Treinamento completo + workshops de desenvolvimento Learning Hub com oportunidades reais de crescimento Estúdio incrível em um prédio icônico de São Paulo Aparições diante das câmeras e evolução contínua das suas skills de apresentação

title: Ai development orchestrator
description:
Nova oportunidade para Ai development orchestrator em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Location: Remote Type: Full-Time Reports to: CEO Stack: Type Script, Python, React (Next.js App Router), Node, Postgre SQL, Supabase (Auth + RLS + Edge Functions + Realtime + Storage), Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Anthropic SDK, MCP, Bash, Git Stage: Revenue-generating Saa S, active production users Start: Immediate The Company Fabri Holdings is a dynamic and forward-thinking company that values innovative solutions and creativity. With a commitment to excellence and collaboration, the company provides comprehensive services tailored to the needs of its diverse clientele. Fabri Holdings fosters an inclusive and supportive work culture, encouraging employees to achieve their full potential. We are currently hiring for a partner company that is the operating system for founders building personal brands. They help B2 B founders turn expertise into organic content engines that generate revenue without ads, agencies, or 10-hour content days. They have served 18,000+ founders and built a $15 M/year business on organic content alone. They are now building the platform that powers our done-for-you delivery at scale. The Role You are the engineering quality gate. You direct AI agents through focused task briefs, review every commit, and catch what the AI misses. You think in systems; the agents think in code. Multiple LLMs are run against the same problem; the strongest output is selected. Your job is to ensure what ships is correct, secure, performant, and architecturally sound. Every uncertain decision goes through structured review before approval. The validation layer is non-negotiable. What You Do Review every AI-generated commit. Not \"does it run\" - \"what happens under concurrent load, what happens when an edge function cold-starts, what RLS policy is silently leaking across tenants.\" Architect features as single-task agent briefs: What / Why / Done When / Watch Out For. Scoped, focused, clear. Own the test pipeline. Vitest unit + Deno tests for edge functions + Playwright E2 E. Evaluate whether tests prove behavior or inflate coverage. Diagnose, the agents fix, you verify. Refactor when AI-generated code drifts. Keep the codebase coherent. Own production stability. Read Supabase logs, trace edge functions through RLS, identify root cause, direct the fix. Scale architecture for 10x growth without rewrites. Must-Haves Daily production AI workflow. You ship features where AI wrote the code and you validated it. Not autocomplete. Not casual. Multi-agent, multi-model, structured review. You are the reviewer; the AI is the author. Supabase in production. Postgre SQL with RLS, Auth (email + magic link + OAuth), Edge Functions (Deno), Realtime, Storage. You have been burned by race conditions and you know how to write RLS that is both secure AND performant. Type Script primary. Strict mode. Zod at system boundaries. You understand why compile-time types and runtime validation are different problems. React in production. Next.js App Router, server components, complex state, real-time UIs, large component libraries (shadcn/ui or equivalent). You understand re-renders, memoization, and bundle size as engineering concerns. Python comfort. Our sync engines and integration scripts are Python. You can read, debug, and ship in it. Third-party API integration in production. Stripe, Hub Spot, Calendly, Fathom, social APIs. Webhook verification, idempotency, retries, graceful degradation when an upstream is down. Edge function fluency. Deno or equivalent serverless. Cold starts, execution limits, no in-memory state across invocations. Code review depth. You catch security holes, race conditions, tests that pass without testing, RLS that leaks, cache that serves stale data after mutation. This is 60% of the role. Strong Signals Built or customized AI agent workflows: Claude Code skills, CLAUDE.md configurations, memory persistence, multi-model comparison. Reviewed AI-generated PRs (not AI-assisted human code). Database-level access control in production. Real-time features: Supabase Realtime or Web Sockets, with subscription lifecycle and reconnection handling. OWASP Top 10 fluency. Product Saa S background, not agency or consultancy. Red Flags AI is autocomplete or boilerplate to you. Cannot explain architectural decisions in code shipped with AI assistance. Treats AI as infallible OR untrustworthy. Right stance: trust but verify. Overrides correct AI output on gut feel instead of validated review. Frontend-only or backend-only specialist. The review surface is full-stack. Consulting/body-shop background with no production ownership. No experience with real-time, data-heavy applications. Who This Person Is 3 to 7 years full-stack, weighted toward Type Script + Supabase (or equivalent Postgre SQL stack) and Python comfort. Not a 15-year veteran - we need someone agile and AI-native, not resistant. You understand a production system end-to-end: frontend, edge functions, database, auth, third-party integrations. You don't need to be the deepest expert in every layer. You need enough depth across all of them to catch when AI generates something architecturally wrong, and enough humility to validate before approving. How We Evaluate No 60-minute coding test. We evaluate thinking, reviewing, directing. Bug Triage. Real (sanitized) bug from our codebase. Walk us through diagnosis. Do you read the code? Ask the right questions? Understand what could go wrong beyond the immediate symptom? Cold Code Review. Unaudited file written by an AI agent. Tell us what you see: security, race conditions, RLS leak, stale cache, tests that pass without proving anything. Task Brief. We hand you a feature requirement. Write the brief you'd give an AI agent. Is it clear, scoped, and likely to produce good first-pass output? AI Workflow Conversation. Describe your current AI workflow in detail. What you trust, what you double-check, how you handle uncertainty. What We Offer A founding-level seat. Your judgment shapes the product. Direct CEO access. The most advanced AI development workflow you'll work in: multi-model agent orchestration, AI-generated codebase, structured validation, Claude Code skills + memory. Production impact day one. The product is live. Founders use it daily. Your work ships immediately. A product founders love: 18,000+ served, $15 M/year, organic-only. A process that values getting it right. Speed comes from AI; quality comes from you. To Apply or Refer Send a brief note describing your AI coding workflow and a link to something you've shipped. Include your React + Type Script + Supabase (or equivalent) experience. No cover letter. We read code and we read people.

title: Business intelligence analyst
description:
Confira a vaga para Business intelligence analyst em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

About the Company Fraud Deflect helps businesses make better decisions around fraud, chargebacks, disputes, alerts, and operational performance. We work with high-volume operational data and need clear, trusted reporting that helps teams move quickly and make better decisions. About the Role We are looking for a BI Analyst to own and improve business reporting across fraud, chargebacks, alerts, merchant performance, and operations. This role is focused on dashboards, KPI tracking, reporting consistency, metric definitions, and turning business questions into clear, actionable insights. You will work closely with leadership, operations, product, and engineering to make data easier to understand, easier to trust, and more useful in day-to-day decision-making. Responsibilities Own dashboards, recurring reports, and KPI tracking across core business areas Build and maintain reporting that gives teams clear visibility into fraud, chargebacks, disputes, alerts, and operational performance Write and optimize SQL for reporting, analysis, and data validation Define, document, and improve business metrics so teams are working from consistent numbers Analyze trends, anomalies, and performance changes across key datasets Partner with stakeholders to translate business questions into practical reporting and analysis Improve the usability, accuracy, and trustworthiness of existing reports and dashboards Identify reporting gaps, data inconsistencies, and metric definition issues Create clear visualizations and present findings in a business-friendly way Support self-service reporting and help teams use data more effectively Requirements Strong SQL skills Experience building and maintaining dashboards and recurring business reporting Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills Ability to translate ambiguous business questions into clear metrics, reporting, and analysis Experience working with production data and validating reporting accuracy Strong communication skills with both technical and non-technical stakeholders Experience defining and maintaining KPIs or business metrics Comfortable working in a remote environment Able to pass a background check Preferred Experience with fraud, payments, chargebacks, disputes, risk, or other operational data Experience with BI and visualization tools Experience working with large datasets in a business reporting environment Experience with AWS-based data environments Basic Python skills for ad hoc analysis or validation Experience with Click House or similar analytical databases Familiarity with data warehouse or reporting-layer concepts How to Apply Please send your resume in English.

title: Technical project manager
description:
Confira a vaga para Technical project manager em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

About the Company Fraud Deflect helps businesses make better decisions around fraud, chargebacks, disputes, alerts, and operational performance. We work with high-volume operational data and need clear, trusted reporting that helps teams move quickly and make better decisions. About the Role The Technical Project Manager will work closely with engineering and collaborate with client experience, operations, and leadership to manage technical projects from planning through completion. Coordinate technical work involving APIs, data, internal tools, customer workflows, IT systems, and integrations. Help organize Jira tickets, documentation, meeting notes, and follow-ups. Make sure decisions, requirements, and action items are clearly documented. Support launch planning, testing coordination, and rollout communication. Support incident follow-ups, change coordination, and post-implementation reviews. Help improve lightweight processes around service delivery, technical operations, and project execution. Improve processes that help the team move faster without adding unnecessary overhead. Experience working with software engineering teams. Familiarity with ITIL practices, including incident management, change management, problem management, service management, and continuous improvement. Strong understanding of basic technical concepts such as APIs, databases, integrations, cloud systems, IT systems, and production releases. Strong communication and organization skills. Ability to manage multiple projects at the same time. Comfortable working in a fast-moving environment with changing priorities. Able to turn unclear problems into clear next steps. Experience using tools like Jira Software, Confluence, Slack, Git Hub, Jira Service Management, or similar platforms. Required Skills ITIL Foundation certification or equivalent practical experience. Experience in fintech, payments, fraud prevention, chargebacks, banking, or risk. Experience working on customer integrations or partner integrations. Basic SQL knowledge. title: Full stack engineer
description:
Empresa está contratando Full stack engineer em palmas. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

About Freight Hero Freight Hero is an AI-native services company built to support the freight brokerage industry, which is in dire need of it. Robin, our autonomous AI agent, handles back-office work end to end. Our Heroes, a sharp human-in-the-loop team, catch the edge cases. Brokers pay us per load, see ROI in weeks, and reassign or eliminate the teams they used to rent. We are backed by incredible investors, including Andrew Ng's AI Fund and supply chain specialists Dynamo Ventures. The thesis is proven. What is next is growth, and that means building a team of incredible people around us to push the company to the next level. The product is real, the customers are real, the revenue is real, and joining now means shaping how this company runs. About the Role This is a senior full‐stack engineering role focused on building and scaling the core Freight Hero platform. You will work across backend services, integrations, internal tools, and customer-facing features, primarily using Node.js, Type Script, React, and AWS. You won't be inheriting a legacy monolith. You'll be contributing to a modern, event‐driven, AI‐powered system and helping us scale it as customer adoption accelerates. You'll collaborate closely with product, AI, and customer teams to translate real operational workflows into robust, reliable software. As the team grows, you'll have opportunities to mentor others, influence architecture, and shape engineering best practices. What Success Looks Like A successful engineer in this role: Builds scalable, reliable services in Node.js/Type Script that integrate deeply with customer systems. Designs and maintains AWS‐native infrastructure that is observable, secure, and cost‐efficient. Works cross‐functionally to understand customer workflows and translate them into technical solutions. Ships high‐quality features quickly while maintaining engineering excellence. Identifies opportunities to automate, optimize, and expand the platform. Contributes to a culture of ownership, clarity, and continuous improvement. Key Responsibilities: Full Stack Engineering Build backend services, APIs, and workflow engines using Node.js + Type Script. Contribute to frontend components when needed using React + Vue JS. Implement robust testing, observability, and CI/CD practices. AWS native Architecture Design and maintain cloud infrastructure using AWS services such as Lambda, RDS, Dynamo DB, SQS, SNS, API Gateway, and more. Ensure systems are scalable, secure, and cost‐optimized. Systems Integration Build integrations with TMS platforms, carrier systems, and customer‐specific tools. Work with internal teams to understand operational processes and translate them into scalable technical solutions. AI Forward Development Collaborate with AI engineers to embed LLM‐powered workflows into the product. Use AI tools to accelerate development, improve code quality, and automate repetitive tasks. Identify opportunities to expand AI‐driven automation across the platform. Collaboration & Impact Work closely with product, operations, and customer success to deeply understand customer needs. Participate in technical discussions, architectural decisions, and roadmap planning. Help establish engineering best practices as the team grows. What We Are Looking For 8+ years of professional software engineering experience. Strong expertise in Node.js, Type Script, React, and AWS cloud architecture. Experience building distributed systems, event‐driven architectures, or workflow automation. Comfortable working across the stack (backend‐heavy, but able to contribute to frontend). Strong communicator who collaborates well with non‐technical teams. High ownership mindset - you thrive in fast‐moving, ambiguous environments. Curiosity about AI and eagerness to leverage it in your day‐to‐day work. Bonus: experience in freight tech, logistics, or integrations with TMS/ERP systems. Why Freight Hero Built at the intersection of AI and logistics, one of the most impactful spaces in B2 B tech. Work with a team that moves fast, thinks big, and cares deeply about customer outcomes. Opportunities to mentor, influence architecture, and grow as the engineering team scales. Competitive compensation with performance incentives. Fully remote with a collaborative, high‐performance culture.

title: Software engineer ii - pleno | genai (clt) - remoto
description:
Confira a vaga para Software engineer ii - pleno | genai (clt) - remoto em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Estamos em busca de uma pessoa Software Engineer Pleno (Gen AI) para compor o time de Tecnologia e mudar vidas com a gente! O Gran é um ecossistema que une educação e tecnologia, que acelera e customiza o aprendizado para diferentes necessidades e momentos e que já impactou mais de 2 milhões de vidas. Temos a plataforma de educação mais acessada do Brasil e fomos eleitos a 5a empresa mais inovadora da América Latina. Hoje, temos 2 verticais principais: a de Cursos Preparatórios e a Gran Faculdade. Adotamos iniciativas tecnológicas para deixar a educação mais inclusiva. Por isso, temos atualmente vários produtos para fazer isso acontecer, como: os audiolivros – com técnicas avançadas de inteligência artificial, criamos um acervo com mais de 28 mil livros convertidos em 110 mil horas de áudio –; o Gerenciador de Estudos, que auxilia no planejamento diário; e os aplicativos para TV e celulares Android e i OS, que funcionam também no modo offline. Recursos tecnológicos e inovação nos acompanham desde sempre e, com o esforço do nosso time, fomos reconhecidos mundialmente pela Amazon Web Services com três cases de sucesso envolvendo Inteligência Artificial, boas práticas, inovação, inclusão e impacto. Acesse nossos cases clicando nos links abaixo: 20 mil horas de vídeo legendadas com mais de 92% de precisão; Recomendação de cursos utilizando Amazon Sage Maker; Audiolivros. Se interessou? Vem ser Gran Lover! Esta vaga está no nosso modelo de trabalho Gran Mundo, sendo 100% remoto. Todas as nossas vagas são no modelo de trabalho CLT. Quer saber mais sobre a gente? Clique AQUI para retornar para a página de carreiras. Responsabilidades e atribuições Aqui você vai: Desenvolver e otimizar pipelines de RAG: Construir sistemas de RAG avançados que consultem múltiplas fontes de dados, como PDFs e transcrições de vídeo, para garantir respostas precisas e com ampla cobertura de conteúdo. Automatizar a avaliação de qualidade: Implementar pipelines de \"LLM-as-a-Judge\" para auditar a qualidade das respostas da IA em escala. Construir a personalização da IA: Desenvolver e implementar sistemas de memória conversacional de longo prazo (usando frameworks como Lang Chain) para que o sistema possa se lembrar do contexto e do históricos de interações. Arquitetar sistemas de múltiplos agentes: Projetar e construir uma arquitetura de agentes especialistas, com um router inteligente que direciona as requisições para o agentes mais adequados. Trabalhar com LLMs: Utilizar e otimizar os mais recentes modelos de linguagem (GPT, Claude, etc.), aplicando técnicas de prompt engineering para maximizar a qualidade das respostas. Contribuir para a vetorização do conhecimento: Apoiar a iniciativa estratégica de \"IA Onipresente\", ajudando a estruturar e vetorizar todo o acervo acadêmico do Gran para torná-lo acessível à IA. Definir contratos de dados: Colaborar com o Desenvolvedores de software para definir as APIs e os contratos de dados necessários para servir os modelos de IA com eficiência e baixa latência. Requisitos e qualificações O que buscamos: Experiência em Engenharia de IA/ML, com foco em IA Generativa e LLMs. Conhecimento e experiência prática na construção e otimização de sistemas RAG. Domínio de Python e de frameworks de IA como Lang Chain, Llama Index e/ou Hugging Face. Experiência com bancos de dados vetoriais (ex: Open Search, Milvus, Weaviate) e de Grafos (ex. Neo4j, Falkordb) Compreensão de prompt engineering, técnicas de avaliação de LLMs e estratégias de redução de alucinação. Experiência com a utilização de serviços de cloud (preferencialmente AWS) para deploy e gerenciamento de soluções de IA. Diferenciais: Experiência na construção de sistemas de múltiplos agentes (multi-agent systems). Conhecimento de ferramentas de observabilidade para LLMs (ex: Lang Fuse). Experiência com \"LLM-as-a-Judge\" para avaliação automatizada. Vivência em projetos que envolvem a ingestão e o processamento de grandes volumes de dados para alimentar sistemas de IA. Informações adicionais Aqui você vai encontrar benefícios como: Saúde e Bem-Estar: Plano de Saúde e Odontológico Sul América com cobertura nacional, custeado em 100% pela empresa. Wellhub (Gympass) ou reembolso de academia. Aplicativo para agendamento de massagem. Convênio com Sesc, proporcionando acesso a atividades culturais e de lazer. Aplicativos Starbem, Avus e Auster: saúde, bem-estar e suporte completo, incluindo assistência psicológica, financeira e jurídica. Alimentação: Vale Refeição ou Vale Alimentação pagos no cartão i Food. Reconhecimento e Incentivos: Auxílio Home Office pago no cartão i Food. PLR de acordo com as regras vigentes. Licença maternidade e paternidade estendidas. Gran Pix - Programa de reconhecimento de projetos com premiações. Auxílio-Creche. Desenvolvimento Profissional: Bolsa de estudos integral para Graduação e Pós-Graduação na Gran Faculdade. Assinatura Ilimitada Gran Concursos gratuita. Gran Academy - Universidade Corporativa para desenvolvimento dos Gran Lovers. Políticas de incentivo ao estudo, promovendo o aprendizado contínuo. Benefícios Especiais: Kit onboarding e equipamentos disponibilizados pelo Gran. Vale Natal em dezembro. Kit Gran Baby, um presente para celebrar o nascimento de bebês na família. M. O. M - Momento Off Mamãe: 1 (um) dia de descanso adicional no ano, a ser definido junto com a liderança direta. Gran Kit Escolar - auxílio material escolar. Auxílio Inclusão - exclusivo para Pc D. Petlove – plano de saúde para os pets da família. Tempo para você: Day Off no aniversário. Seguro de vida. Local de trabalho: Trabalhe de qualquer lugar! Nós estamos em home office, e temos colaboradores espalhados por todo o Brasil! Jornada de Trabalho: 40h semanais Nós valorizamos a diversidade e todas as pessoas são bem-vindas nos nossos processos seletivos. Vem ser Gran Lover!!! A nossa comunicação é feita por e-mail e/ou Whats App. Por isso, não esqueça de deixar o seu cadastro atualizado e fique de olho na sua caixa de entrada e spam. Todo o processo do Gran é feito de forma online e enviamos feedback ao fim de todos os processos. Etapas do processo Cadastro Entrevista com time de Pessoas e Cultura Entrevista com Liderança Contratação DESPERTAR POTENCIAIS, MUDAR VIDAS E CRIAR NOVOS FUTUROS ;) Somos um ecossistema que une educação e tecnologia, que acelera e customiza o aprendizado para diferentes necessidades e momentos.

Requisitos e qualificações: Hard Skills: Experiencia com nuvem (AWS, GCP, Azure, etc) (Mínimo de 1 ano); Experiência com. NET (C#) (Mais de 3 anos); Experience com banco de dados relacional (SQLServer, My Sql, Postgres) (Mais de 3 anos); Design Patterns; Experiência com testes unitários (TDD); Conhecimento em GIT; Conhecimento de metodologias ágeis (Scrum); Conhecimento em Docker, Kubernets; Conhecimento em frameworks de messageria (Kafka, Active MQ, Rabbit MQ, etc..); Boa comunicação e trabalho em equipe; Capacidade de escrever código robusto, testável e validado; Conhecimento em aplicações que precisem responder em alta disponibilidade e alta performance. Desejáveis: Conhecimento de Mercado Financeiro; Experiência com ferramentas de Code Quality (sonar); Experiência com ferramentas de APM (Dynatrace, App Dynamics, Data Dog, etc...); Conhecimento em Prometheus, metricas e monitoramento; Experiência com aplicações SPA; Conhecimento em Elastic Search, Apache Lucene e Graph QL; Experiência trabalhando com implantação e gerenciamento de nuvem; Experiência com gerenciamento e implantação de CI/CD. Soft Skills: Raciocínio lógico e capacidade analítica; Boa Comunicação; Espírito de equipe e capacidade de resolução de conflitos; Ter capacidade de comunicação com diversos perfis de stakeholders; Habilidade de trabalhar em equipes ágeis e multidisciplinares; Criatividade e Proatividade para imaginar diferentes cenários de uso das aplicações; Organização.

title: Full stack engineer
description:
Nova oportunidade para Full stack engineer em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

About Freight Hero Freight Hero is an AI-native services company built to support the freight brokerage industry, which is in dire need of it. Robin, our autonomous AI agent, handles back-office work end to end. Our Heroes, a sharp human-in-the-loop team, catch the edge cases. Brokers pay us per load, see ROI in weeks, and reassign or eliminate the teams they used to rent. We are backed by incredible investors, including Andrew Ng's AI Fund and supply chain specialists Dynamo Ventures. The thesis is proven. What is next is growth, and that means building a team of incredible people around us to push the company to the next level. The product is real, the customers are real, the revenue is real, and joining now means shaping how this company runs. About the Role This is a senior full‐stack engineering role focused on building and scaling the core Freight Hero platform. You will work across backend services, integrations, internal tools, and customer-facing features, primarily using Node.js, Type Script, React, and AWS. You won't be inheriting a legacy monolith. You'll be contributing to a modern, event‐driven, AI‐powered system and helping us scale it as customer adoption accelerates. You'll collaborate closely with product, AI, and customer teams to translate real operational workflows into robust, reliable software. As the team grows, you'll have opportunities to mentor others, influence architecture, and shape engineering best practices. What Success Looks Like A successful engineer in this role: Builds scalable, reliable services in Node.js/Type Script that integrate deeply with customer systems. Designs and maintains AWS‐native infrastructure that is observable, secure, and cost‐efficient. Works cross‐functionally to understand customer workflows and translate them into technical solutions. Ships high‐quality features quickly while maintaining engineering excellence. Identifies opportunities to automate, optimize, and expand the platform. Contributes to a culture of ownership, clarity, and continuous improvement. Key Responsibilities: Full Stack Engineering Build backend services, APIs, and workflow engines using Node.js + Type Script. Contribute to frontend components when needed using React + Vue JS. Implement robust testing, observability, and CI/CD practices. AWS native Architecture Design and maintain cloud infrastructure using AWS services such as Lambda, RDS, Dynamo DB, SQS, SNS, API Gateway, and more. Ensure systems are scalable, secure, and cost‐optimized. Systems Integration Build integrations with TMS platforms, carrier systems, and customer‐specific tools. Work with internal teams to understand operational processes and translate them into scalable technical solutions. AI Forward Development Collaborate with AI engineers to embed LLM‐powered workflows into the product. Use AI tools to accelerate development, improve code quality, and automate repetitive tasks. Identify opportunities to expand AI‐driven automation across the platform. Collaboration & Impact Work closely with product, operations, and customer success to deeply understand customer needs. Participate in technical discussions, architectural decisions, and roadmap planning. Help establish engineering best practices as the team grows. What We Are Looking For 8+ years of professional software engineering experience. Strong expertise in Node.js, Type Script, React, and AWS cloud architecture. Experience building distributed systems, event‐driven architectures, or workflow automation. Comfortable working across the stack (backend‐heavy, but able to contribute to frontend). Strong communicator who collaborates well with non‐technical teams. High ownership mindset - you thrive in fast‐moving, ambiguous environments. Curiosity about AI and eagerness to leverage it in your day‐to‐day work. Bonus: experience in freight tech, logistics, or integrations with TMS/ERP systems. Why Freight Hero Built at the intersection of AI and logistics, one of the most impactful spaces in B2 B tech. Work with a team that moves fast, thinks big, and cares deeply about customer outcomes. Opportunities to mentor, influence architecture, and grow as the engineering team scales. Competitive compensation with performance incentives. Fully remote with a collaborative, high‐performance culture.

title: Support analyst l2 - bilingual
description:
Empresa está contratando Support analyst l2 - bilingual em palmas. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Job Description Please submit resumes in English. Strong English speaking and writing communication skills are required. As a Support Analyst L2, you will troubleshoot operational issues with the Warehouse Management System (WMS), manage configurations, support cloud solutions, monitor SQL performance, and maintain documentation. You bring expertise with Oracle Web Logic Server, Oracle Databases, cloud services, Linux systems, supply chain technologies, and various hardware/software tools used in warehouse and distribution operations. What a day in the life looks like: Troubleshoot business and operational issues associated with the Warehouse Management System (WMS) and ancillary software. Quantify issues and provide supporting data if issues are escalated to the ERP Vendor. Manage the WMS environments and migration of configurations between environments. Support the operation and continuous improvement of the monitoring of our cloud solutions. SQL performance monitoring, index, and query tuning. Maintain detailed documentation of configurations, troubleshooting steps, and support processes for future reference and knowledgebase articles. What you bring to the team: BS/BA in Computer Science, MIS, or equivalent; 5+ years of technical customer support experience. 3+ years of experience with SQL/Oracle. Advantage: Experience in software development. Knowledge of cloud infrastructure and services (AWS, Azure, OCI, Google Cloud). Advantage: Experience with supply chain, distribution, and interface technologies.

description:

Experience: 7+ years of hands-on experience in the Salesforce ecosystem, with a proven track record of delivering complex technical projects. 2years of experience with Salesforce CPQ (Steel Brick) Development Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Apex, LWC, Java Script, and SOQL/SOSL. title: Multidisciplinary creative
description:
Nova oportunidade para Multidisciplinary creative em boa vista. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Hey, Dingus! Yep, you read that right. Dingus & Zazzy is expanding, and we're on the hunt for a sharp, versatile Multidisciplinary Creative who can move fluidly across video, design, UI/UX, and AI, and make it all look effortless. About Us Dingus & Zazzy is a global digital marketing agency helping brands grow across every corner of the digital landscape. We offer an \"unlimited get-shit-done\" subscription for our clients, from websites to social to SEO and everything in between. Our team is full of creatives, strategists, tech geeks, and builders who love making brands look, feel, and perform better online. If that sounds like your vibe, keep reading. What You'll Do Edit and produce video content across formats, social, brand, campaign, and everything in between. Design compelling visual assets across digital and print, maintaining brand consistency and creative quality. Lead and execute UI/UX work, from wireframes and user flows to polished, production-ready interfaces. Leverage AI tools to enhance and accelerate creative output, from ideation to execution. Collaborate with strategists, account managers, and developers to bring creative concepts to life across multiple channels. Manage multiple projects simultaneously without dropping the ball on quality or deadlines. Stay ahead of design trends, tools, and AI-powered workflows that keep our creative output cutting edge. What You Bring 2+ years of hands-on experience across graphic design, video editing, and UI/UX, not just one of them. A strong portfolio that proves you can move across disciplines without losing quality. Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Premiere Pro, After Effects, Illustrator, Photoshop), Figma, and Canva. Real experience using AI tools in a creative workflow (image generation, video AI, copy assistance, etc.). A solid eye for typography, layout, motion, and user experience. Ability to take creative direction and run with it independently in a fully remote, fast-paced environment. Strong communication skills, you know how to present your work and take feedback like a pro. Bonus Points Experience with Webflow or basic front-end knowledge (HTML/CSS). Motion graphics or animation experience beyond basic video editing. Experience in a digital agency or client-services environment. Familiarity with AI design tools like Midjourney, Eleven Labs, or equivalents. Work Details Hours: 9 A. M. – 5 P. M. MST, Monday to Friday Requires a working level of written and spoken English If you're someone who thrives on variety, gets excited by creative challenges across multiple disciplines, and loves using the latest tools to push work further, we want to hear from you. Ready for the ride of your life? Apply now! Note: Due to the high number of applicants across roles, responses and processes will take a while.

title: Ai automation specialist
description:
Confira a vaga para Ai automation specialist em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Hey, Dingus! Yep, you read that right. Dingus & Zazzy is expanding, and we're on the hunt for a sharp, systems-minded AI Automation Specialist who can build, connect, and scale intelligent workflows that actually work in production. About Us Dingus & Zazzy is a global digital marketing agency helping brands grow across every corner of the digital landscape. We offer an "unlimited get-shit-done" subscription for our clients, from websites to social to SEO and everything in between. Our team is full of creatives, strategists, tech geeks, and builders who love making brands look, feel, and perform better online. If that sounds like your vibe, keep reading. What You'll Do Build and maintain automated workflows using N8 N, connecting APIs, webhooks, and data sources into seamless pipelines. Integrate and prompt Claude (Anthropic) and other LLMs into production systems, not just experiments. Manage and automate data operations in Airtable, including scripted fields, automations, and structured data pipelines. Design AI-assisted workflows that reduce manual effort across client delivery, internal ops, and content production. Troubleshoot broken pipelines, handle edge cases, and document systems so they don't live only in your head. Collaborate with strategy and delivery teams to identify automation opportunities and scope builds accurately. Stay current on the AI tooling landscape, you should know what's worth using before we ask. Own and iterate on AI agent logic and system prompts, understanding why a workflow behaves the way it does and improving it over time. Build net-new internal AI tools as the business identifies opportunities, not just maintain what exists. What You Bring 2+ years of hands-on experience building automated workflows (N8 N, , or Zapier, N8 N strongly preferred). Real experience integrating LLMs via API (Claude, GPT, or equivalent) into production pipelines with structured outputs. Proficiency in Airtable as a data layer, scripting, automations, relational structures. Solid understanding of REST APIs, JSON, and webhook-based integrations. Basic scripting ability in Python or Java Script, enough to write and debug function nodes without hand-holding. A working understanding of HTML and CSS is imperative, you need to be able to read, interpret, and make sense of front-end structure when workflows touch web-based outputs. A systems thinker mindset: you design the whole loop, not just the happy path. Ability to work independently in a fully remote, fast-paced environment. Comfort with versioning and testing AI outputs, you notice when a prompt change breaks something and know how to fix it. Bonus Points Experience with vector databases or basic RAG pipelines (Pinecone, Supabase, etc.). Familiarity with AI agent frameworks (Lang Chain, or equivalent concepts). Experience in a digital agency or client-services environment. Exposure to prompt engineering best practices, like system prompts, chaining, few-shot design. Work Details Hours: 9 A. M. – 5 P. M. MST, Monday to Friday Requires a working level of written and spoken English If you're someone who can look at a messy manual process, see the system hiding inside it, and build something that runs without you, we want to hear from you. Ready for the ride of your life? Apply now! Note: Due to the high number of applicants across roles, responses and processes will take a while.

title: Vacation rental revenue manager
description:
Nova oportunidade para Vacation rental revenue manager em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

We're hiring a detail-oriented, numbers-driven Vacation Rental Revenue Manager to help Emperor Rentals improve pricing, occupancy, and revenue across our short-term rental portfolio. This is a fully remote position for candidates currently based in Brazil. You'll work with property performance data, market trends, and pricing tools to help us make smarter revenue decisions every week. Compensation: $250 USD per week, paid weekly. What you'll do: - Review property performance, pricing, occupancy, ADR, and revenue trends - Help optimize nightly rates based on seasonality, demand, events, and competitor pricing - Build and maintain simple revenue reports and forecasts - Track KPIs and identify opportunities to increase profitability - Support pricing decisions across Airbnb, short-term rental, and vacation rental channels - Communicate insights clearly and help the team make data-backed decisions You may be a great fit if you: - Are currently based in Brazil and can work remotely - Are highly analytical, organized, and comfortable working with numbers - Have strong Excel or Google Sheets skills - Can spot patterns in data and turn them into practical recommendations - Are detail-oriented, reliable, and proactive - Communicate clearly and can work independently - Are interested in hospitality, Airbnb, short-term rentals, real estate, finance, or revenue management Nice to have: - Experience with Airbnb, vacation rentals, hotels, property management, or revenue management - Experience with pricing tools, market research, dashboards, or financial reporting - Background in business, finance, economics, analytics, hospitality, or a related field This role is ideal for someone who enjoys data, pricing strategy, and helping a growing vacation rental company make smarter decisions. If you're based in Brazil and want a remote role where your analysis directly affects business results, we'd love to hear from you. To apply, please include: - Your resume - A short note about your relevant experience - Your Linked In profile, if available

title: Desenvolvedor(a) de software fullstack pleno (php / react / go)
description:
Nova oportunidade para Desenvolvedor(a) de software fullstack pleno (php / react / go) em rio branco. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Na Hug Labs, estamos construindo produtos de software movidos por IA para resolver problemas reais de empresas através de automação, agentes inteligentes, dados e sistemas escaláveis. Buscamos um(a) Desenvolvedor(a) Fullstack com mentalidade de builder — alguém que goste de construir produtos de ponta a ponta, resolver problemas complexos e trabalhar com autonomia. Stack principal Backend PHP (Laravel) Go (Golang) APIs REST Postgre SQL / bancos relacionais Redis Filas e processamento assíncrono Frontend React Type Script / Java Script Next.js (diferencial) Tailwind CSS Infraestrutura (plus) Docker Kubernetes AWS / Cloud CI/CD Observabilidade O que buscamos Você provavelmente vai se destacar se: Gosta de construir software de verdade Aprende rápido tecnologias novas Tem senso de ownership Consegue navegar bem entre frontend e backend Entende trade-offs técnicos Tem preocupação com performance, escalabilidade e qualidade É pragmático(a): sabe equilibrar velocidade e excelência Requisitos Experiência com PHP (preferencialmente Laravel) Experiência com React Experiência com APIs e arquitetura de software Conhecimento em bancos de dados relacionais Familiaridade com versionamento (Git) Experiência colocando software em produção Diferenciais Importantes Experiência com Go (Golang) Conhecimento em Dev Ops / infraestrutura cloud Docker e Kubernetes Experiência com CI/CD Conhecimento em sistemas distribuídos Experiência com produtos Saa S Interesse ou experiência com IA O que oferecemos Participação direta na construção de produtos de IA Ambiente com alto alinhamento e alta autonomia Decisões rápidas e pouca burocracia Contato próximo com founders e time técnico Espaço real para crescimento

title: Desenvolvedor wordpress (php) – foco em performance
description:
Confira a vaga para Desenvolvedor wordpress (php) – foco em performance em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Modelo de atuação: 100% Remoto Contratação: PJ Olá! Esperamos que você esteja bem Estamos em busca de um(a) Desenvolvedor(a) PHP/Word Press para atuar em uma posição estratégica junto ao time de Marketing da instituição. Essa pessoa será responsável por conectar tecnologia, performance e experiência digital, garantindo que os sites e landing pages sejam rápidos, escaláveis, responsivos e altamente focados em conversão. Buscamos um perfil com forte atuação em Word Press, visão técnica apurada, boa comunicação com áreas de negócio e olhar voltado para experiência do usuário, performance, integrações e otimização contínua dos canais digitais. O que esperamos de você: • Experiência sólida com desenvolvimento em PHP e Word Press • Vivência com criação e customização de temas, plugins e ACF • Domínio de HTML5, CSS3/SASS e Java Script (ES6+) • Conhecimentos em Type Script • Experiência com criação e consumo de APIs REST • Conhecimentos em SQL • Vivência com integrações entre sites, CRM e ferramentas de automação/marketing • Experiência no desenvolvimento de Landing Pages focadas em performance e conversão • Conhecimento em boas práticas de responsividade, acessibilidade e usabilidade • Familiaridade com ferramentas de rastreamento, tags e monitoramento • Experiência utilizando Inteligência Artificial como apoio à produtividade e desenvolvimento • Conhecimento em pelo menos um framework Front-end moderno: Angular, React ou Vue • Capacidade de desenvolver código limpo, organizado e escalável • Boa comunicação e perfil colaborativo para atuação próxima ao time de Marketing Diferenciais importantes: • Experiência com Angular • Conhecimento em Laravel • Experiência com Hub Spot CMS • Vivência em empresas do segmento Ed Tech / Educação • Conhecimentos em SEO Técnico • Experiência com Google Analytics, GTM e ferramentas de monitoramento • Vivência com testes A/B e otimização de conversão (CRO) • Experiência em ambientes com foco em aquisição digital e performance Responsabilidades: • Desenvolver e manter sites responsivos e acessíveis para os produtos digitais da instituição • Criar e otimizar Landing Pages focadas em conversão, performance e experiência do usuário • Atuar no desenvolvimento de funcionalidades reutilizáveis e escaláveis • Garantir boas práticas de acessibilidade, performance e usabilidade nas aplicações • Implementar integrações entre plataformas, APIs, CRM e ferramentas de marketing • Configurar e manter tags de rastreamento, eventos e monitoramento • Apoiar melhorias contínuas em SEO técnico e performance digital • Trabalhar em parceria com Marketing, Produto e demais áreas envolvidas nos projetos • Participar das definições técnicas e propor melhorias de arquitetura e experiência digital • Garantir qualidade técnica, manutenção e evolução contínua dos projetos web Se você gosta de construir experiências digitais de alta performance, possui perfil analítico e quer atuar próximo das estratégias de aquisição e conversão de uma grande instituição de ensino, essa oportunidade pode ser o próximo passo da sua carreira

title: Desenvolvedor senior - pl/sql
description:
Confira a vaga para Desenvolvedor senior - pl/sql em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Título do Cargo: Desenvolvedor Senior - PL/SQL Localização: Preferencialmente São Paulo, SP, Brasil (ou remoto para profissionais qualificados). Tipo de Contrato: CLT Sobre a Vaga Estamos em busca de um(a) desenvolvedor(a) experiente e proativo(a) para integrar a equipe do nosso cliente no setor de seguros. Nesta função, você contribuirá com o desenvolvimento, manutenção e otimização de sistemas escaláveis que sustentam aplicações críticas, especialmente em ambientes de nuvem (AWS). Responsabilidades Desenvolver e otimizar soluções utilizando PL/SQL e Java. Trabalhar em colaboração com a equipe da NTT, incluindo Líder Técnico, Analista e Desenvolvedores. Treinar e liderar outros profissionais com menos experiência. Elaborar relatórios proativos e comunicar-se efetivamente com a equipe. Requisitos Experiência comprovada em PL/SQL e Java. Conhecimento em desenvolvimento de soluções para rodar na Nuvem (AWS). Experiência no setor de seguros e sistemas de seguradoras. Disponibilidade para trabalhar em equipe e liderar. Qualificações Desejáveis Experiência prévia na Mapfre. Conhecimento de serviços AWS como lambdas. Salário e Benefícios Faixa salarial até R$14.000,00 (o valor final será avaliado de acordo com a experiência do profissional). Destaque para benefícios como plano de saúde, treinamentos e possibilidade de trabalho remoto. Quem Somos Talento onde você precisa, quando você precisa! A SGF Global é uma provedora líder de soluções especializadas em talentos, dedicada a conectar profissionais altamente qualificados com oportunidades em diversos setores. Oferecemos soluções de contratação para posições temporárias, permanentes e de contrato para efetivação em áreas como tecnologia, finanças e contabilidade, engenharia, marketing e criação, serviços jurídicos, suporte administrativo e ao cliente, energia, petróleo e gás, telecomunicações, manufatura, aeroespacial, ciências da vida, mineração e utilidades. Na SGF Global, trabalhamos para colocá-lo na melhor posição para ter sucesso. Oferecemos acesso a posições de alto nível, remuneração competitiva, benefícios atrativos e treinamentos online gratuitos. Fique por dentro de todas as oportunidades, a qualquer momento — mesmo em movimento.

title: Desenvolvedor(a) fullstack sênior (node e react)
description:
Confira a vaga para Desenvolvedor(a) fullstack sênior (node e react) em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Olá, somos a Super Frete :) Queremos ser a maior e mais amada rede de logística digital, quer fazer parte disso? Somos uma startup que atua no segmento do varejo e logística, apoiando os pequenos e médios empreendedores a se tornarem mais competitivos no mercado e a alavancarem suas vendas. Por isso, buscamos um Super Desenvolvedor(a) Fullstack Sênior atuando de forma com Node e React, que se identifique com o nosso propósito, que tenha muita energia para somar no time de Tecnologia e que queira crescer (muito!) com a gente. Responsabilidades: Desenvolver, manter e evoluir aplicações backend e frontend utilizando Node.js, Type Script, Java Script e React Participar da definição e evolução da arquitetura, propondo soluções escaláveis, performáticas e sustentáveis; Atuar no desenvolvimento e manutenção de aplicações web e mobile; Integrar aplicações com serviços de nuvem, bancos de dados e iniciativas de Dev Ops, garantindo escalabilidade e confiabilidade; Participar de code reviews e promover boas práticas, qualidade e consistência do código; Realizar análises e viabilidades técnicas, avaliando impactos, complexidade, aderência arquitetural e estratégias de implementação para apoiar decisões e priorizações do negócio; Explorar, testar e propor o uso de soluções e ferramentas baseadas em IA que contribuam para ganho de produtividade, melhoria da experiência do usuário e evolução dos produtos; Trabalhar em conjunto com times multidisciplinares para resolver problemas complexos e construir soluções alinhadas ao negócio. Requisitos: Sólida experiência com desenvolvimento backend e frontend utilizando Node.js, Type Script, Java Script e React; Experiência com gerenciamento de estado utilizando Redux e/ou Zustand; Experiência com serviços de nuvem como Firebase, AWS, GCloud ou similares; Familiaridade com bancos de dados relacionais e não relacionais, como Postgres e Mongo DB; Experiência com testes automatizados e práticas de qualidade de software; Conhecimento em arquitetura de software, APIs, padrões de desenvolvimento e boas práticas (Clean Code/Clean Architecture); Experiência com práticas de Dev Ops, automação e pipelines CI/CD; Vivência com arquitetura orientada a serviços e/ou ambientes serverless; Experiência com Git e metodologias ágeis (Scrum/Kanban); Interesse, familiaridade ou experiência no uso de recursos de Inteligência Artificial aplicados ao desenvolvimento, automação e produtividade, utilizando ferramentas como Cursor, Copilot, Claude, Chat GPT ou similares, além de iniciativas de aprendizado contínuo no tema; Capacidade de resolver problemas complexos e construir soluções escaláveis. Diferenciais: Vivência em construção, evolução e definição de arquitetura técnica; Experiência ou potencial para atuar como referência técnica ou evoluir para uma posição de Tech Lead, apoiando decisões técnicas, mentoria e desenvolvimento do time; Experiência com tecnologias de desenvolvimento mobile ou híbrido, como React Native, Capacitor, Cordova ou Ionic; Experiência em ambientes de startup e crescimento acelerado. O que você pode esperar dos Supers? Uma cultura de muita confiança, colaboração, focada em resultados, com muita autonomia e transparência; Buscamos excelência em tudo o que fazemos, por isso estamos sempre aprendendo; Temos vontade de construir junto, fazer a diferença e gerar impacto. O que oferecemos: Modelo de contratação: PJ; Modelo de trabalho 100% remoto: uma oportunidade de crescimento acessível para talentos em todo o Brasil; Plano de Saúde: mantenha-se saudável com nosso abrangente plano de saúde nacional com consultas online e presenciais; Gym Pass/Wellhub: bem-estar completo para você cuidar da sua saúde física e mental com os aplicativos integrados; Voucher Kit Escritório: receba um voucher para turbinar o seu espaço de trabalho e garantir seu conforto, comodidade e produtividade; Férias remuneradas: desfrute de 30 dias de férias remuneradas por ano para recarregar suas energias e relaxar; Programa Super-Get-Super: indique um talento e receba um bônus; Cultura colaborativa: nossa cultura é baseada na confiança, parceria e foco em resultados. Oferecemos um ambiente com autonomia e transparência; Incentivo ao desenvolvimento: estamos comprometidos com a excelência e o aprendizado contínuo. Oferecemos avaliações semestrais, conversas de one-on-one, feedbacks construtivos, e muito mais; Programa de Stock Option: possibilidade de se tornar sócio da empresa que foi reconhecida como uma das Startups mais promissoras do Brasil na lista 100 Startups to Watch. Se você está determinado a avançar em sua carreira, este é o lugar certo para você! E aí, vamos juntos nesse Super Foguete?

title: Analista financeiro pleno
description:

Por isso, buscamos um Super Analista de Financeiro Pleno, que se identifique com o nosso propósito, que tenha muita energia para somar no time Financeiro e que queira crescer (muito!) com a gente. Responsabilidades Gestão de contas a pagar e receber, incluindo execução de pagamentos; Realização de conciliações bancárias, garantindo a acuracidade das informações; Atualização e controle do fluxo de caixa, assegurando o correto registro das movimentações financeiras; Execução de rotinas financeiras recorrentes com alto volume de transações e prazos definidos; Organização e arquivamento de documentos financeiros e fiscais; Execução e suporte no processo de faturamento e emissão de notas fiscais, incluindo tratamento de inconsistências; Execução de rotinas administrativas e compras corporativas; Gestão e controle de contratos; Execução e suporte ativo no fechamento contábil, com envio de informações e realização de conciliações financeiras; Execução de validações e suporte às auditorias financeiras; Interface com áreas internas e fornecedores para resolução de pendências financeiras; Identificação, análise e resolução de inconsistências financeiras, com proposição de melhorias; Garantir a execução ponta a ponta das rotinas financeiras sob sua responsabilidade; Garantir a qualidade, consistência e confiabilidade das informações financeiras. title: Business operations sr analyst
description:
Empresa está contratando Business operations sr analyst em palmas. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

What is Teachable? Teachable is trusted by creator-educators around the world to grow their impact and income. From online courses and communities to memberships and downloads, Teachable's digital learning products help creator-educators drive meaningful connection and sustainable revenue. With industry-best ecommerce tools, easily toggled on directly within the platform, creators can confidently maximize their earnings, while getting paid directly by their audience. Teachable's unmatched focus on the student learning experience also ensures creators can make a positive and influential impact on their communities—entirely on their own terms. Today, tens of thousands of creator-educators use Teachable to share their knowledge, reaching millions of students around the world. To learn more, visit . Are you ready to join a dynamic, cross-cultural team at an exciting turning point in our company's journey? Now part of the global Hotmart Company portfolio, whose platforms have helped creators earn more than $10 billion, Teachable continues to take the creator economy by storm as a true industry leader. Together, Teachable and Hotmart are delivering market-leading products that prioritize creator control and flexibility, alongside meaningful partnership and support from our team. If you have big ideas, relish the chance to challenge convention, and deeply believe in the power of creators to shape the future, we want you on our team! Your Mission We are seeking a highly analytical and strategic Customer Success Operations Sr Analyst to strengthen our Customer Success strategy and accelerate our go-to-market engine in a rapidly growing Saa S company. You will partner with CS, Finance, Product, Marketing, and Data teams to design scalable processes, implement effective incentives and structures, and ensure execution aligns with business priorities. This is a high-impact role with strong visibility and influence across the organization. Key Responsibilities: Partner with CS and executive leadership to define the go-to-market strategy—including segmentation, sales motions, and revenue growth priorities. Design and continuously refine quota-setting frameworks, territory models, and headcount planning to enable scalable growth. Develop compensation strategies and incentive structures that drive exceptional performance while aligning with company objectives. Build and manage strategic dashboards and frameworks to monitor CS productivity, NRR, Excel/Google Sheets as needed. Translate business questions into analytical projects, delivering actionable insights to guide product focus, market entry, and commercial efficiency. Drive operational rigor through annual/quarterly planning cycles, cross-functional alignment, and performance reviews. Identify and implement process improvements across tools, data flows, and CRM workflows (Hub Spot) to enhance efficiency at scale. Requirements: 3–4 years of experience in Customer Success Operations or Business Operations, preferably within a Saa S or technology company. Strong proficiency in Excel/Sheets and CRM tools (Hub Spot knowledge is a plus) Solid understanding of Saa S metrics and revenue motions (new business, upsell, retention). Excellent communication skills in English (both written and verbal). Proven ability to collaborate cross-functionally and independently lead complex initiatives. Comfortable presenting insights and recommendations to senior leadership. Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Economics, Business, or a related field. Why Join Us? Opportunity to work in a high-growth Saa S environment with global exposure. Direct impact on go-to-market strategy and revenue growth. Collaborative, data-driven, and entrepreneurial culture. Competitive compensation and benefits package. This is a role based in Brazil, and you'll collaborate closely with teams across the U. S. and Brazil. Your work will follow Brasilia Standard Time (BRT), and you'll be hired as a CLT contract employee with compensation in BRL.

title: Virtual executive assistant – family owned business group
description:
Nova oportunidade para Virtual executive assistant – family owned business group em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Summary We are a family-owned business group overseeing a diversified portfolio of ventures across healthcare (medical practices), luxury travel, and Broadway / live entertainment production. Our organization supports multiple senior executives who operate at the intersection of medicine, entrepreneurship, real estate, travel, and the performing arts. We are seeking a highly proactive, detail-oriented Virtual Executive Assistant to provide executive-level administrative and operational support across the group and help streamline day-to-day execution as our businesses continue to grow. This is a unique opportunity to work closely with leadership across multiple industries, gaining exposure to complex operations, high-level decision-making, and creative as well as clinical environments. Responsibilities Manage and optimize executive calendars across multiple businesses, including coordinating meetings across time zones and balancing competing priorities Serve as a primary communication liaison, screening and prioritizing emails, calls, and messages to ensure timely and appropriate responses Coordinate travel arrangements including flights, accommodations, ground transportation, and detailed itineraries for business and personal travel Prepare meeting materials, agendas, briefing notes, and follow-up summaries to ensure action items are tracked and completed Conduct research on vendors, partners, venues, travel options, market opportunities, and industry trends to support executive decision-making Manage relationships with vendors and external service providers, including medical offices, travel partners, production vendors, accountants, and legal teams Organize and maintain digital filing systems across multiple entities, ensuring documents are secure, accessible, and well categorized Assist with special projects, including event coordination, content creation, process documentation, operational improvements, and cross-business initiatives Handle personal administrative tasks as needed to support executive productivity and work-life balance Qualifications 2–5 years of experience as an Executive Assistant, Virtual Assistant, or similar high-level administrative role supporting senior leaders Exceptional written and verbal communication skills in English, with the ability to represent executives professionally across industries Highly resourceful and high-agency, with a demonstrated ability to anticipate needs and solve problems independently Advanced proficiency with productivity tools including Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets), Zapier, Zoom, and project management platforms Strong organizational skills with experience managing complex schedules and competing priorities Proven track record of maintaining strict confidentiality and exercising sound judgment with sensitive information Reliable high-speed internet and a dedicated home office setup Availability to work during overlapping U. S. Eastern Time hours Preferred Qualifications Experience supporting founders, physicians, or executives across multiple businesses Familiarity with CRM systems, expense management, invoicing, and basic bookkeeping Experience coordinating events, travel, or live productions Comfort working in both clinical / professional and creative / entertainment environments Bilingual capabilities (Spanish is a plus but not required) Experience with Notion, Hubspot and Zapier What We Offer Competitive compensation commensurate with experience Opportunity to work directly with senior leadership across healthcare, luxury travel, and Broadway / live entertainment Exposure to a diversified business portfolio, not a single company role Flexible, remote-first work environment with an emphasis on results over hours Long-term growth potential for the right candidate who becomes a trusted operational partner

title: Consultor(a) sap fi sr
description:
Nova oportunidade para Consultor(a) sap fi sr em boa vista. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Somos a SEIDOR, multinacional de tecnologia e inovação, que oferece um portfólio completo de soluções e serviços para promover a competitividade e a transformação das organizações. São mais de 40 anos acreditando na tecnologia, com 85 escritórios e uma equipe de mais de 7.500 profissionais na Europa, América Latina, Estados Unidos, África, Oriente Médio e Ásia. Somos parceiros platinum da SAP e temos mais de 8.500 clientes. Nosso portfólio completo é voltado para empresas grandes, médias e em crescimento. Na SEIDOR acreditamos que, para enfrentar os novos desafios do mundo digital, devemos ter os melhores aliados, as tecnologias líderes de mercado e, acima de tudo, as melhores pessoas. Nós acreditamos no valor das pessoas. Buscamos constantemente atrair e reter talentos, investindo no desenvolvimento de nossos colaboradores e oferecendo oportunidades de crescimento profissional. Nosso time é composto por profissionais colaborativos, autônomos e ágeis que juntos formam um ambiente de trabalho desafiador, dinâmico e sem discriminação, respeitando as diferenças que nos tornam mais humanos. Venha fazer parte desse novo projeto! Tem os requisitos abaixo? Então essa vaga é para você! Consultor(a) SAP FI SR - Inglês Fluente Sobre a oportunidade: Início: Assim que aprovado Prazo: Indeterminado, fazer parte do time da consultoria Atividades: Atuar como Consultor(a) SAP FI com foco em Ativo Fixo (AA), participando de conversões, migrações, upgrades e adequações à Reforma Tributária; Realizar configurações nos submódulos FI (AP, AR, GL, BL e AA), garantindo aderência ao ambiente S/4 HANA; Apoiar a transição e evolução dos processos financeiros, assegurando consistência e conformidade dos dados. Requisitos: Experiência no módulo SAP FI (Financial Accounting); Experiência com conversão, migrações e upgrades de sistemas; Experiência com Reforma Tributária aplicada ao FI; Experiência com configurações no SAP FI para S/4 HANA: AP (Accounts Payable) AR (Accounts Receivable) GL (General Ledger) BL AA (Asset Accounting) Junte-se a nós e ajude-nos a humanizar o mundo através da tecnologia! Vem ser #Time Seidor Acompanhe a Seidor nas redes sociais: Brasil/ MHRhou WD5g

Senior Software Engineer (L3) - Healthcare Tech Nonprofit Want your code to actually matter? We're hiring on behalf of a mission-driven healthcare technology nonprofit whose platform has reached tens of millions of patients in low-income communities across the US. They're growing the team that builds the Saa S product hundreds of safety-net clinics rely on every day to manage patients and run patient engagement programs. This is a senior IC role with shared team-lead responsibilities - owning complex full-stack features end-to-end, mentoring mid-level engineers, and shaping architecture across a Rails monolith and React SPA. The Stack Ruby on Rails · React · Type Script · Postgre SQL · Google Cloud · Sidekiq What You'll Own Driving the technical direction of key Applications platform features Shipping full-stack work end-to-end: API → data model → UI Mentoring L2 engineers and leading technical design discussions Contributing to architectural decisions across the monolith and SPA Sharing on-call duties and helping evolve engineering standards What We're Looking For 8+ years full-stack experience, with deep Rails + modern React fluency A track record of owning complex features from design through production Advanced SQL and a genuinely analytical, evidence-led mindset Proven ability to mentor and influence technical direction Excellent async communication — this is a fully distributed team Real excitement about mission-driven work Bonus Points Healthcare tech, social services, or other practitioner-facing domains Multi-tenant data models, RBAC, accessibility-aware UI Experience scaling a Rails monolith with a React SPA frontend Interested? title: Full stack developer
description:
Confira a vaga para Full stack developer em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Job Offer: Full Stack Developer (Angular + Java Microservices) Location: São Paulo (mandatory residence). 100% remote work, with occasional on-site meetings when required Contract type: Permanent Employment type: Full-time About the role From SOTEC Consulting – ASTEK Group, we are looking for a Full Stack Developer with strong experience in high-performance, real-time data-driven environments to join an international project within a demanding and collaborative technology ecosystem. This role combines advanced frontend development in Angular with backend capabilities in Java (Spring Boot or similar), contributing to scalable solutions, API integrations, and features focused on user experience and real-time data processing. Responsibilities • Develop advanced frontend applications using Angular in complex, high-traffic environments. • Implement real-time data features (e.g., dynamic grids such as ag-Grid). • Develop backend services in Java using microservices architecture (Spring Boot or equivalent frameworks). • Design and implement RESTful APIs and handle JSON data structures. • Contribute to the design and improvement of UX/UI interfaces and reusable components. • Use AI tools to support UX design, code refactoring, template generation, and vulnerability remediation. • Implement responsive and adaptive design principles. • Collaborate in Agile/Scrum environments. • Work with version control systems (Git). Mandatory requirements • +8 years of experience in frontend development with Angular. • Strong experience in Java backend development, especially with microservices (Spring Boot or similar). • Proficiency in Type Script, Java Script, HTML5, and CSS3. • Experience integrating RESTful APIs and working with JSON data. • Experience implementing real-time data features (e.g., ag-Grid). • Experience using AI tools in development (UX, templates, refactoring, vulnerability detection/removal). • Familiarity with responsive and adaptive design principles. • Experience with Git or other version control systems. • Minimum English level B2 (mandatory). • Must be based in São Paulo (project requirement). Nice to have • Experience with state management libraries (Ng Rx, Akita). • Knowledge of containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes). • Experience with data visualization libraries (D3.js, Chart.js). • Exposure to Agile/Scrum methodologies. • Experience in financial services or other real-time, data-intensive industries. • Knowledge or experience with UX/UI design tools (Figma, Adobe XD). • Spanish language is a plus. What we offer • Participation in high-impact international technology projects. • Collaborative and multidisciplinary team culture. • Continuous training and professional development plans. • Additional benefits depending on the project and profile. Why join SOTEC / ASTEK? Being part of SOTEC Consulting means joining a company with 30 years of experience in the IT sector, backed by the strength of the ASTEK Group. This integration gives you access to large-scale international projects, working with global teams and multicultural environments that foster your professional growth. SOTEC is an equal opportunity employer, committed to diversity and inclusion regardless of race, gender, religion, age, sexual orientation, marital status, disability, nationality, or gender identity. We actively strive to avoid any form of bias. Take the next step in your career and join projects that are transforming the digital landscape. Apply now!
