title: Ai implementation lead (technical pm for agents & agentic / automated systems)
description:
Confira a vaga para Ai implementation lead (technical pm for agents & agentic / automated systems) em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Zaigo builds custom AI systems for founder-led, middle-market companies — the kind of businesses with messy operations, real revenue, and legacy software in place. They are thinking about how to leverage AI but don't know where to start. We turn manual workflows and inefficiencies into production AI systems, fast. We are hiring an AI Implementation Lead to own client delivery end-to-end inside a pod structure. You will run 5–10 client accounts at once, with 2–3 senior AI engineers reporting into your pod, and you will be the person the client trusts to get things shipped. Think of this as a principal-level role at a consulting firm: a senior partner sets the strategy and owns the relationship at the top, you own the execution and the day-to-day client trust, and your engineers do the heavy build. You are the person who keeps everything moving, makes the calls, and ships. What you'll actually do Own the client. You'll run discovery calls, scope the work, set expectations, give status updates, manage scope creep, and be the steady hand the client calls when something is on fire. Many of our clients are non-technical executives running real businesses — you need to be able to translate \"we have this messy thing happening in our operations\" into a concrete AI system, in plain English, without jargon. Architect the solution. On a discovery call, you should be able to sketch out a working solution in real time: \"Okay, this is a RAG problem with a chat layer on top, we'll use these 5 specialized agents to handle X, Y, and Z, output formatted to your Excel template, and we'll integrate with your existing CRM via API calls.\" You don't need to write the production code, but you need to know enough to confidently scope it, pick the right framework, point to the right open-source repo, and know roughly what's hard vs. easy. Run the pod. Translate the scoped solution into engineering tasks, hand it off cleanly, unblock the engineers, and review the work. You can't read every line of AI-generated code — nobody can anymore. You're evaluating whether the output is directionally right, whether the UX makes sense, whether the architecture will hold up, and whether it actually solves the client's problem. Strong product intuition matters more than line-by-line review. Prototype when needed. You're a player-coach. You should be comfortable opening Cursor or Claude Code to validate an approach, build a quick demo for a client call, or prototype a tricky workflow before handing it to engineers. You're not shipping production code as your main job, but you can build. Juggle. You'll have ~10 active projects across 5–10 clients at any time. Deadlines slip, priorities shift, clients change their minds. You stay calm, communicate proactively, and keep everything moving. Who you are You have at least 5–8 years of experience in some combination of technical product management, solutions engineering, technical consulting, forward-deployed engineering, or running your own thing. You may have been a founder. You may have been a PM at a fast company who got tired of waiting for engineers and started vibe coding your own stuff. You're technically literate in a hands-on way: you can vibe code, you know the major agentic frameworks (Claude Agent SDK, Vercel AI SDK etc.), you understand RAG architectures, you know when to use a vector DB vs. a graph DB vs. just dumping things into context, you've shipped things using AI tools. You communicate exceptionally well in English, both written and verbal. You're comfortable on a Zoom call with a 62-year-old CEO who has never heard of Loom and explaining to him, patiently, what we're building and why it matters for his business. You have founder-grade ownership. You don't say \"that wasn't in the ticket.\" You don't wait for someone to tell you what to do next. You see the gap, you close it. This role is for you if You can take a messy business problem and produce a clear, shippable architecture for it within a single call. You like running a lot of things at once and you don't drop balls. You're excited about AI-assisted building and you use these tools every day already. You want to work alongside experienced founders and senior engineers, with real ownership and real client exposure, in a fast-growing company. This role is not for you if You want to write production code all day. You're a pure project manager who needs a PRD and a Jira board to function. You're uncomfortable on the phone with non-technical executives. You need a manager to tell you what to prioritize this week. You avoid ambiguity. Location Fully remote. We're focused on candidates based in Brazil with strong daily overlap with U. S. Eastern Time. How to apply To apply, please email (not DM) the following directly to and copy : Your resume A short Loom video (5–10 minutes max, must be a Loom link) walking us through one technical or operational project you personally owned In the Loom, cover: The business problem you were solving Your specific role The technical workflow or architecture at a high level The biggest challenge you solved How you organized and managed delivery We strongly prefer candidates who can explain complex technical systems clearly, concisely, and in plain English. Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

title: Technical support engineer (analytics focused)
description:
Nova oportunidade para Technical support engineer (analytics focused) em palmas. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Company & Product Our client is a Business Intelligence platform enabling customers to connect multiple data sources (e.g., Excel, SQL) into a unified environment, build interactive dashboards, apply formulas, and customize via plugins, scripts, and embedding. The product supports both Saa S and on-prem deployments. Support is organized into 4 pods: Analytics, Dev Ex, Data, and Infra. About Role and Team: As a Technical Support Engineer you will work with leading enterprise organizations and startups to realize the power of data analytics. Our Technical Support team spans the globe and has recently begun a major transformation effort to move to a SWARM model for our tools, processes, and organizational structure. This shift focuses on driving a collaborative, rewarding environment that measures value creation and team playing. Our team is aligned directly with our Product and Engineering teams through a robust Subject Matter Expert program. Responsibilities: ● Investigate technical problems and diagnose root causes in Linux and Windows servers ● Develop, design, and propose solutions to meet the technological and business needs of customers (e.g. workarounds for product issues and additional features) ● Manage critical issues that impact customer's business ● Work with R& D and Product teams to meet customer requirements and improve our product ● Present complex technical information about the product to the customers ● Take part in the creation and maintenance of our knowledge-based and community ● Work with Linux shell, Rest API, Web applications troubleshooting, application installations, identifying process improvements, debugging, comprehending technical documents Work Hours: US East business hours. Main Skills (What You've Already Accomplished... So Far): ● You already experienced with supporting complex product infrastructure and applications ● You have experience with troubleshooting web applications ● You have experience with databases such as MS SQL, My SQL, Oracle etc, SQL scripting at least at basic level ● You already worked with ETL and BI tools such as Microsoft Power BI, Talend, SSRS, Business Objects, Cognos etc OR you are able to write and understand complex formulas ● You have experience working with logs, and various monitoring tools such as Grafana, New Relic, Kibana ● You are familiar with Linux ● You have experience in communication with English-speaking customers Nice to have: ● Experience with virtualization and cloud services (AWS, v Sphere) ● Web development background and/or programming familiarity ( specifically Java Script) ● Experience with No SQL databases such as Mongo DB or Hadoop ● Experience with Rest API ● Networking knowledges

title: Senior python engineer
description:
Confira a vaga para Senior python engineer em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Company: Windsor.ai has been founded in 2017 in Zürich, , we are growing fast. We connect data from 300+ sources (Facebook Ads, Google Ads, Hub Spot, Salesforce, Tik Tok) to 30+ destinations (Looker Studio, Google Sheets, Big Query, Snowflake, and LLMs like Chat GPT and Claude). Our customers include Puma, Audi, UBS, Asics and many more. We are building a platform that makes it easy to connect any data source to any destination. There is more data being generated in the world every day, but the big problem is that the number of tools is also increasing so data must be updated in multiple systems and tools. We are solving this problem. Role: We are looking for a Senior Python Engineer to join our team, focusing on Python services, API integrations, scalability, and production reliability. Our Team: Our team has around 30 people working remotely across Europe. We're a highly technical team, and even our sales and marketing colleagues are comfortable writing at least some SQL. Our software engineers are specialised in backend with Python and frontend with React Product: We have built a data platform connecting to more than 300 different API's. Big part of our work is dealing with all the complexity and variations in all the different API's and scalability. Technology: We are mostly programming in python and using quite advanced features of python. Most common tools we use: Python : flask, threads, pytest-xdist, pylint Redis, postgres Linux, docker React, redux for frontend Role Requirements: 4+ years of programming experience. Strong expertise in Python, with experience building and maintaining complex, production-grade systems Good programming knowledge (OOP, mutable/immutable types etc.) Solid experience working in Linux-based development and production environments Enjoy working in a fast-moving organization where you can have a real impact Fluency in English is mandatory How we work: We usually plan our work in two weeks intervals but the plan is not super strict so there might be some priorities changed during the sprint. We use Taiga, Gitlab, CI/CD lots of pytest and merge request reviews. Location: Remote Windsor.ai is a global team of data engineers and analysts who strive to make data integration effortless and insights easy to extract to everyone. We help businesses of all sizes connect their marketing and sales data, automate reporting, and measure what drives the greatest impact. Requirements added by the job poster • Accept a background check • 4+ years of work experience with Python (Programming Language)

title: Consultor de investimentos ws - parceiros xp | remoto
description:
Nova oportunidade para Consultor de investimentos ws - parceiros xp | remoto em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Essa oportunidade é para consultor de investimento nas consultorias Wealth Service parceiras da rede XP, que tem a missão de ajudar o brasileiro a investir melhor. São times apaixonados por relacionamento com cliente, aprofundamento técnico sobre alocação de recursos e prospecção de novos negócios. Principais Responsabilidades Prospecção de novos clientes; Atuação na consultoria de investimentos, sendo responsável por orientar o cliente final na gestão de patrimônio; Elaboração de portfólio de investimentos em linha com o perfil e objetivo dos clientes; Análise de alocações externas e elaboração de estudos comparativos exclusivos, identificando oportunidades e apresentando de forma objetiva; Acompanhamento de tendências de mercado, se mantendo sempre informado sobre atualidades do cenário econômico e acontecimentos relevantes. Informações Importantes Trabalho remoto em diversas praças do país Pré-Requisito Perfil comercial e fortes habilidades de comunicação; Alto nível de intensidade e disciplina; Conhecimento sobre cenário econômico atual; Experiência prévia em instituições financeiras; Certificação CEA, CFP, CFA, CGA, C-PRO R, C-PRO I ou CPA-20 (aceitável com prova agendada) Você pode ter destaque se: Possuir carteira de clientes para prospecção; Ter base de clientes já estabelecida é um grande diferencial; Conhecimentos sobre produtos financeiros; Noções básicas de macroeconomia e atualidades.

title: Full stack developer specialist – node.js / typescript
description:
Nova oportunidade para Full stack developer specialist – node.js / typescript em rio branco. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Here at Zallpy, technology is born from curious, collaborative people with a desire to do things well. If you like environments where there's room to ask questions, test, learn, and evolve together, check out this opportunity! Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion At Zallpy, we value an environment where everyone can be themselves, with respect, safety, and a sense of belonging. We especially encourage applications from people with disabilities and guarantee an accessible environment with adaptations and support throughout the journey. We also encourage Black people, women, LGBTQIA+ individuals, and professionals from diverse backgrounds to apply. Here, you can be yourself at every stage of your journey. Come join us. We are looking for someone to work in a team that thinks big, works with attention to detail, collaborates daily, and shares responsibility. We believe in autonomy, the exchange of different experiences, and solutions built together. Here, growth means sharing knowledge, respecting different ways of thinking, and building trusting relationships while delivering quality technology. If you identify with this way of working, come join us. What you will do: Develop technical solutions that meet the requirements presented using the technologies involved in the project; Work within agile team structures based on Agile methodologies, with intense information exchange; Participate in ceremonies for defining the product backlog for Sprints, as well as Dailies, Reviews, and Retrospectives; Keep task boards updated regarding pending tasks, ongoing activities, and possible blockers; Use the company's communication tools to stay updated on schedules, alignments, and team discussions; Deliver code covered by unit and integration tests; Submit Pull Requests for team review. What we are looking for: Bachelor's degree in Technology or related fields (ongoing or completed); Experience with version control management using Git and Git Flow; Experience with Docker; Experience in WEB application development using React.js; Experience with front-end componentization; Experience with component styling using styled-components; Experience with unit and integration testing on both front-end and back-end using Jest; Experience in application development using Node.js / Type Script; Experience processing large volumes of transactional data; Experience developing applications with high data volume and asynchronous processing; Experience developing REST API applications; Experience developing applications using Graph QL; Experience developing applications using Mongo DB; Experience developing applications using Postgre SQL; Experience with ETL processes; Experience creating and maintaining CI/CD pipelines; Experience with container orchestration using Kubernetes. Nice to have: Experience working with basic Cloud services (EC2, S3, RDS); Advanced knowledge of Design Patterns, including SOLID, Clean Code, etc.; Experience creating and managing Cloud Services (AWS, Azure); Experience with Infrastructure as Code (Ia C) using Terraform, Consul, AWS, Azure, or similar technologies; Previous experience as a Tech Lead or Software Architect; Experience with database migration between Mongo DB and Postgre SQL. Where you will work: This is a 100% remote position. Hiring models: CLT Cooperative Benefits of being a Zallper: Meal/Food Allowance Caju multi-benefit card (credit format), offering flexibility for everyday needs. (CLT only) * Health Plan – Unimed No waiting period or copayment for the holder. Possibility to include dependents (children, spouse, or stepchildren) with copayment. (CLT only) * Dental Plan – Uniodonto Affordable options to include dependents. (CLT only) * Wellhub Access to gyms, physical activities, and wellness programs. Zenklub For CLT: Two free sessions per month and special rates for additional sessions. For Cooperative/Contractor: Special rates for sessions. Life Insurance More security for you and your family. (CLT only) * Childcare Allowance Financial support for Zallpers with children from 4 months to 6 years old, according to internal policy. (CLT only) * Baby Zallpy A special gift to celebrate the arrival of new Zallpy babies. Business Partner Support Close and human-centered support from our People & Culture team throughout your journey at Zallpy. Volunteer Internal Communities Diversity, Sports & Movement, and Technology. Educational Partnerships Discounts on undergraduate and graduate programs, professional courses, and language schools. Experiences & Development Participation in events, workshops, trips, and team-building activities. Referral Program Refer talents to Zallpy and receive bonuses from R$2,500 to R$5,000. * Contractor / PJ: For these hiring models, the benefits above apply except for those marked with an asterisk (*), which are exclusive to CLT. In addition, we offer dedicated platforms to manage contractors, ensuring organization, transparency, and a structured experience throughout the entire journey.

title: Senior golang engineer
description:
Nova oportunidade para Senior golang engineer em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

We are hiring on behalf of our client, a global leader in the meal kit delivery industry that helps millions of customers cook healthy, homemade meals without the stress of meal planning or grocery shopping. As part of Zoolatech's distributed engineering team, you will join the Market Innovation team - a fast-moving internal innovation group focused on building and delivering new product initiatives across multiple domains and services. Unlike traditional product teams, this team operates across different repositories, architectures, and backend ecosystems, taking ownership of complex discovery-driven projects from investigation to MVP delivery. By joining Zoolatech, you will work closely with senior engineering leadership and global stakeholders in a highly autonomous environment that values ownership, adaptability, strong communication, and engineering curiosity. Responsibilities Investigate and understand existing backend services and distributed systems Design and implement backend solutions primarily using Golang Work on MVP delivery from technical discovery through implementation Collaborate with engineers and stakeholders across multiple domains and teams Communicate technical findings and proposed solutions clearly Adapt quickly to new codebases, services, and technologies Contribute to scalable and maintainable backend architecture Skills Required Strong commercial experience with Golang Strong background in backend development, microservices, and distributed systems Experience building event-driven architectures using messaging technologies such as Kafka, Rabbit MQ, or AWS SQS/SNS Solid understanding of testing practices, including unit and end-to-end testing Strong knowledge of relational databases Ability to quickly understand and navigate unfamiliar codebases and services Strong problem-solving and backend investigation skills Good communication skills and ability to work independently English level sufficient for direct communication with international teams Nice to Have Experience with Python Familiarity with Mongo DB, Elasticsearch, Graph QL, or JVM languages Experience working in fast-paced MVP or startup-like environments Engagement Model: Direct Independent Contractor (Please read carefully) This is an independent contractor opportunity based on a direct contractual relationship between Zoolatech and the individual service provider. To facilitate this direct partnership, we engage with professionals who are registered and operate as a sole proprietorship, private entrepreneur, or an equivalent self-employment status in your country. Please note, our model does not accommodate contracts through third-party intermediaries such as agencies, incubators, or umbrella companies. The essential requirement is your ability to enter into a service agreement and invoice Zoolatech directly. This is not an offer of direct employment Please note that only candidates whose profiles closely match our requirements will be contacted.

title: Engenheiro de dados pleno
description:
Empresa está contratando Engenheiro de dados pleno em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Sobre a Data EX: Com 12 anos de atuação no mercado, a Data EX é uma consultoria especializada em Dados e IA, com parcerias estratégicas com Microsoft, AWS e Databricks, atuando em projetos de alto impacto para grandes clientes. Valorizamos a inovação, a colaboração, o desenvolvimento contínuo e a qualidade de vida, com incentivos para certificações e bem-estar. Contexto do Projeto: Estamos coletando perfis com foco em Engenharia de Dados em ambientes Azure/Fabric para atuação em projetos rotativos de Delivery. Perfil técnico esperado: Experiência comprovada em linguagens de programação como Python e Py Spark. Forte conhecimento de SQL e bancos de dados relacionais e não relacionais. Experiência com ferramentas de ETL e frameworks de Big Data (Microsoft Fabric, Spark e Databricks). Conhecimento de serviços em nuvem (Azure). Conhecimentos em Performance de queries SQL. Diferenciais: Certificações: Azure Data Fundamental (AZ900), Azure Data Engineer Associate (DP203), Fabric Analytics Engineer Associate (DP-600) e/ou Fabric Data Engineer Associate (DP-700) Inglês intermediário - avançado Escopo de Atuação: Desenvolver e manter pipelines de dados complexos e eficientes, de uma gama de origens estruturadas e não estruturadas, em Streaming ou Batches. Projetar, implementar e otimizar lakehouses, bancos de dados e data warehouses. Trabalhar em migrações de sistemas legados para sistemas modernos. Trabalhar com grandes volumes de dados e garantir sua disponibilidade e performance. Realizar assessment de ambientes analíticos. Colaborar com cientistas e analistas de dados para entender e suportar necessidades de dados. Monitorar e resolver problemas de desempenho e qualidade dos dados.

title: Desenvolvedor salesforce sênior | front-end
description:
Empresa está contratando Desenvolvedor salesforce sênior | front-end em manaus. Confira requisitos e envie seu currículo.

Se você busca novos desafios e deseja atuar em um ambiente dinâmico, colaborativo e inovador, essa oportunidade é para você! Estamos em busca de um Desenvolvedor Salesforce apaixonado por tecnologia e soluções de CRM, que queira contribuir com seu conhecimento e crescer junto com a nossa equipe. Objetivo do Cargo: Atuar no desenvolvimento, manutenção e evolução de soluções na plataforma Salesforce, garantindo qualidade, segurança e aderência às necessidades do negócio. O profissional será responsável por ter conhecimento sólido nas funcionalidades nativas, preocupação com UX, governança e escalabilidade da solução, visão funcional das integrações, entendendo contratos, regras e impactos entre sistemas, atuando com autonomia compatível ao nível pleno. O que você vai fazer no dia a dia? Desenvolver e customizar aplicações na plataforma Salesforce (Apex, Visualforce, Lightning) Realizar integrações entre Salesforce e outros sistemas (APIs REST/SOAP, middleware), com suporte quando necessário Elaborar e manter documentação técnica e funcional dos projetos Propor melhorias e automações nos processos de negócio (Flow) Garantir a qualidade do código e aderência às melhores práticas (Code Review, padrões e guidelines) Participar de reuniões técnicas e de levantamento de requisitos Realizar testes unitários e funcionais das soluções desenvolvidas Apoiar a identificação e correção de incidentes, escalonando quando necessário Contribuir para o cumprimento de SLAs e boas práticas de desenvolvimento O que esperamos de você? Conhecimentos técnicos obrigatórios: Experiência prática: Mínimo de 3 anos atuando exclusivamente como Desenvolvedor Salesforce. Integração & APIs: Vivência com APIs REST/SOAP e consumo de serviços externos, considerando autenticação (OAuth) e tratamento de erros. Engenharia de Software: Aplicação de princípios de Clean Code, noções de SOLID e testes unitários (TDD é desejável). Dados: Conhecimento de SOQL/SOSL e modelagem de dados em Salesforce. Automação de Processos: Conhecimento em Flow. Dev Ops & CI/CD: Vivência com SFDX (Salesforce CLI) e uso de repositórios Git; contato com pipelines (Azure Dev Ops/Git Hub Actions/Flosum) é desejável. Metodologias Ágeis: Vivência em ambientes Scrum, Kanban ou SAFe. Inglês Técnico: Capacidade de leitura de documentação e acompanhamento de referências técnicas. Front-end/usabilidade: UX/UI dentro do Salesforce; Customização de páginas Lightning; Design de jornadas e experiência do usuário; Componentização e responsividade; Experiência com LWC, Aura e estrutura visual da Lightning Experience; Construção de interfaces voltadas para usabilidade e produtividade operacional. Conhecimentos técnicos desejáveis: Formação Acadêmica: Superior em TI, Engenharia de Software ou áreas correlatas. Certificações Salesforce: Platform Developer I (desejável) e/ou App Builder. Setor Regulado: Vivência em ambientes de Seguros, Previdência ou Setor Financeiro. Cloud Híbrida: Familiaridade com serviços da Azure (Functions, App Services) integrados ao Salesforce. Gestão de Identidade e Acesso: Vivência na configuração de perfis, permission sets e compartilhamento, garantindo segurança e aderência às regras de acesso. Diferenciais que podem te destacar: Ensino superior em Administração, Engenharia de sistemas ou Tecnologia da Informação; Certificação Salesforce Certified Experience Cloud Consultant; Experiência com Salesforce e Salesforce Marketing Cloud; Experiência com metodologias ágeis (Scrum, Lean, Kanban, SAFe etc.); Experiência com indicadores de CRM; Experiência com modelo arquitetural REST/SOAP; Inglês intermediário; Experiência com o mercado Segurador, Previdenciário e/ou Financeiro. Habilidades comportamentais que valorizamos: Trabalho em equipe e colaboração; Comprometimento e engajamento; Comunicação eficaz e organização; Disciplina e foco; Raciocínio lógico e resolução de problemas; Proatividade e aprendizado contínuo. Por que se juntar ao nosso time? Ambiente dinâmico, inclusivo e inovador; Oportunidade de aprendizado e desenvolvimento profissional; Cultura de colaboração e crescimento conjunto; Projetos desafiadores com tecnologias de ponta. Modelo de contratação: PJ Jornada: 168 horas/mês Se identificou com essa oportunidade? Então, não perca tempo! Envie seu currículo e venha construir sua história com a gente!

Engenharia de Software: Aplicação de princípios de Clean Code, noções de SOLID e testes unitários (TDD é desejável). Dados: Conhecimento de SOQL/SOSL e modelagem de dados em Salesforce. Automação de Processos: Conhecimento em Flow. Dev Ops & CI/CD: Vivência com SFDX (Salesforce CLI) e uso de repositórios Git; contato com pipelines (Azure Dev Ops/Git Hub Actions/Flosum) é desejável. Metodologias Ágeis: Vivência em ambientes Scrum, Kanban ou SAFe. Inglês Técnico: Capacidade de leitura de documentação e acompanhamento de referências técnicas. Front-end/usabilidade: UX/UI dentro do Salesforce; Customização de páginas Lightning; Design de jornadas e experiência do usuário; Componentização e responsividade; Experiência com LWC, Aura e estrutura visual da Lightning Experience; Construção de interfaces voltadas para usabilidade e produtividade operacional. Conhecimentos técnicos desejáveis: Formação Acadêmica: Superior em TI, Engenharia de Software ou áreas correlatas. Certificações Salesforce: Platform Developer I (desejável) e/ou App Builder. Setor Regulado: Vivência em ambientes de Seguros, Previdência ou Setor Financeiro. Cloud Híbrida: Familiaridade com serviços da Azure (Functions, App Services) integrados ao Salesforce. Gestão de Identidade e Acesso: Vivência na configuração de perfis, permission sets e compartilhamento, garantindo segurança e aderência às regras de acesso. Diferenciais que podem te destacar: Ensino superior em Administração, Engenharia de sistemas ou Tecnologia da Informação; Certificação Salesforce Certified Experience Cloud Consultant; Experiência com Salesforce e Salesforce Marketing Cloud; Experiência com metodologias ágeis (Scrum, Lean, Kanban, SAFe etc.); Experiência com indicadores de CRM; Experiência com modelo arquitetural REST/SOAP; Inglês intermediário; Experiência com o mercado Segurador, Previdenciário e/ou Financeiro. Habilidades comportamentais que valorizamos: Trabalho em equipe e colaboração; Comprometimento e engajamento; Comunicação eficaz e organização; Disciplina e foco; Raciocínio lógico e resolução de problemas; Proatividade e aprendizado contínuo. Por que se juntar ao nosso time? Ambiente dinâmico, inclusivo e inovador; Oportunidade de aprendizado e desenvolvimento profissional; Cultura de colaboração e crescimento conjunto; Projetos desafiadores com tecnologias de ponta. Modelo de contratação: PJ Jornada: 168 horas/mês Se identificou com essa oportunidade? Então, não perca tempo! Envie seu currículo e venha construir sua história com a gente!

title: Bookkeeper
description:
Confira a vaga para Bookkeeper em rio branco. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Join Aerial Core - the back office that keeps pace with your ambition Aerial Core is a modern, tech-enabled back-office partner that supports growing businesses through accounting, finance, and people operations services. We've intentionally broken the mold of traditional accounting firms by placing relationships, collaboration, and innovation at the center of how we work. At Aerial Core, we believe accounting should be more than compliance, it should be strategic, insightful, and human-driven. Our people-first culture values trust, independence, and efficiency, empowering every team member to do their best work while helping clients thrive. We're now looking for a tech-savvy, detail-oriented Bookkeeper to join our remote team. Please be informed that this is a contractor position and we will require your CNPJ, this is the perfect opportunity for professionals who value autonomy, flexibility and performance based rewards. You'll work directly with clients, manage their day-to-day financial operations, and leverage technology to deliver accurate, timely, and strategic bookkeeping support. What You'll Do Handle full-cycle bookkeeping for assigned clients, including AP/AR, bank reconciliations, and month-end close. Maintain accurate financial data using Quick Books or other cloud-based accounting tools. Prepare clear, insightful financial reports that help clients make better decisions. Communicate with clients and team members through Slack, Zoom, and Google Workspace. Use Asana and Everhour to track projects, deliverables, and timelines. Proactively identify ways to improve processes, automate tasks, and increase efficiency. Prepare necessary documentation and reports for internal and external audit processes. Ensure compliance with accounting standards and Aerial Core's quality expectations. What We're Looking For Fluent in English Proven experience in bookkeeping or accounting Flexibility around working hours, with the understanding that some tasks may require availability during US business hours (mainly Pacific Time) Strong attention to detail, organization, and accuracy Excellent communication skills and ability to manage multiple clients independently Comfortable working in a fast-paced, remote-first environment using digital tools. Nice to Have Experience with Asana and Everhour or any other workflow automation tools Familiarity with CRMs or project management systems such as Asana Prior experience working with startups or small businesses Why You'll Love Working With Us At Aerial Core, we do things differently: Trust and Independence: You are your own boss. We trust your expertise and give you the freedom to manage your time and workload. Efficiency and Innovation: We embrace technology and encourage experimentation. If you find a better way to work, we'll support it. Collaboration and Growth: We win as a team. Our culture is built on helping each other, learning together, and celebrating shared success. Performance-Driven Rewards: Your efforts directly impact your earnings. You'll receive a retainer contract of R$3,300 with the option to qualify for more contracts. Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere, anytime as long as deadlines are met and excellence is maintained. The Aerial Core Way Relationships over Transactions: We build lasting relationships by deeply understanding our clients and delivering real value. Strategic Thinking & Judgment: We go beyond the surface, identifying root causes and providing actionable insights. Open Communication: We value transparency and see mistakes as opportunities for growth. Excellence & Accountability: We aim for 10/10 work — delivered early, reviewed thoroughly, and executed with care. Ready to do accounting differently? Join a modern, digital-first team where your independence, innovation, and impact truly matter.

title: Especialista em plan. controle e manutenção i
description:
Confira a vaga para Especialista em plan. controle e manutenção i em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

A Aegea Criada em 2010, a Aegea é líder no setor privado de saneamento básico no Brasil. Em cada município onde atua, leva mais saúde e qualidade de vida para a população, respeitando sempre o meio ambiente e a cultura local. Responsabilidades e atribuições: Elaborar planos de manutenção preventiva e preditiva Definir periodicidade das inspeções e serviços Programar paradas de equipamentos Monitorar a execução das ordens de serviço Acompanhar indicadores de desempenho (KPIs), como MTBF e MTTR Garantir que os prazos sejam cumpridos Criar, organizar e priorizar ordens de manutenção Distribuir tarefas para a equipe técnica Registrar histórico de intervenções Controlar peças de reposição e materiais Evitar falta ou excesso de estoque Solicitar compras quando necessário Identificar falhas recorrentes Propor melhorias nos processos de manutenção Requisitos e qualificações: Ensino superior completo em Engenharia (Mecânica, Elétrica, Produção, Automação) e/ou áreas correlatas; CNH | categoria B; Conhecimentos em manutenção: Preventiva, Corretiva, Preditiva, Leitura e interpretação de manuais técnicos Noções de confiabilidade e disponibilidade de equipamentos Conhecimento de indicadores de manutenção: MTBF (Tempo Médio Entre Falhas) MTTR (Tempo Médio de Reparo) Gestão de backlog de manutenção Informações adicionais: Assistência médica; Assistência odontológica; Zenklub (atendimento direcionado à saúde mental e nutricional); Serviço de assistência gratuito (social, jurídico e financeiro); Seguro de vida; Vale transporte; Gympass(Wellhub); Vale alimentação e/ou refeição; Participação nos Lucros e Resultados;

description:

title: Senior it technical recruiter – latam based
description:
Confira a vaga para Senior it technical recruiter – latam based em palmas. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Aptonet Inc. is seeking experienced Senior IT Technical Recruiters to join our world-class recruiting team. This role is based in Latin America (LATAM) and will focus on sourcing, screening, and placing top technical talent. You will recruit LATAM-based candidates for U. S.-based companies and also support U. S.-based recruiting efforts for our U. S. clients. Our recruiting team builds the foundation of our clients' success by connecting them with extraordinary talent who share our vision and values. What We Look For 3-5+ years of full-cycle recruiting experience, ideally in an agency setting or a high-growth tech environment. Proven experience recruiting for diverse Information Technology roles. Understanding of technology trends and a passion for working with technical professionals. Strong ability to multi-task, manage multiple roles, and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment. Excellent communication skills – both written and verbal – in English; Spanish and/or Portuguese is a plus. High level of professionalism, integrity, and customer service focus. Proficiency with tools such as Microsoft Word, Excel, Outlook, and modern ATS systems. What You'll Be Doing Manage the end-to-end recruitment process, including sourcing, screening, interviews, feedback, offers, and onboarding. Build strong pipelines of both LATAM and U. S.-based technical candidates using creative sourcing strategies. Leverage a variety of sourcing tools, including internet research, Boolean search strings, Linked In, ATS mining, and cold calling. Evaluate applicants by comparing qualifications to job requirements and conducting initial screening interviews. Post job advertisements across relevant platforms such as Linked In, Dice, Career Builder, and niche tech sites. Partner closely with hiring managers and internal teams to understand role requirements and deliver top candidates quickly. Maintain data accuracy in the ATS and track recruiting metrics for reporting and continuous improvement. Develop scalable recruiting processes to support the growth of our recruiting operations in LATAM and the U. S. Act as a trusted representative of Aptonet, promoting our values and delivering a high-quality experience to both candidates and clients.

title: Engenheiro de informática
description:
Nova oportunidade para Engenheiro de informática em rio branco. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Cargo: Engenheiro de Informática Visão geral: Estamos procurando um engenheiro LIMS qualificado com sólida experiência em desenvolvimento de software de informática laboratorial em ambientes regulamentados, particularmente nos setores de ciências da vida, alimentos e petróleo e gás. Responsabilidades: · Desenvolvimento de LIMS: Traduzir os requisitos de negócios em projetos abrangentes para implementações de LIMS. · Personalização do LIMS: Desenvolver e configurar código personalizado utilizando linguagens como Java, Python e LIMS Basic. · Criação de interface: Fazer uso de APIs para construir interfaces REST/SOAP para integrações de sistemas. · Relatórios: Projetar e gerar relatórios Jasper (ou Crystal) para análises e visualização de dados. · Conectividade com instrumento: Garantir o fluxo de dados contínuo entre o LIMS e a instrumentação científica. · Conformidade Gx P: Apoiar iniciativas técnicas de LIMS em alinhamento com os padrões Gx P. · Colaboração: Trabalhar de perto com os usuários de negócios do cliente, principais partes interessadas e fornecedores para impulsionar o sucesso do projeto. · Documentação e Treinamento: Criar e manter documentação técnica e materiais de treinamento para usuários do LIMS. Qualificações: · Bacharel em Ciência da Computação, Sistemas de Informação, Biotecnologia ou áreas afins em ciência ou engenharia. · Mínimo de 1 ano de experiência em uma função de desenvolvimento LIMS. · Experiência prévia com configuração de plataformas LIMS como Lab Ware, Lab Vantage, Sample Manager, etc.

title: Atlassian consultant | customer facing technical expert
description:
Confira a vaga para Atlassian consultant | customer facing technical expert em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Company Description At Atlas Bench, we specialize in transforming teamwork through tailored solutions for Atlassian products. Our global team of experts in Dev Ops, ITSM, and agile methodologies delivers innovative services, including AI-driven integrations, managed licensing, and consulting. Trusted by over 1,000 clients, including Fortune 500 companies, we provide comprehensive support, from Jira and Confluence training to Asset Management in JSM. Join us in reshaping the future of collaboration and technology-enabled teamwork. Role Description This is a full-time hybrid role for an Atlassian Customer Facing Technical Expert, based in the Greater São Paulo Area with some flexibility for remote work. In this role, you will be responsible for delivering exceptional customer support, ensuring customer satisfaction, and resolving technical inquiries related to Atlassian products. You will also assist with analyzing client challenges, recommending tailored solutions, and providing training on Atlassian tools and best practices. Qualifications Strong Customer Support and Customer Satisfaction skills, with a focus on delivering excellent service and building client relationships Effective Communication and Interpersonal skills for working with diverse stakeholders Analytical Skills to assess client needs, troubleshoot issues, and recommend solutions Experience with Atlassian tools (such as Jira, Confluence, and JSM) and a deep understanding of their applications Ability to work collaboratively in a hybrid environment, balancing onsite and remote work Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field is preferred Prior experience in a customer-facing technical role and fluency in Portuguese and English are highly beneficial

title: Oracle pcm architect
description:
Confira a vaga para Oracle pcm architect em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

About Auxis Auxis is a U. S.-founded consulting and business outsourcing firm (est. 1997) that helps organizations optimize and transform their operations. We specialize in areas such as technology, finance, human resources, automation, and digital transformation. About the Role We are looking for an experienced Oracle PCM Architect to lead the design, implementation, and optimization of profitability and cost management solutions within the Oracle EPM Cloud ecosystem. This role requires a strong mix of functional finance knowledge + technical EPM expertise, with ownership over solution architecture and client-facing delivery. Key Responsibilities Lead end-to-end solution design and architecture for Oracle PCM implementations Define cost allocation models, driver-based costing, and profitability frameworks Work closely with finance stakeholders to translate business requirements into scalable solutions Oversee data integrations, calculations, and model performance optimization Ensure best practices in metadata design, hierarchies, and dimensional modeling Support and guide teams during month-end and planning cycles Troubleshoot complex issues across data, calculations, and reporting Act as a technical leader and mentor for junior team members Required Qualifications Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Information Systems, or related field 5+ years of experience with Oracle EPM, including strong exposure to PCM Strong understanding of: Cost allocation methodologies Profitability analysis frameworks Financial modeling and reporting Hands-on experience with: Oracle PCMCS / EPCM Smart View Data Integration / Data Management Metadata and hierarchy design Preferred Qualifications Experience in consulting or managed services environments Exposure to multi-client / multi-project delivery Oracle EPM certifications (nice to have) Soft Skills Strong problem-solving and analytical mindset Ability to communicate with both technical and finance stakeholders Comfortable working in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment Work Expectations Support North American business hours when required Flexibility during planning and financial cycles Ownership of delivery quality and SLAs

About the Role We are looking for an experienced Oracle PCM Architect to lead the design, implementation, and optimization of profitability and cost management solutions within the Oracle EPM Cloud ecosystem. This role requires a strong mix of functional finance knowledge + technical EPM expertise, with ownership over solution architecture and client-facing delivery. Key Responsibilities Lead end-to-end solution design and architecture for Oracle PCM implementations Define cost allocation models, driver-based costing, and profitability frameworks Work closely with finance stakeholders to translate business requirements into scalable solutions Oversee data integrations, calculations, and model performance optimization Ensure best practices in metadata design, hierarchies, and dimensional modeling Support and guide teams during month-end and planning cycles Troubleshoot complex issues across data, calculations, and reporting Act as a technical leader and mentor for junior team members Required Qualifications Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Information Systems, or related field 5+ years of experience with Oracle EPM, including strong exposure to PCM Strong understanding of: Cost allocation methodologies Profitability analysis frameworks Financial modeling and reporting Hands-on experience with: Oracle PCMCS / EPCM Smart View Data Integration / Data Management Metadata and hierarchy design Preferred Qualifications Experience in consulting or managed services environments Exposure to multi-client / multi-project delivery Oracle EPM certifications (nice to have) Soft Skills Strong problem-solving and analytical mindset Ability to communicate with both technical and finance stakeholders Comfortable working in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment Work Expectations Support North American business hours when required Flexibility during planning and financial cycles Ownership of delivery quality and SLAs

title: Gerente de relacionamento
description:
Confira a vaga para Gerente de relacionamento em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Responsabilidades e atribuições O que é o time de Principal? Prestam assessoria aos clientes de alta renda, por meio de relacionamento de excelência, identificando as necessidades financeiras e oportunidades de novos negócios, valorizando a centralidade do cliente e a principalidade ao maximizar o resultado/rentabilidade com competência, responsabilidade e ética. Como será seu dia a dia? Sendo Gerente Relacionamento Principal I, atuará na gerência Principal e suas principais atividades serão: · Atender e fidelizar clientes com excelência, oferecendo uma experiência personalizada e humanizada; · Gerenciar carteira de clientes com foco em relacionamento, rentabilização e retenção; · Identificar oportunidades de negócios e oferecer soluções financeiras completas, incluindo investimentos, crédito e seguros; · Atuar de forma estratégica para atrair recursos da concorrência; · Resolver conflitos e reclamações com empatia, agilidade e foco na satisfação do cliente; · Acompanhar metas e indicadores de desempenho, garantindo entregas consistentes; · Trabalhar em equipe com advisor de investimentos e gerente assistente, promovendo sinergia no atendimento; · Representar o segmento Principal com postura consultiva, sofisticação e profundo conhecimento técnico. Requisitos e Qualificações O que você precisa ter ou saber? · Formação superior completa; · Obrigatório: CEA ativa; · Excel e Power Point em nível intermediário a avançado; · Vivência com atendimento a clientes de alta renda; · Experiência na gestão de carteira e atuação consultiva; · Forte habilidade comercial; · Conhecimento sólido do mercado financeiro e produtos de investimentos; · Comunicação clara e postura consultiva no atendimento e Ética profissional e inteligência emocional para lidar com diferentes perfis de clientes e pares. Será um diferencial se você tiver: · Inglês fluente (para leitura de documentos e eventuais interações com clientes ou materiais internos).

title: Risk management officer
description:
Nova oportunidade para Risk management officer em boa vista. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

About Us Established in March 2018, Bybit is one of the fastest growing cryptocurrency derivatives exchanges, with more than 70 million registered users. We offer a professional platform where crypto traders can find an ultra-fast matching engine, excellent customer service and multilingual community support. We provide innovative online spot and derivatives trading services, mining and staking products, as well as API support, to retail and institutional clients around the world, and strive to be the most reliable exchange for the emerging digital asset class. Our core values define us. We listen, care, and improve to create a faster, fairer, and more humane trading environment for our users. Our innovative, highly advanced, user-friendly platform has been designed from the ground-up using best-in-class infrastructure to provide our users with the industry's safest, fastest, fairest, and most transparent trading experience. Built on customer-centric values, we endeavour to provide a professional, 24/7 multi-language customer support to help in a timely manner. As of today, Bybit is one of the most trusted, reliable, and transparent cryptocurrency derivatives platforms in the space. Key Responsibilities: Implement and maintain a comprehensive risk management framework, covering credit, market, liquidity, operational, and technology risks. Conduct prudential and capital risk assessments, including stress testing, scenario analysis, and capital adequacy evaluations. Prepare and support regulatory disclosures required for virtual asset service providers (VASPs) and financial institutions. Oversee Margin-Account Operations, including; Development of policies governing margin lending and virtual asset collateral Setting and reviewing maximum loan-to-value (LTV) ratios and haircut levels Monitoring collateral valuation, capital add-ons and counterparty exposures Ensuring compliance with client/institutional limits and capital requirements Net-worth monitoring; Review and monitor risk indicators across business functions, escalating material breaches or deviations to senior management and the Board. Maintain independence from commercial and trading lines while ensuring collaboration with Compliance, Finance, and Operations. Liaise with internal and external auditors, regulators, and governance committees on risk management and capital matters. Support a risk-aware culture through training, communication, and continuous improvement of risk methodologies. Deep practical knowledge in CMN Res. 4557/17 regarding the risk management structure, the financial structure and the information disclosure policy management. Requirements: Legally resident in Brazil. Senior-level experience (minimum 7 years) in financial or prudential risk management, preferably within financial institutions, fintechs, or crypto/virtual asset firms. Demonstrated independence from commercial functions and ability to operate as a second-line or independent control function. Strong knowledge of Central Bank of Brazil risk management regulations, capital adequacy standards, and VASP disclosure requirements. Expertise in market and liquidity risk frameworks, stress testing, and margin-account operations involving virtual assets. Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, Risk Management, or related field; postgraduate qualification preferred. Strong quantitative, analytical, and communication skills; fluency in Portuguese and English. Must meet fit and proper standards with no disqualifying factors, including: not to have been declared bankrupt or insolvent; unblemished reputation; knowledge of the line of business, the services to be provided and the crypto segment, as well as crypto market dynamics and the risks associated with those activities; technical capability, compatible with the functions to be exercised. not having been previously rejected or investigated by the Central Bank of Brazil within the past three years for submitting false, omitted, or inconsistent information in any authorization request

title: Psiquiatra
description:
Confira a vaga para Psiquiatra em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

VAGA PARA MÉDICO PSIQUIATRA — ATENDIMENTO ONLINEA Dr Psiq está em expansão e busca médicos(as) psiquiatras comprometidos(as), éticos(as) e responsáveis para atuação em telemedicina, realizando atendimentos psiquiátricos por vídeo em nossa plataforma digital. Buscamos profissionais que compreendam que a psiquiatria vai além da capacidade técnica: valorizamos médicos humanizados, pontuais, comprometidos com seus pacientes e responsáveis com os horários e agendas disponibilizados. Principais atividades Realização de consultas psiquiátricas por vídeo; Avaliação diagnóstica e acompanhamento terapêutico; Elaboração de planos terapêuticos individualizados; Atendimento de adolescentes, adultos e idosos; Evolução em prontuário eletrônico; Emissão e assinatura digital de documentos médicos; Participação no cuidado contínuo e promoção da saúde mental dos pacientes. Requisitos obrigatóriosGraduação em Medicina; CRM ativo e regular; Formação em Psiquiatria através de: Residência Médica com RQE ativo; ou Pós-graduação em Psiquiatria reconhecida; Experiência em atendimento psiquiátrico; Boa comunicação e postura ética; Comprometimento com agendas e horários disponibilizados para atendimento; Possuir certificado digital válido (e-CPF ou equivalente) para inserção na plataforma e assinatura eletrônica de documentos médicos. Documentação obrigatóriaO profissional deverá apresentar: Currículo atualizado; Documento de identificação profissional; CRM ativo; Certidão de regularidade do Conselho Regional de Medicina; Comprovante de quitação da anuidade do CRM; Certidão ético-profissional emitida pelo CRM; Documentação comprobatória da especialização em Psiquiatria; RQE (quando aplicável); Certificado digital válido para utilização na plataforma. Processo seletivoApós análise curricular e documental, o profissional passará por entrevista de habilitação junto à equipe da clínica para avaliação do perfil profissional, disponibilidade e alinhamento com o modelo de atendimento da instituição. Toda a documentação deverá ser encaminhada para o e-mail: Após o envio da documentação, o candidato deverá entrar em contato com o suporte da clínica através do Whats App: informando o interesse na vaga para que seja direcionado(a) ao setor responsável pelo processo de habilitação profissional. Diferenciais Experiência em psiquiatria da infância e adolescência; Conhecimentos em psicofarmacologia e neurociência; Formação complementar em psicoterapia; Fluência em outros idiomas; Disponibilidade para educação continuada. Modelo de atuaçãoAtendimento 100% online; Plataforma própria de teleconsulta fornecida pela clínica; Flexibilidade de agenda; Remuneração por percentual das consultas realizadas; Parte do valor da consulta destinada à clínica e parte repassada ao profissional. A clínica prioriza profissionais organizados e comprometidos com o funcionamento operacional dos atendimentos. Por isso, é indispensável que o médico: Mantenha disponibilidade regular no Whats App para comunicação com a equipe da clínica; Acompanhe frequentemente a plataforma e o site para verificar consultas agendadas; Responda aos chamados administrativos e assistenciais dentro de prazo razoável; Cumpra impreterivelmente os horários e agendas disponibilizados para atendimento. O que esperamos do profissionalMais do que títulos e currículo, buscamos médicos comprometidos com: Responsabilidade profissional; Pontualidade e organização; Cumprimento rigoroso das agendas; Respeito aos pacientes; Ética e humanização no atendimento; Continuidade e qualidade assistencial.

title: Paid ads qa auditor - global
description:
Confira a vaga para Paid ads qa auditor - global em manaus. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Are you obsessive about catching what others miss? Do you notice inconsistencies without being told where to look? Do you get satisfaction from identifying errors before they become problems? Final question: when faced with a challenge, do you get excited or run away? If that sounds like you, you may be the perfect fit for our Paid Ads QA role. At Crisp, we're on a mission to help 10,000 law firms each grow their revenue by $10,000,000 over the next 10 years, creating a $10 billion impact in the legal industry. Our Paid Ads team is responsible for executing paid media campaigns that power our law firm clients' brand awareness and growth across major digital platforms. These campaigns are deployed across hundreds of client accounts and multiple platforms simultaneously. This role exists to ensure those campaigns are executed accurately, consistently, and in alignment with internal standards and client intent. This is a non-client-facing, audit-focused role that requires extreme attention to detail, strong system thinking, and the discipline to identify and document discrepancies with zero tolerance for preventable error. However, it is not a "task-ing" role, or a role where you'll be constantly told what to do - you'll be expected to self-sufficiently spot and correct errors, but most importantly, get ahead of them before even happening, including improving existing systems. ** IMPORTANT: TO APPLY ** You will be evaluated and vetted based on your ability to follow instructions: Follow this Willo link (recorded interview platform), and answer the few questions on there, first. Then reply to the ad, stating you've completed the Willo, and we will be in touch. Key Responsibilities Include: Campaign Audit & Validation Audit paid advertising campaigns across Meta, Google Ads, Linked In, Tik Tok, streaming platforms, and others Verify that the correct creative assets, ad copy, and campaign structures are deployed on the correct client accounts Ensure campaigns align with intended funnel stages and approved execution parameters Execution Accuracy & Cross-Account Integrity Identify discrepancies such as: Incorrect assets deployed to the wrong client Mismatched ad copy or campaign configurations Inconsistent implementation across platforms Ensure campaign execution matches internal direction and client-specific setup Budget & Pacing Verification Audit campaign budgets to ensure alignment with approved allocations Identify risks of underdelivery or overspend Validate that budget adjustments and reallocations are executed correctly Tracking, Links & Technical QA Verify accuracy and functionality of: URLs and landing pages UTM parameters and tracking links Pixel and tag implementation (where applicable) Identify gaps in tracking integrity and flag inconsistencies Instruction Fidelity & Change Validation Compare campaign execution against: Internal strategy direction Client Success Manager requests Campaign updates or pivots Ensure requested changes are implemented accurately and completely Audit Documentation & Communication Document audit findings clearly, with supporting context and evidence Categorize issues based on severity (e.g., minor discrepancy vs. critical error) Communicate findings in a structured format that enables efficient resolution Audit Operations (Evolving Scope) This role may operate across a range of audit models depending on business needs, including: Audit Cadence: Pre-launch validation Post-launch verification Ongoing daily, weekly, or periodic audits Audit Coverage: Full account audits Targeted sampling across accounts Audit Depth: Surface-level validation (assets, placements, links) Deeper audits (budget pacing, tracking, structural accuracy) Ownership Scope: Identifying and flagging discrepancies Recommending corrective actions Supporting enforcement of quality standards Our requirements are pretty straightforward. To qualify you must: Be highly detail-oriented — you catch inconsistencies others miss Think in structured processes, checklists, and systems Be proactive in identifying issues and asking clarifying questions Be comfortable operating with incomplete information and making sound judgments Have strong written communication skills Be tech-savvy and able to learn new platforms quickly Be comfortable working in a fast-paced, high-volume environment Preferred Experience: Experience auditing or QA-ing digital campaigns (launches, changes, tracking) Familiarity with UTM structures, tracking links, and link verification Experience working with dashboards or reporting tools Experience using project management or task tracking tools (Asana, Monday, etc.) Nice to Have: Salesforce or CRM familiarity Experience with Supermetrics or similar data connectors Familiarity with Google Looker Studio or similar dashboards Experience documenting processes or building SOPs Experience in a fast-paced, multi-client environment Platform Exposure (Preferred, Not Required): Meta Ads Manager Google Ads Google Tag Manager (GTM) Tik Tok Ads Linked In Ads Trade Desk Why Our Work Matters: Lawyers go to law school to learn how to practice law, but law school doesn't teach them how to run a business. In a world where the best cases often go to the best marketers, legal expertise alone isn't enough. That's where Crisp comes in. We partner with committed, growth-minded law firms that care deeply about their teams, clients, and communities. Often, it's a David vs. Goliath scenario, where the most dedicated attorneys lack the resources of their larger competitors. Our work levels the playing field by giving law firms access to world-class marketing execution that helps them stand out, build authority, and grow sustainably. About Crisp: Crisp has been recognized on the Inc. 5000 (Fastest Growing Private Companies in the U. S. – 2024, 2022, 2021, 2020, 2019, 2018, 2017), as well as Atlanta's Top 100 Fastest Growing Private Companies (2025, 2024, 2023, 2022, 2021, 2020, 2019, 2018, 2017, 2016) and Atlanta's Best Places to Work (2024, 2023, 2022). Crisp () is the nation's fastest-growing law firm growth company. We've helped thousands of attorneys — from solo and small firms to large practices — build their brand, differentiate themselves from competitors, attract better cases, and earn millions in new revenue. Crisp has been featured in Forbes, Inc., Avvo, ABA Journal, The Trial Lawyer, Huffington Post, and The Wall Street Journal. OUR BOOK: The Game Changing Attorney (available on Amazon and Barnes & Noble) OUR PODCAST: The Game Changing Attorney Podcast Why You Should Work Here: You will work inside a structured, high-performance marketing operation You will contribute to campaigns running at scale across hundreds of accounts You will play a direct role in improving execution accuracy and system reliability You will be trusted to identify and surface critical issues This is not a role for someone looking for easy work or vague expectations. This is a role for someone who takes pride in enforcing standards, identifying errors, and ensuring systems operate correctly. ** IMPORTANT: TO APPLY ** You will be evaluated and vetted based on your ability to follow instructions: Follow this Willo link (recorded interview platform), and answer the few questions on there, first. Then reply to the ad, stating you've completed the Willo, and we will be in touch.

title: Linux systems engineer
description:
Confira a vaga para Linux systems engineer em boa vista. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Linux Systems Engineer Embedded, Io T & Edge Infrastructure DISCIPLINE: Embedded Linux SENIORITY: Mid · Senior EXPERIENCE: 3+ years STACK FOCUS: Yocto · Web Kit 01 About the role We're looking for a Linux engineer with an investigative mindset and a solid foundation in embedded systems. Short term: take hardware from third-party signage vendors, understand what's running on it, adapt our player to run reliably on top. Longer term: build our own Yocto-based image from scratch — you'll be shaping that foundation too. 02 What you'll own Reverse engineer OS images from signage vendors — boot, drivers, app stack. Port our signage player across hardware targets (ARM, x86). Integrate OTA frameworks — SWUpdate, RAUC, A/B partition schemes. Build embedded Linux images (Yocto/OE) as we move to our own OS. Tune GPU drivers for smooth video and graphics on signage hardware. Web Kit-based rendering (WPE Web Kit, Web Kit GTK) as primary runtime. Document ndings — BSP quirks, BIOS/UEFI behavior, integration procedures. Partner with the app team on player requirements and OS constraints. 03 What you bring MUST NON-NEGOTIABLE 3+ years with embedded or edge Linux. Linux boot process — BIOS/UEFI, U-Boot/GRUB, initrd, device tree. Yocto or Buildroot. OTA / update frameworks — SWUpdate, RAUC, A/B partitions. GPU driver integration — Mesa, Intel, AMD, ARM Mali/Vivante. Reverse engineering mindset — analyze and document an unfamiliar OS image. Shell, C/C++, Git. Comfortable with real hardware, not just VMs. NICE BONUS SIGNAL Web Kit on embedded — WPE Web Kit, Web Kit GTK. Wayland / DRM-KMS display stack. Commercial signage hardware — LG web OS, Samsung Tizen, Bright Sign. Docker, CI/CD pipelines. Firmware analysis — binwalk, Ghidra. Rust or Python. Networking — bridge, vlan, iptables, m DNS. Security hardening / secure boot. 04 The kind of engineer this work asks for Thinks like an investigator. Given an unknown device, knows where to pull threads. Documents findings, not just fixes. Leaves a trail for the team. Comfortable with ambiguity. At ease with projects still taking shape. Likes making things run cleanly. On hardware they weren't designed for APPLY Process run by a specialized technical consultancy. Candidates evaluated by engineers — real conversations, real hardware.

title: Senior machine learning engineer
description:
Nova oportunidade para Senior machine learning engineer em palmas. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

We are a Silicon Valley based product company building a next‐generation AI‐native B2 B platform for hospitality. We're looking for a Senior Machine Learning Engineer who is excited about the craft of machine learning—especially the mathematical and statistical foundations behind models—and who can turn that depth into solutions that scale in real-world use. If you're someone who enjoys choosing the right model for the problem, validating it rigorously, and improving it through iteration, you'll feel at home here. This is an opportunity for an engineer who wants to grow into a future architect, help define large-scale backend systems, and become a true technical champion within the team. If you are passionate about modern backend engineering, clean architecture, and scalable distributed systems, you'll love working with us. What you'll do Design, train, and improve statistical and machine learning models for real product use cases. Apply strong fundamentals in probability, statistics, and modeling to make sound decisions on approach and evaluation. Build scalable ML solutions that can be used reliably in production environments. Develop capabilities to support agent-like experiences within our platform (e.g., intelligent workflows, tool-using behaviors, retrieval patterns, guardrails). Define and monitor meaningful model metrics, run error analysis, and iterate based on results. What we're looking for We're intentionally not treating this as a checklist. If you're strong in the fundamentals and have built real ML systems, we'd love to hear from you. You'll be successful in this role if you have: Strong knowledge across a broad range of machine learning algorithms (supervised/unsupervised methods, ensembles, linear models, tree-based methods, deep learning basics) and the judgment to choose appropriately. Solid grounding in statistics and mathematical reasoning (e.g., bias/variance tradeoffs, uncertainty, evaluation design). Experience building ML solutions in practice: data understanding, feature design, training, evaluation, and iteration. Strong Python skills and the ability to write clear, maintainable code. Familiarity with standard ML tooling (e.g., scikit-learn, Py Torch/Tensor Flow). Nice to have (not required) Experience with NLP and/or LLMs (helpful, but not a core requirement). Exposure to ML-related capabilities on AWS, such as training/inference workflows or managed ML services (e.g., Sage Maker), and working with storage/data access patterns commonly used for ML. Experience implementing or integrating vector search / embedding-based retrieval. Why Join Us You will work in a modern, AI-native engineering culture building applied machine learning systems that ship. You'll have the opportunity to design mathematically grounded models, turn them into scalable product capabilities, and help define how intelligent agents live inside our platform. This role is ideal for someone who loves ML fundamentals, enjoys solving real problems end-to-end, and wants to grow into a senior technical leader shaping our ML direction. Equal Opportunity Directful is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome candidates of all backgrounds and do not discriminate on the basis of any protected characteristic.

title: Supervisor(a) de Logísticas - Manaus
description:
Nova oportunidade para Supervisor(a) de Logísticas - Manaus em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Job type: Full-time employee Na RD Saúde , você é mais do que um supervisor: é quem garante que nossos processos fluam com excelência para levar saúde a todo o Brasil. Aqui, você tem a oportunidade de liderar operações estratégicas, impulsionar resultados e crescer em um ambiente que valoriza sua experiência. Somos líderes no mercado brasileiro de farmácias, com lojas em todo o país e mais de 60 mil pessoas apaixonadas por cuidar de gente . Trilhamos um caminho de desenvolvimento que impulsiona carreiras e transforma futuros. Juntos por uma sociedade de mais saudável impactamos mais de 1 milhão de vidas e queremos ir ainda mais longe — de forma sólida, humana e lado a lado com você. Venha fazer parte dessa jornada e trilhar um caminho que transforma carreiras e futuros. Supervisionar as equipes em todos os processos logísticos desde o recebimento a expedição de mercadorias, ou qualquer outra atividade que envolva o Centro de Distribuição, garantindo operações seguras e organizadas. Acompanhar a manutenção preventiva e corretiva da frota de caminhões e empilhadeiras elétricas. Ajustar as marcações de ponto dos colaboradores, através do sistema é analisado diariamente as divergências, se existir é tomada a decisão de abonar ou descontar o dia ou as horas envolvidas. Acompanhar todos os processos de apoio e operação, tais como: Controle de vencimento das mercadorias, endereçamento, balanceamento das linhas de separação, recall de produtos em estoque, limpeza das caixas enviada as filiais, remoção de papelões, embalagens acumuladas na linha de separação e etc. Realizar outras atividades profissionais correlatas e inerentes ao cargo exercido, conforme orientação e/ou solicitação do superior imediato. Formação acadêmica mínima: Ensino médio completo; Faixa etária: mínimo 18 anos; Disponibilidade: Imediata, trabalho por escala; Experiência: Experiencia como supervisor Trilha de Carreira: Do cargo de entrada a liderança, a maioria das nossas lideranças na RD Saúde vieram de cargos de entrada e se desenvolveram na trilha de carreira, nos CDs, nas Farmácias e também no Corporativo. Demais, né? O melhor é que essa jornada dura em média 2 anos. Salário e benefícios: Compatíveis com o mercado; São mais de 40 benefícios pensados pra você e pra sua família. Programa de Participação nos Resultados Trilha de carreira Convênio com empresas parceiras Refeitório no local Benefício farmácia e vacinação Assistência odontológica Assistência médica e telemedicina Licença maternidade e paternidade estendida Day Off de aniversário Universidade com cursos pra você e família Fundo de emergência (apoio financeiro em momentos de crise) Consultoria de planejamento e organização financeira Kit bebê para nascidos na RD Saúde Auxílio funeral Juntos por uma sociedade mais saudável Somos RD Saúde, um ecossistema de saúde integral, com mais de 3 mil unidades em todo o Brasil e negócios em saúde que dividem o mesmo propósito: contribuir para uma sociedade mais saudável. Nossa jornada começou em novembro de 2011, fruto da união entre Raia e Drogasil, crescendo até se tornar a maior rede de farmácias do Brasil e expandindo para além do varejo farmacêutico, integrando soluções B2B e plataformas digitais. Com mais de um milhão de vidas atendidas diariamente em todo o país, cuidar de perto dos(as) nossos(as) clientes e das nossas pessoas está em nosso DNA. Somos mais de 57 mil profissionais comprometidos em construir o futuro da saúde com calor humano e tecnologia. Temos a sustentabilidade no centro da nossa estratégia, dividindo nossa ambição em três pilares: pessoas, negócio e planeta mais saudáveis. #J-18808-Ljbffr

title: Supervisor de Frente de Caixa
description:
Confira a vaga para Supervisor de Frente de Caixa em rio branco. Veja os detalhes e como se candidatar.

Garantir o funcionamento eficiente e organizado da frente de caixa, assegurando a qualidade no atendimento ao cliente, a precisão nas operações de pagamento e o cumprimento das políticas e normas da empresa. Gerir a equipe, realizando a montagem de escalas, controle de folgas, férias, banco de horas e horas extras; Acompanhar o controle do quadro de colaboradores do setor; Realizar testes práticos na seleção de candidatos, aprovando ou reprovando conforme desempenho; Realizar a avaliação do tempo de experiência dos colaboradores; Solicitar mudança de função, transferências e desligamentos de colaboradores do setor; Organizar o fluxo de trabalho e garantir que os colaboradores compreendam suas atribuições; Monitorar a produtividade dos colaboradores e oferecer feedback. Acompanhar os produtos armazenados no setor e, conforme a necessidade, solicitar pedidos e ofertas; Realizar o acompanhamento de margens, metas, perdas, usos e consumos, horas extras e demais despesas do setor.; Supervisionar a separação e organização dos produtos para a realização de inventários; Realizar checklists diários do setor, participar de reuniões gerenciais e com as diretorias, realizar reuniões com a equipe e aplicar medidas disciplinares conforme a gravidade do ato faltoso; Supervisionar o manuseio de objetos cortantes e perfurantes, utilizar ferramentas manuais e utensílios, utilizar EPIs e respeitar as normas de segurança e os procedimentos da empresa; Elaborar e supervisionar a escala de plantonistas da loja; Atuar como plantonista gerencial na ausência do gerente; Supervisionar o atendimento ao cliente, garantindo o cumprimento dos padrões da empresa e promovendo um bom relacionamento com o público; Supervisionar e orientar os clientes sobre os produtos, informando e conduzindo-os até a mercadoria desejada, quando solicitado; Auxiliar no treinamento de novos colaboradores; Supervisionar o cumprimento das normas de higiene e dos procedimentos de segurança alimentar e do trabalho; Solicitar e acompanhar o uso adequado de EPIs e o cumprimento das normas internas de segurança; Supervisionar e manter a limpeza, a higienização, a desinfecção e a organização do setor; Supervisionar a tara das balanças e os códigos dos produtos pesáveis; Verificar a validade dos produtos, retirando e descartando, em locais apropriados, aqueles impróprios para o consumo; Realizar o pedido de compra de diretamente com o fornecedor e comprador; Promover ajustes de estoque; Garantir o abastecimento, precificação e organização dos produtos nas prateleiras e gôndolas. Monitorar a validade e a qualidade dos itens expostos. Coordenar, balancear as atividades, bem como procedimentos dos subordinados e promotores; Acompanhar as baixa para o setor. (Sacolas, bobinas, sacola de vinho, papel A4) Acompanhar cancelamentos, descontos, consumo do dia anterior; Acompanhar contagem dos bombons na segunda feira; Acompanhar precificação, abastecimento do check stand; Acompanhar o fechamento de caixa junto com a tesouraria do dia anterior, verificar se tem vale, descarregamento de cartão ou algum processo do caixa errado; Acompanhar a planilha de validade, desconto e consumo junto com o atendente; Verificar se chegou produtos do check stand; Acompanhar as contagens dos produtos da frente de caixa; Fazer acompanhamento do atendimento sobre os processos, devolução, transação de cartão debitado 2x; Acompanhamento de anúncios; Acompanhamento de relatórios de fiscais, anotações diárias. #J-18808-Ljbffr

title: AM02 | SUPERVISOR(A) DE MÍDIAS SOCIAIS
description:
Nova oportunidade para AM02 | SUPERVISOR(A) DE MÍDIAS SOCIAIS em manaus. Saiba mais sobre essa vaga.

Responsável por planejar, coordenar e supervisionar estratégias digitais multicanais do Grupo PMZ, garantindo a execução de campanhas eficazes e alinhadas aos objetivos organizacionais. O cargo envolve a gestão de presença digital em mídias orgânicas e pagas, otimização de funis de conversão e análise de resultados para impulsionar vendas, engajamento e inovação nos canais digitais. Responsabilidades e atribuições Desenvolver e implementar estratégias multicanais para redes sociais, anúncios pagos e ações de inbound marketing. Supervisionar o planejamento estratégico e a execução de campanhas digitais com foco em performance e engajamento. Elaborar briefings para equipes internas e fornecedores externos, como agências de marketing. Acompanhar métricas e KPIs para avaliar o desempenho das campanhas digitais e propor melhorias contínuas. Desenvolver relatórios e painéis de controle para avaliação de resultados e metas alcançadas. Administrar o orçamento do centro de custo de mídia online, otimizando recursos e maximizando o ROI. Gerir equipes e promover um ambiente de trabalho colaborativo, com comunicação clara e construtiva. Priorizar tarefas e resolver problemas em tempo real para garantir a eficiência operacional. Alinhar as metas do Grupo PMZ e da Escola PMZ com as atividades executadas pelas equipes. Monitorar e revisar materiais criativos produzidos para assegurar a qualidade e adequação às estratégias. Avaliar o desempenho de agências de marketing e propor ajustes quando necessário. Implementar inovações, como o projeto piloto de vendas pelo WhatsApp e estratégias de automação e nutrição de leads. Identificar e apresentar oportunidades de parcerias e evoluções no marketing digital. Planejar e executar campanhas de tráfego para lojas físicas e digitais, ampliando a base de leads e potencializando vendas. Executar outras tarefas relacionadas com o cargo, a critério do superior. Manter o ambiente de trabalho organizado e limpo, de acordo com o Projeto da Qualidade. Zelar por máquinas, equipamentos e materiais através do uso correto e controle de despesas a fim de contribuir com a redução de despesas com manutenções adicionais, evitando danos e prolongando sua vida útil. #J-18808-Ljbffr
